## мң мқҳм Ғ лІ„м „мқ„ мҚЁм•ј н•ҳлҠ” мқҙмң 

мң мқҳм Ғ лІ„м „мқҖ нҳҒмӢ м Ғмқё м•„мқҙл””м–ҙк°Җ м•„лӢҲлӢӨ. мӮ¬мӢӨ, мқҙлҜё мқҙмҷҖ л№„мҠ·н•ң л°©мӢқмңјлЎң лІ„м „мқ„ м •н•ҙм„ң м“°кі  мһҲм—Ҳмқ„ мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ. л¬ём ңлҠ” мқҙмҷҖ "л№„мҠ·н•ң" л°©мӢқмңјлЎңлҠ” м¶©л¶„м№ҳ м•ҠлӢӨлҠ” м җмқҙлӢӨ. м–ҙл– н•ң нҳ•нғңлЎң м •мӢқ лӘ…м„ёлҘј м •н•ҙм„ң л”°лҘҙм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨл©ҙ, лІ„м „ лІҲнҳёлҠ” мқҳмЎҙм„ұ кҙҖлҰ¬м—җм„ң л¬ҙмқҳлҜён•ҳлӢӨ. мқҙмғҒмқҳ м•„мқҙл””м–ҙм—җ мқҙлҰ„мқ„ м •н•ҳкі  лӘ…мӢңм Ғмқё м •мқҳлҘј лӮҙлҰјмңјлЎңмҚЁ, мҶҢн”„нҠёмӣЁм–ҙ мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗм—җкІҢ м ңмһ‘мһҗмқҳ мқҳлҸ„лҘј м „лӢ¬н•ҳкё° мү¬мӣҢм§„лӢӨ. мқҳлҸ„к°Җ лӘ…нҷ•н•ҙм•јл§Ң, (л„Ҳл¬ҙ м§ҖлӮҳм№ҳм§ҖлҠ” м•ҠмқҖ) мңөнҶөм„ұ мһҲлҠ” мқҳмЎҙм„ұ лӘ…м„ёлҘј л§Ңл“Ө мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

мң мқҳм Ғ лІ„м „мңјлЎң м–ҙл–»кІҢ мқҳмЎҙм„ұ м§ҖмҳҘмқ„ лІ—м–ҙлӮ  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ”м§Җ к°„лӢЁн•ң мҳҲлҘј л“Өм–ҙліҙмһҗ. "Firetruck"мқҙлқјлҠ” лқјмқҙлёҢлҹ¬лҰ¬к°Җ мһҲлӢӨкі  н•ҳмһҗ. мқҙ лқјмқҙлёҢлҹ¬лҰ¬лҠ” мң мқҳм Ғ лІ„м „мқҙ л¶ҷмқҖ "Ladder"лқјлҠ” нҢЁнӮӨм§Җм—җ мқҳмЎҙн•ңлӢӨ. Firetruckмқ„ л§Ңл“Өм—Ҳмқ„ л•Ң, LadderлҠ” лІ„м „ 3.1.0мқҙм—ҲлӢӨ. Firetruckмқҙ 3.1.0м—җ мІҳмқҢмңјлЎң м¶”к°Җлҗң кё°лҠҘмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н–Ҳкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ, Ladderмқҳ мқҳмЎҙм„ұмқ„ 3.1.0 мқҙмғҒ, 4.0.0 лҜёл§ҢмңјлЎң м§Җм •н•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ. мқҙм ң, Ladderмқҳ 3.1.1 лІ„м „кіј 3.2.0 лІ„м „мқҙ кіөк°ңлҗңлӢӨл©ҙ, нҢЁнӮӨм§Җ кҙҖлҰ¬ мӢңмҠӨн…ңм—җ к·ё лІ„м „мқ„ л„Јмқ„ мҲҳ мһҲкі  кё°мЎҙ мҶҢн”„нҠёмӣЁм–ҙмҷҖ нҳёнҷҳлҗ  кІғмқҙлқјкі  м•Ң мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

л¬јлЎ , мұ…мһ„к°җ мһҲлҠ” к°ңл°ңмһҗлЎңм„ң нҢЁнӮӨм§Җк°Җ м—…к·ёл Ҳмқҙл“ңлҗң л¶Җл¶„мқҙ нҷҚліҙлҗң лҢҖлЎң мһҳ лҸҷмһ‘н•ҳлҠ”м§Җ кІҖмҰқн•ҳкі мһҗ н•  кІғмқҙлӢӨ. мӢӨмғҒмқҖ м§Җм Җл¶„н•ҳлӢӨ; мЎ°мӢ¬н•ҙм„ң кҙҖлҰ¬н•ҳлҠ” кІғ мҷём—җлҠ” лӢ¬лҰ¬ лҸ„лҰ¬к°Җ м—ҶлӢӨ. мң мқҳм Ғ лІ„м „мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ЁмңјлЎңмҚЁ мқҳмЎҙн•ҳлҠ” нҢЁнӮӨм§Җл“Өмқҳ мғҲ лІ„м „л“Өкіј м”ЁлҰ„н•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡкі , мӢңк°„ лӮӯл№„мҷҖ мҶҢлһҖ м—Ҷмқҙ нҢЁнӮӨм§ҖлҘј кіөк°ңн•ҳкі  м—…к·ёл Ҳмқҙл“ңн•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

л§Ңм•Ҫ мқҙмғҒмқҳ лӮҙмҡ©мқҙ к·ёлҹҙмӢён•ҳлӢӨл©ҙ, мң мқҳм Ғ лІ„м „мқ„ м“°кё° мӢңмһ‘н•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙм„ң н•  мқјмқҖ, к·ёл ҮкІҢ н•ҳкі мһҗ л§ҲмқҢлЁ№кі  к·ңм№ҷмқ„ л”°лҘҙкё°л§Ң н•ҳл©ҙ лҗңлӢӨ. м—¬лҹ¬л¶„мқҳ README нҢҢмқјм—җ мқҙ мӣ№мӮ¬мқҙнҠёмқҳ л§ҒнҒ¬лҘј м¶”к°Җн•ҙм„ң лӢӨлҘё мӮ¬лһҢл“ӨлҸ„ мң мҡ©н•ҳкІҢ м“ё мҲҳ мһҲкІҢ н•ҳмһҗ.

## FAQ

### мҙҲкё° к°ңл°ң лӢЁкі„м—җ 0.y.z лІ„м „ кҙҖлҰ¬лҠ” м–ҙл–»кІҢ н• к№Ң?

к°ҖмһҘ к°„лӢЁн•ң л°©лІ•мқҖ мөңмҙҲ к°ңл°ң л°°нҸ¬лҘј 0.1.0мңјлЎң н•ҳкі , мқҙнӣ„ л°°нҸ¬л§ҲлӢӨ л¶ҖлІ„м „мқ„ мҳ¬лҰ¬лҠ” кІғмқҙлӢӨ.

### м–ём ң 1.0.0мқ„ л°°нҸ¬н•ҙм•ј н• м§Җ м–ҙл–»кІҢ м•Ң мҲҳ мһҲлӮҳ?

мҶҢн”„нҠёмӣЁм–ҙк°Җ мӢӨ м„ңл№„мҠӨм—җ м“°мқҙкё° мӢңмһ‘н–ҲлӢӨл©ҙ мқҙлҜё 1.0.0мқҙлқјкі  м—¬кёё мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ. мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗл“Өмқҙ лҜҝкі  м“ё мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” м•Ҳм •н•ң APIк°Җ мһҲлӢӨл©ҙ 1.0.0мқј кІғмқҙлӢӨ. н•ҳмң„ лІ„м „ нҳёнҷҳм„ұм—җ лҢҖн•ҙ мҡ°л Өн•ҳкё° мӢңмһ‘н–ҲлӢӨл©ҙ мқҙлҜё 1.0.0мқј мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

### мң мқҳм Ғ лІ„м „ м§“кё°к°Җ мӢ мҶҚн•ң к°ңл°ңкіј л№ лҘё мқҙн„°л Ҳмқҙм…ҳм—җ л°©н•ҙк°Җ лҗҳм§ҖлҠ” м•Ҡмқ„к№Ң?

мЈјлІ„м „ 0мқҙ мӢ мҶҚн•ң к°ңл°ңмқ„ мң„н•ң кІғмқҙлӢӨ. л§Ңм•Ҫ APIлҘј л§Өмқјк°ҷмқҙ л°”кҫёкі  мһҲлӢӨл©ҙ 0.y.z лІ„м „мқ„ м“°кұ°лӮҳ лі„лҸ„мқҳ лӢӨмқҢлІҲ мЈјлІ„м „ л°°нҸ¬лҘј м•һл‘” к°ңл°ң лёҢлһңм№ҳлҘј мҚЁм•ј н•ңлӢӨ.

### кіөк°ң APIмқҳ м•„мЈј мӮ¬мҶҢн•ң л¶Җл¶„мқҙ н•ҳмң„нҳёнҷҳмқҙ лҗҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨкі  мЈјлІ„м „мқ„ л§ӨлІҲ мҳ¬л Өм•ј н•ңлӢӨл©ҙ, м–ҙлҠҗмғҲ лІ„м „ 42.0.0мқҙ лҗҳм–ҙлІ„лҰ¬м§ҖлҠ” м•ҠлӮҳ?

мұ…мһ„к°җ мһҲкі  м„ кІ¬м§ҖлӘ…мқҙ мһҲлҠ” м§Ҳл¬ёмқҙлӢӨ. мқҳмЎҙн•ҳлҠ” мҪ”л“ңк°Җ л§ҺмқҖ мҶҢн”„нҠёмӣЁм–ҙм—җ, нҳёнҷҳлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ” ліҖнҷ”лҘј к°ҖліҚкІҢ лҸ„мһ…н•ҙм„ңлҠ” м•Ҳ лҗңлӢӨ. кҙҖл Ён•ҙм„ң м—…к·ёл Ҳмқҙл“ңн•ҳлҠ” лҚ° н•„мҡ”н•ң л№„мҡ©мқҙ м–ҙл§Ҳм–ҙл§Ҳн•ҙм§Ҳ мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ. нҳёнҷҳлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ” ліҖкІҪл¶„мқ„ л°°нҸ¬н•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙ мЈјлІ„м „мқ„ мҳ¬лҰ¬л Өл©ҙ, л°”лҖҢлҠ” л¶Җл¶„м—җ мқён•ң м—¬нҢҢмҷҖ к·ё л№„мҡ©кіј нҳңнғқмқ„ м¶©л¶„нһҲ нҸүк°Җн•ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ.

### кіөк°ң API м „мІҙлҘј л¬ём„ңлЎң л§Ңл“ңлҠ” кІғмқҖ мқјмқҙ л„Ҳл¬ҙ л§ҺлӢӨ!

н”„лЎң к°ңл°ңмһҗлЎңм„ң лӢӨлҘё мӮ¬лһҢл“Өмқҙ м“°кІҢ н•ҳл Өкі  л§Ңл“  мҶҢн”„нҠёмӣЁм–ҙлҘј м Ғм ҲнһҲ л¬ём„ңлЎң л§Ңл“ңлҠ” кІғмқҖ мұ…мһ„мқҙлӢӨ. н”„лЎңм қнҠёлҘј нҡЁмңЁм ҒмңјлЎң мң м§Җн•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙ мҶҢн”„нҠёмӣЁм–ҙмқҳ ліөмһЎм„ұмқ„ кҙҖлҰ¬н•ҳлҠ” мқјмқҖ л§Өмҡ° мӨ‘мҡ”н•ң мқјмқҙкі , лӮЁмқҙ мҶҢн”„нҠёмӣЁм–ҙлҘј м–ҙл–»кІҢ м“°лҠ”м§Җ лӘЁлҘҙкұ°лӮҳ м–ҙл–Ө л©”мҶҢл“ңл“Өмқ„ м•Ҳм „н•ҳкІҢ нҳём¶ңн•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” кұҙм§Җ лӘЁлҘёлӢӨл©ҙ м–ҙл Өмҡё кІғмқҙлӢӨ. мһҘкё°м ҒмңјлЎң ліј л•Ң, мң мқҳм Ғ лІ„м „кіј мһҳ м •мқҳн•ң кіөк°ң APIлҠ” кҙҖл Ёлҗң лӘЁл“  мӮ¬лһҢкіј лӘЁл“  кІғмқҙ мҲңмЎ°лЎӯкІҢ м§ҖлӮј мҲҳ мһҲкІҢ н•ңлӢӨ.

### л¶ҖлІ„м „мқ„ мҳ¬лҰ¬лҠ”лҚ° мӢӨмҲҳлЎң нҳёнҷҳлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ” ліҖкІҪмқҙ л“Өм–ҙк°”лӢӨл©ҙ м–ҙл–»кІҢ н•ҙм•ј н•ҳлӮҳ?

мң мқҳм Ғ лІ„м „ лӘ…м„ёлҘј м–ҙкІјлӢӨлҠ” мӮ¬мӢӨмқ„ м•ҢкІҢ лҗҳл©ҙ, мҰүмӢң л¬ём ңлҘј н•ҙкІ°н•ҳкі  нҳёнҷҳм„ұмқҙ к№Ём§„ л¶Җл¶„мқ„ ліөкө¬н•ҙм„ң мғҲ л¶ҖлІ„м „мқ„ л°°нҸ¬н•ңлӢӨ. мқҙ кІҪмҡ°лқјлҸ„ мқҙлҜё л°°нҸ¬лҗң лІ„м „мқ„ ліҖкІҪн•ҙм„ңлҠ” м•Ҳ лҗңлӢӨ. н•„мҡ”н•ң кІҪмҡ°лқјл©ҙ л¬ём ңк°Җ лҗҳлҠ” лІ„м „мқ„ л¬ём„ңлЎң н‘ңмӢңн•ҙм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗл“ӨлЎң н•ҳм—¬кёҲ мЈјмқҳн•ҳлҸ„лЎқ н•ңлӢӨ.

### кіөк°ң APIлҠ” мң м§Җн•ң мұ„ лӮҙл¶Җмқҳ мқҳмЎҙм„ұмқ„ л°”кҫјлӢӨл©ҙ м–ҙл–»кІҢ н• к№Ң?

кіөк°ң APIм—җ мҳҒн–Ҙмқ„ мЈјм§Җ м•ҠмңјлҜҖлЎң нҳёнҷҳлҗңлӢӨкі  м—¬кёҙлӢӨ. лӢ№мӢ мқҳ нҢЁнӮӨм§ҖмҷҖ лҳ‘к°ҷмқҖ мқҳмЎҙм„ұмқ„ лӘ…мӢңн•ң мҶҢн”„нҠёмӣЁм–ҙлҠ” лі„лҸ„лЎң мқҳмЎҙм„ұ лӘ…м„ёк°Җ мһҲм–ҙм•ј н•ҳкі  мһ‘м„ұмһҗлҠ” м¶©лҸҢмқ„ лҲҲм№ҳмұҢ кІғмқҙлӢӨ. ліҖнҷ”к°Җ мҲҳлІ„м „ мҲҳмӨҖмқём§Җ л¶ҖлІ„м „ мҲҳмӨҖмқём§Җ кІ°м •н•ҳлҠ” кІғмқҖ лІ„к·ёлҘј мҲҳм •н•ҳкі мһҗ н•ң мһ‘м—…мқём§Җ, мғҲлЎңмҡҙ кё°лҠҘмқ„ м¶”к°Җн•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙм„ңмқём§Җм—җ лӢ¬л ӨмһҲлӢӨ. нӣ„мһҗмқҳ кІҪмҡ°, м¶”к°Җм Ғмқё мҪ”л“ңлҘј мҳҲмғҒн•  кІғмқҙл©°, к·ёл ҮлӢӨл©ҙ лӢ№м—°нһҲ л¶ҖлІ„м „мқ„ мҰқк°Җн•ҙм•ј н•  кІғмқҙлӢӨ.

### мӢӨмҲҳлЎң лІ„м „ мҰқк°ҖмҷҖ л§һм§Җ м•ҠкІҢ кіөк°ң API ліҖкІҪмқ„ н–ҲлӢӨл©ҙ м–ҙл–»кІҢ н•ҳлӮҳ? (мҲҳлІ„м „ л°°нҸ¬м—җм„ң мһҳлӘ»лҗң мҪ”л“ңк°Җ л“Өм–ҙк°Җм„ң к№Ём§ҖкІҢ лҗң кІҪмҡ°)

мҠӨмҠӨлЎң мөңм„ мқҳ нҢҗлӢЁмқ„ н•ҳмһҗ. кіөк°ң APIк°Җ мӣҗлһҳ мқҳлҸ„н–ҲлҚҳ лҢҖлЎң мӮ¬мҡ©лҗ  мҲҳ мһҲкІҢ л°”кҫёлҠ” мһ‘м—…м—җ мҳҒн–Ҙмқ„ л°ӣлҠ” лҢҖк·ңлӘЁ мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗмёөмқҙ мһҲлӢӨл©ҙ, мҲҳм •мӮ¬н•ӯмқҙ м—„л°ҖнһҲ л”°м§Җмһҗл©ҙ мҲҳлІ„м „ л°°нҸ¬лЎң м—¬кІЁм ём•ј н•ңлӢӨ н•ҳлҚ”лқјлҸ„, мЈјлІ„м „ л°°нҸ¬лҘј н•ҳлҠ” кІғмқҙ мөңм„ мқј кІғмқҙлӢӨ. мң мқҳм Ғ лІ„м „мқҖ м–ҙл–»кІҢ лІ„м „ лІҲнҳёк°Җ л°”лҖҢлҠ”м§Җ мқҳлҜёлҘј м „лӢ¬н•ҳлҠ” кІғмқҙ м „л¶Җмһ„мқ„ мһҠм§Җ л§җмһҗ. ліҖкІҪмқҙ мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗм—җкІҢ мӨ‘мҡ”н•ң мқҳлҜёк°Җ мһҲлӢӨл©ҙ, лІ„м „ лІҲнҳёлЎң мһҳ м•ҢлҰҙ мҲҳ мһҲлҸ„лЎқ н•ңлӢӨ.

### м ңкұ°н•ҳлҠ” кё°лҠҘл“Өм—җ лҢҖн•ҙм„ңлҠ” м–ҙл–»кІҢ н• к№Ң?

кё°мЎҙмқҳ кё°лҠҘл“Өмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм§Җ лӘ»н•ҳкІҢ м—Ҷм• лҠ” кІғмқҖ мҶҢн”„нҠёмӣЁм–ҙ к°ңл°ңкіјм •мқҳ мһҗм—°мҠӨлҹ¬мҡҙ мқјл¶Җл¶„мқҙл©°, л•ҢлЎңлҠ” м•һмңјлЎң лӮҳм•„к°Җкё° мң„н•ҙ н•„мҲҳм Ғмқё мқјмқҙкё°лҸ„ н•ҳлӢӨ. кіөк°ң APIмқҳ мқјл¶ҖлҘј м ңкұ°н•ҳкі мһҗ н•ҳлӢӨл©ҙ лӢӨмқҢмқҳ л‘җ к°Җм§Җ мқјмқ„ н•ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ: (1) л¬ём„ңлҘј м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠён•ҙм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗл“Өм—җкІҢ ліҖнҷ”лҘј м•ҢлҰ¬лҸ„лЎқ н•ңлӢӨ. (2) н•ҙлӢ№ кё°лҠҘмқҙ м ңкұ°лҗ  кұ°лқј н‘ңмӢңлҗң мғҲ л¶ҖлІ„м „мқ„ м Ғм Ҳн•ң мӢңкё°м—җ л°°нҸ¬н•ңлӢӨ. мғҲ мЈјлІ„м „м—җм„ң мҷ„м „нһҲ кё°лҠҘмқ„ м ңкұ°н•ҳкё° м „м—җ, м ңкұ°лҗ  кІғмқҙлқј н‘ңмӢңн•ң л¶ҖлІ„м „ л°°нҸ¬лҘј мөңмҶҢн•ң н•ң лІҲмқҖ м§„н–үн•ҙм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗл“Өмқҙ мӣҗнҷңн•ҳкІҢ мғҲлЎңмҡҙ APIлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҸ„лЎқ н•ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ.

### мң мқҳм Ғ лІ„м „(SemVer)мқҳ лІ„м „ л¬ёмһҗм—ҙ кёёмқҙм—җ м ңн•ңмқҙ мһҲлӮҳ?

м—Ҷм§Җл§Ң, мһҳ нҢҗлӢЁ н•ҳмһҗ. мҳҲлҘј л“Өм–ҙ, 255мһҗ лІ„м „ л¬ёмһҗм—ҙмқҖ м•„л§ҲлҸ„ м§ҖлӮҳм№ҳкІҢ кёҙ кІғмқј кІғмқҙлӢӨ. лҳҗ, лӘҮлӘҮ мӢңмҠӨн…ңмқҖ л¬ёмһҗм—ҙ кёёмқҙм—җ лҢҖн•ҙ лӮҳлҰ„мқҳ м ңн•ңмқҙ мһҲмқ„ кІғмқҙлӢӨ.

## мһ‘м„ұмһҗ

мң мқҳм Ғ лІ„м „ лӘ…м„ёлҠ” к·ёлқјл°”нғҖ(Gravatars)мқҳ м°ҪмӢңмһҗмқҙмһҗ к№ғн—ҷ(GitHub)мқҳ кіөлҸҷм°Ҫм—…мһҗмқё нҶ° н”„л ҲмҠӨн„ҙ-лІ лҘҙл„Ҳ(Tom
Preston-Werner)к°Җ мһ‘м„ұн–ҲлӢӨ.

мӣҗл¬ём—җ лҢҖн•ң мқҳкІ¬мқ„ лӮЁкё°кі мһҗ н•ңлӢӨл©ҙ, мӣҗл¬ё к№ғн—ҷм—җ мқҙмҠҲлҘј мһ‘м„ұн•ҙ мЈјкё° л°”лһҖлӢӨ.

н•ңкөӯм–ҙ лІҲм—ӯмқҖ к№ҖлҢҖнҳ„мқҙ н–Ҳкі , кҙҖл Ён•ң мқҳкІ¬мқҖ н•ңкөӯм–ҙнҢҗ к№ғн—ҷм—җ мқҙмҠҲлЎң лӮЁкІЁмЈјкё° л°”лһҖлӢӨ.

server {

## certbot

 -d wiki.loliot.net \
 -d loliot.net

sudo certbot renew

title: Embedded Linux boot process
text:
## BL1
This stage begins execution from the platform's reset vector in trusted ROM at EL3. BL1 code starts at 0x00000000 (trusted ROM) in the FVP memory map. The BL1 data section is placed at the start of trusted SRAM, 0x04000000. The functionality implemented by this stage is as follows.

- BL1 performs minimal architectural initialization as follows.
 - Exception vectors
 - MMU setup
 - Control register setup
- Platform initialization
- BL2 image load and execution
 - BL1 loads a BL2 raw binary image from platform storage, at a platform-specific base address
 - BL1 passes control to the BL2 image at Secure EL1, starting from its load address
 - BL1 also passes information about the amount of trusted SRAM used and available for use. This information is populated at a platform-specific memory address

## BL2
BL1 loads and passes control to BL2 at Secure-EL1. BL2 is linked against and loaded at a platform-specific base address (more information can be found later in this document). The functionality implemented by BL2 is as follows.

- Architectural initialization
- Platform initialization
- BL3-0 (System Control Processor Firmware) image load
 - BL2 loads **the optional BL3-0 image** from platform storage into a platform-specific region of secure memory
- BL3-1 (EL3 Runtime Firmware) image load
- BL3-2 (Secure-EL1 Payload) image load
 - BL2 loads **the optional BL3-2 image** from platform storage into a platform- specific region of secure memory
- BL3-3 (Non-trusted Firmware) image load
 - BL2 loads the BL3-3 image (e.g., **UEFI or other test or boot software**) from platform storage into **non-secure memory** as defined by the platform (0x88000000 for FVPs)
- BL3-1 (EL3 Runtime Firmware) execution
 - BL1 passes control to BL3-1 at the specified entrypoint at EL3
 - BL2 relies on BL3-1 to pass control to BL3-3 once secure state initialization is complete

## BL3-1
The image for this stage is loaded by BL2 and BL1 passes control to BL3-1 at EL3. BL3-1 executes solely in trusted SRAM. BL3-1 is linked against and loaded at a platform-specific base address (more information can be found later in this document). The functionality implemented by BL3-1 is as follows.

- Architectural initialization
- Platform initialization
 - GICv2 initialization
 - GICv3 initialization
 - Power management initialization
 - Runtime services initialization
 - BL3-2 (Secure-EL1 Payload) image initialization
 - BL3-3 (Non-trusted Firmware) execution

``text
Trusted SRAM
+----------+ 0x04040000
| |
|----------|
| BL2 |
|----------|
| |
|----------|
| BL31 |
|----------|
| |
|----------|
| BL1 (rw) |
+----------+ 0x04000000

Trusted ROM
+----------+ 0x04000000
| BL1 (ro) |
+----------+ 0x00000000
``

## BL3-2

Optional BL for Security.

## BL3-3

Boot software like u-boot.

title: Receptor-Ligand Interactions
text:
## Terminology

- receptor: мғқл¬јн•ҷм Ғ мӢңмҠӨн…ңм—җ нҶөн•©лҗ  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” мӢ нҳёлҘј мҲҳмӢ н•ҳкі  ліҖнҷҳн•ҳлҠ” proteinмңјлЎң кө¬м„ұлҗң л¬јм§Ҳ
- ligand: мғқл¬јн•ҷм Ғ лӘ©м Ғмқ„ мҲҳн–үн•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙ нҠ№м • moleculeкіј complexлҘј нҳ•м„ұн•ҳлҠ” л¬јм§Ҳ

## Interactions

ligandлҠ” мқјл°ҳм ҒмңјлЎң target proteinмқҳ нҠ№м • siteм—җ кІ°н•©н•ҳл©° кІ°н•©мқҖ ionic bonds, hydrogen bonds л°Ҹ Van der Waals forcesмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ non-covalent bindingм—җ мқҳн•ҙ мң м§Җлҗҳл©°, solvent effectsм—җ мҳҒн–Ҙмқ„ л°ӣмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. кІ°н•©мқҖ мқјл°ҳм ҒмңјлЎң target proteinмқҳ conformational isomerism(conformation)мқҳ ліҖнҷ”лҘј мҙҲлһҳн•©лӢҲлӢӨ. proteinмқҳ conformationмқҖ н•ҙлӢ№ proteinмқҳ functionмқ„ мқҳлҜён•  мҲҳ мһҲмңјлҜҖлЎң л”°лқјм„ң conformationмқҳ ліҖнҷ”лҠ” functionмқҳ ліҖнҷ”лҘј мқҳлҜён•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. кҙҖл Ёлҗң ion channelлҳҗлҠ” enzyme л“ұмқҳ ліҖкІҪлҗң н–үлҸҷмқ„ мҙҲлһҳн•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ° мғқлҰ¬н•ҷм ҒмңјлЎң мӨ‘мҡ”н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

мқҙлҹ¬н•ң мғҒнҳёмһ‘мҡ©мқ„ мқҙмҡ©н•ҳм—¬, target receptorмқҳ м—ӯн• мқ„ м Җн•ҙн•ҳкұ°лӮҳ мҙүм§„мӢңнӮӨлҠ” ligandлҘј м°ҫм•„ мӣҗн•ҳлҠ” мғқлҰ¬ л°ҳмқ‘мқ„ мқҙлҒҢм–ҙлӮҙлҠ” м•Ҫмқ„ л§Ңл“Ө мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. м•ҪнҡЁлҠ” binding affinityмҷҖ ligand efficacy л“ұ лӘЁл‘җмқҳ ліөмһЎн•ң мғҒнҳёмһ‘мҡ©мқҳ кІ°кіјмқҙлҜҖлЎң, м•ҪнҡЁк°Җ мһҲлҠ” л¬јм§Ҳмқ„ н•ң лІҲм—җ м°ҫкё° м–ҙл өмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

## Docking

DTI(Drug-target interaction)

MMGBSA(Molecular Mechanics Generalized Born Surface Area) binding affinity(kcal/mol лӢЁмң„)лҘј м¶”м •н•  л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©лҗҳлҠ” кі„мӮ° л°©лІ•

MMPBSA(Molecular Mechanics Poisson-Boltzmann Surface Area) binding free energyлҘј м¶”м •н•  л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©лҗҳлҠ” кі„мӮ° л°©лІ•

PLIP(Protein-Ligand Interaction Profiler)

privileged scaffoldлҠ” м•Ңл Өм§„ м•Ҫл¬јмқҙлӮҳ мғқл¬јн•ҷм Ғ нҷңм„ұ нҷ”н•©л¬јмқҳ нҠ№м • л°°м—ҙ мӮ¬мқҙм—җм„ң нҶөкі„м ҒмңјлЎң л°ҳліөлҗҳлҠ” л¶„мһҗ кө¬мЎ° лҳҗлҠ” нҷ”н•ҷм Ғ moietyмқёлҚ°, мқҙлҹ¬н•ң мҡ”мҶҢлҠ” мғҲлЎңмҡҙ нҷңм„ұ мғқл¬јн•ҷм Ғ нҷ”н•©л¬ј лҳҗлҠ” нҷ”н•©л¬ј лқјмқҙлёҢлҹ¬лҰ¬лҘј м„Өкі„н•ҳкё° мң„н•ң кё°мҙҲлЎң мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

## Reference

- https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ligand\_(biochemistry)>)
- https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Receptor\_(biochemistry)>)
- https://www.khanacademy.org/science/ap-biology/cell-communication-and-cell-cycle/signal-transduction/a/signal-perception

title: Neural Network
text:
Neural Network

## Neuron(Perceptron)

 Neuron(Perceptron)

$$
z^l_j = \sum_k{\omega^l_{jk}a^{l-1}_k} + b^l_j
$$

$$
a^l_j = \sigma\left(z^l_j\right)
$$

## Loss function

### L2 loss function

$$
Loss \equiv \frac{1}{2} \lVert \mathbf{y} - \mathbf{a}^L \rVert^2 = \frac{1}{2} \sum_i{\left(y_i - a^L_i\right)^2}
$$

$$
Loss \geq 0 \quad \left(\mathbf{y}\text{ лҠ” мЈјм–ҙм§„ лӢө}\right)
$$

## Neural Network Training

Neural Network Trainingмқ„ нҶөн•ҙ м°ҫм•„м•ј н•  кІғмқҖ $Loss$мқҳ кІ°кіјлҘј мөңмҶҢнҷ”н•ҳкё° мң„н•ң weightsмҷҖ biasesмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. $\mathbf{w}$ к°Җ weightsмҷҖ biasesлҘј лӮҳнғҖлӮҙлҠ” лІЎн„°мқј л•Ң,

$$
Loss_{next} = Loss + \Delta Loss \approx Loss + \nabla Loss \cdot \Delta \mathbf{w}
$$

$Loss$лҠ” к°җмҶҢн•ҙм•јн•ҳкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ, л°ҳл“ңмӢң $\nabla Loss \cdot \Delta \mathbf{w} 0)
$$

$\eta$лҠ” learning rateмқҙкі , $\epsilon$мқҖ stepмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. л§Ңм•Ҫ stepмқҙ л„Ҳл¬ҙ нҒ¬лӢӨл©ҙ, $Loss$лҠ” л°ңмӮ°н•ҳкі , л„Ҳл¬ҙ мһ‘мңјл©ҙ, мҲҳл ҙмҶҚлҸ„к°Җ лҠҗл Өм§‘лӢҲлӢӨ. л”°лқјм„ң м Ғм Ҳн•ң к°’мқ„ м„Өм •н•ҳлҠ” кІғмқҙ мӨ‘мҡ”н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

$\Delta \mathbf{w}$ мқҙ кІ°м •лҗҳл©ҙ, $\mathbf{w}_{next}$мқҖ м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ кІ°м •лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

$$
\mathbf{w}_{next} = \mathbf{w} + \Delta \mathbf{w}
$$

### Stochastic Gradient Descent(SGD)

$$
\nabla Loss = \frac{1}{n}\sum_x{\nabla Loss_x}
$$

нӣҲл Ёмқ„ мң„н•ң лҚ°мқҙн„°м…Ӣмқҙ нҒ° кІҪмҡ°, мӢңк°„мқҙ л§Һмқҙ кұёлҰҙ мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. м „мІҙ лҚ°мқҙн„°м…Ӣм—җм„ң лһңлҚӨмңјлЎң лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј м„ нғқн•ҙ л§Ңл“  лҚ°мқҙн„°м…Ӣ $X_1, X_2, ..., X_m$ мқ„ mini-batchлқјкі  н•ҳлҠ”лҚ°, мқҙ mini-batchк°Җ м „мІҙ лҚ°мқҙн„° м…Ӣмқҳ л¶„нҸ¬мҷҖ мң мӮ¬н•ҳлӢӨкі  к°Җм •н•ҳл©ҙ м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ мӢқмқҙ м„ұлҰҪн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

$$
\nabla Loss = \frac{1}{n}\sum_x{\nabla Loss_x} \approx \frac{1}{m}\sum^m_{i=1}{\nabla Loss_{X_i}}
$$

- batch нҒ¬кё°к°Җ мӨ„м–ҙ н•ң stepмқ„ кі„мӮ°н•ҳлҠ”лҚ° кұёлҰ¬лҠ” мӢңк°„мқҙ мӨ„м–ҙл“ӯлӢҲлӢӨ.
- мҲҳл ҙн•ҳлҠ” лҚ° н•„мҡ”н•ң step мҲҳк°Җ мҰқк°Җн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- mini-batchмқҳ нҒ¬кё°к°Җ мһ‘мқ„ мҲҳлЎқ batchмқҳ л¶„нҸ¬к°Җ м „мІҙ лҚ°мқҙн„° м…Ӣмқҳ л¶„нҸ¬мҷҖ лӢ¬лқјм§Ҳ нҷ•лҘ мқҙ лҶ’кё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ н•ҷмҠөмқҙ л¶Ҳм•Ҳм •н•ҙм§‘лӢҲлӢӨ.
- (кі„мӮ° мӢңк°„/step) * (мҲҳл ҙм—җ н•„мҡ”н•ң step)мқ„ н•ҷмҠө мӢңк°„мқҙлқјкі  н•ҳл©ҙ, н•ҷмҠө мӢңк°„мқҙ мөңмҶҢк°Җ лҗҳлҠ” batch нҒ¬кё°к°Җ мЎҙмһ¬н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

### Forward-propagation

Forward-propagation (or forward pass)лҠ” мһ…л Ҙл¶Җн„° м¶ңл ҘмңјлЎң мқҙм–ҙм§ҖлҠ” л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬лҘј мҲңм„ңлҢҖлЎң кі„мӮ°н•ҳкі  к·ё кІ°кіјлҘј м ҖмһҘн•ҳлҠ” кіјм •мқ„ л§җн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

### Back-propagation

 Back propagation

$$
z^l_j = \sum_k{\omega^l_{jk}a^{l-1}_k} + b^l_j
$$

$$
a^l_j = \sigma\left(z^l_j\right)
$$

$Loss$лҘј м§Ғм ‘ лҜёл¶„н•ҳкё° м–ҙл өкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ, Back-propagationмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ $\nabla Loss$лҘј кі„мӮ°н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

$l$ л Ҳмқҙм–ҙмқҳ $j$ лүҙлҹ°мқҳ м—җлҹ¬ $\delta^l_j$ лҠ” м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ м •мқҳлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

$$
\delta^l_j \equiv \frac{\partial Loss}{\partial z^l_j}
$$

$z^l_j$лҠ” forward propagationмқ„ нҶөн•ҙ кі„мӮ°лҗң к°’мқҙлҜҖлЎң, $\mathbf{\delta}^{l+1}$лҘј м•ҲлӢӨл©ҙ, $\delta^l_j$лҘј м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ кө¬н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

$$
\begin{aligned}
\delta^l_j = \frac{\partial Loss}{\partial z^l_j}
& = \sum_i{\frac{\partial Loss}{\partial z^{l+1}_i} \frac{\partial z^{l+1}_i}{\partial z^l_j}}
 \quad \left( \frac{\partial z^{l+1}_i}{\partial z^l_j} = \omega^{l+1}_{ij} \, \sigma' \left(z^l_j\right) \right)\\
& = \sum_i{\frac{\partial Loss}{\partial z^{l+1}_i} \omega^{l+1}_{ij} \, \sigma' \left(z^l_j\right)} \\
& = \sum_i{\delta^{l+1}_i \omega^{l+1}_{ij} \, \sigma' \left(z^l_j\right)}
\end{aligned}
$$

L2 lossлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ңлӢӨл©ҙ, $a^L_j$лҠ” forward propagationмқ„ нҶөн•ҙ кө¬н•  мҲҳ мһҲкі  $\delta^L_j = (a^L_j - y_j) \, \sigma' \left( z^L_j \right)$ мқҙлҜҖлЎң, м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ м—җлҹ¬лҘј кө¬н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

$$
\delta^L_j = (a^L_j - y_j) \, \sigma' \left( z^L_j \right)
$$

$$
\delta^{L-1}_j = \sum_i{ \delta^L_i \omega^L_{ij} \, \sigma' \left(z^{L-1}_j\right)} \\
\vdots
$$

кІ°кіјм ҒмңјлЎң $\nabla Loss$лҠ” мң„ мӢқл“Өмқ„ нҶөн•ҙ м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ кө¬н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

$$
\frac{\partial Loss}{\partial b^l_j} = \frac{\partial Loss}{\partial z^l_j} \frac{\partial z^l_j}{\partial b^l_j} = \delta^l_j
$$

$$
\frac{\partial Loss}{\partial \omega^l_{jk}} = \frac{\partial Loss}{\partial z^l_j} \frac{\partial z^l_j}{\partial \omega^l_{jk}} = \delta^l_j a^{l-1}_k
$$

### Training

мҙҲкё° weights and biasesлҘј лһңлҚӨн•ҳкІҢ м„Өм •н•ҳкі , Forward-propagation -> Back-propagation -> weights and biases updateлҘј л°ҳліөн•ҳлҠ” кІғмқ„ Trainingмқҙлқјкі  н•©лӢҲлӢӨ. $Loss$к°Җ лҚ”мқҙмғҒ мһ‘м•„м§Ҳ мҲҳ м—ҶлӢӨкі  нҢҗлӢЁлҗ  л•Ң, weights and biases к°’мқҙ мөңмў… кІ°кіјл¬јмқҙ лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

### Initialization

мһ…л Ҙмқҳ л¶„мӮ°ліҙлӢӨ м¶ңл Ҙмқҳ л¶„мӮ°мқҙ м»Өм§Җл©ҙ нҷңм„ұнҷ” н•ЁмҲҳм—җ л”°лқј мҲҳл ҙн•ҳлҠ” л¶Җл¶„мқҙ мғқкёё мҲҳ мһҲкі , мқҙкІғмқҖ Vanishing gradient л¬ём ңлҘј м•јкё°н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

ліҖмҲҳлҘј м Ғм ҲнһҲ мҙҲкё°нҷ” н•ҙмЈјлҠ” кІғмқҖ Vanishing gradient, Exploding gradient л“ұмқҳ л¬ём ң н•ҙкІ°м—җ лҸ„мӣҖмқҙ лҗҳкі , нӣҲл ЁмҶҚлҸ„лҘј лҶ’мқј мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

## Reference

- http://neuralnetworksanddeeplearning.com
- https://machinelearning.tobiashill.se
- http://www.bdhammel.com/learning-rates

title: OpenID Connect(OIDC)
text:
## OIDC

- How OpenID Connect Works

- OIDC
 - OpenID Connect
 - Minimal: Core
 - Dynamic: Minimal, Discovery, Dynamic Client Registration
 - Complete: Dynamic, Session Management, Form Post Response Mode
- OP
 - OpenID Connect Provider
- RP
 - Relying Party

## Discovery

- OpenID Connect Discovery 1.0

OPлҠ” GET /.well-known/openid-configurationлҘј нҶөн•ҙ м„Өм •м •ліҙлҘј л…ём¶ңн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

- н•„мҲҳ(required)
 - issuer:
 - OPк°Җ л°ңкёүн•ң ID tokenмқҳ issмқҳ к°’кіј к°ҷм•„м•јн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - authorization_endpoint:
 - мқёмҰқ мҪ”л“ңлӮҳ нҶ нҒ°мқ„ л°ңкёүн•ҳлҠ” м—”л“ңнҸ¬мқёнҠёмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - token_endpoint:
 - нҶ нҒ°мқ„ л°ңкёүн•ҳкұ°лӮҳ к°ұмӢ н•ҳлҠ” м—”л“ңнҸ¬мқёнҠёмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - Implicit Flowл§Ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ° н•„мҲҳк°Җ м•„лӢҷлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - jwks_uri:
 - RPк°Җ OPлЎңл¶Җн„° л°ӣмқҖ нҶ нҒ°мқҳ м„ңлӘ…мқ„ кІҖмҰқн•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” JWK м •ліҙлҘј м ңкіөн•ҳлҠ” URIмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - response_types_supported: []
 - Dynamic OPлҠ” code, id_token, id_token tokenмқ„ н•„мҲҳлЎң м§Җмӣҗн•ҙм•јн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - subject_types_supported: []
 - public, pairwise
 - id_token_signing_alg_values_supported: []
 - RS256лҘј н•„мҲҳлЎң м§Җмӣҗн•ҙм•јн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- м¶”мІң(recommended)
 - userinfo_endpoint:
 - access_tokenм—җ н•ҙлӢ№н•ҳлҠ” мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗ м •ліҙлҘј м ңкіөн•ҳлҠ” м—”л“ңнҸ¬мқёнҠёмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - мқҙ м—”л“ңнҸ¬мқёнҠёлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” кІғмңјлЎң нҶ нҒ° кІҖмҰқмқ„ лҢҖмІҙн•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - registration_endpoint:
 - scopes_supported: []
 - openidлҘј н•„мҲҳлЎң м§Җмӣҗн•ҙм•јн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - claims_supported: []
 - end_session_endpoint:
- м„ нғқ(optional)

title: RESTful API
text:
## REST(REpresentational State Transfer)
The REST architectural style emphasises the scalability of interactions between components, uniform interfaces, independent deployment of components, and the creation of a layered architecture to facilitate caching components to reduce user-perceived latency, enforce security, and encapsulate legacy systems.

лӘЁл“  APIлҘј RESTfulн•ҳкІҢ м •мқҳн•ҳкі  к°ңл°ңн•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” л¶Җл¶„мқҖ к·ёл ҮкІҢ н•ҳл©ҙ мўӢкІ м§Җл§Ң, мһҳ лӘЁлҘҙкІ кұ°лӮҳ м• л§Өн•ң л¶Җл¶„мқҙ мһҲм–ҙм„ң м–ҙл Өмҡҙ кІғ к°ҷмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

## URI(Uniform Resource Identifiers)

:///[?][#]

- /лҠ” лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨ мӮ¬мқҙмқҳ кі„мёөм Ғ кҙҖкі„лҘј лӮҳнғҖлӮј л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©
- URIмқҳ л§Ҳм§Җл§үм—җлҠ” /лҘј л¶ҷмқҙм§Җ м•ҠмқҢ
- -лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ
- _лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмқҢ
- лҢҖмҶҢл¬ёмһҗлҘј кө¬л¶„, мқјл°ҳм ҒмңјлЎң мҶҢл¬ёмһҗлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©

## URI path

- Collection
 - м—¬лҹ¬ лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨк°Җ л“Өм–ҙмһҲлҠ” н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ л””л үн„°лҰ¬лҘј к°ҖлҰ¬нӮӨлҠ” лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨ, м„ңлІ„м—җм„ң кҙҖлҰ¬
 - ліөмҲҳ лӘ…мӮ¬лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©
 - e.g., /products
- Document
 - н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ к°қмІҙлҘј к°ҖлҰ¬нӮӨлҠ” лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨ
 - н•ҳмң„ лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨлҘј к°Җм§Ҳ мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ
 - лӢЁмҲҳ лӘ…мӮ¬лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©
 - e.g., /products/candy
- Controller
 - нҠ№м • лҸҷмһ‘мқ„ мӢӨн–үн•ҳлҠ” лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨ
 - CRUD(Create, Read, Update, Delete)(HTTP Verb) кё°лҠҘм—җ л§Өн•‘ н•  мҲҳ м—ҶлҠ” кІҪмҡ°м—җл§Ң кө¬нҳ„
 - н•ҳмң„ лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨлҘј к°Җм§Ҳ мҲҳ м—ҶмқҢ
 - лҸҷмӮ¬лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©
- Store
 - Collectionкіј мң мӮ¬н•ҳм§Җл§Ң нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠёк°Җ кҙҖлҰ¬
 - ліөмҲҳ лӘ…мӮ¬лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©

## URI query

## HTTP Verb

- https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Methods

- POST(Create): мғҲлЎңмҡҙ лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨ мғқм„ұ лҳҗлҠ” Controller мӢӨн–ү
 - RequestBody мЎҙмһ¬ к°ҖлҠҘ
 - л№„л©ұл“ұм„ұ
- GET(Read): лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨ мЎ°нҡҢ
- PATCH(Update): лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨ мқјл¶Җ м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠё
 - RequestBody мЎҙмһ¬ к°ҖлҠҘ
- PUT(Replace): лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨ м „мІҙ м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠё
 - RequestBody мЎҙмһ¬ к°ҖлҠҘ
 - л©ұл“ұм„ұ
- DELETE(Delete): лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨ мӮӯм ң

## HTTP status codes

- https://developer.mozilla.org/ko/docs/Web/HTTP/Status
- https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9110#name-status-codes

### 2xx Success

- 200 OK
- 201 Created: лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨ мғқм„ұ
- 202 Accepted: мҡ”мІӯмқҖ м„ұкіөн–Ҳм§Җл§Ң м§ҖкёҲ лӢ№мһҘ кІ°кіјлҘј м•Ңл ӨмӨ„ мҲҳ м—ҶмқҢ(Async)
- 204 No Content: ліёл¬ё м—ҶмқҢ, нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠёк°Җ лӢӨлҘё нҺҳмқҙм§ҖлЎң мқҙлҸҷн•  н•„мҡ” м—ҶмқҢ

### 4xx Client Error

мғҒнғң мҪ”л“ңлЎң н‘ңнҳ„н•ҳкё° м–ҙл Өмҡҙ кІҪмҡ°к°Җ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. к·ёлҹ° кІҪмҡ° 400, 401, 403 л“ұкіј н•Ёк»ҳ ліёл¬ём—җ м»ӨмҠӨн…Җ мҪ”л“ңмҷҖ л©”мӢңм§ҖлЎң лӢӨлҘё м—җлҹ¬лҘј н‘ңнҳ„н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

``json
{
 "status": 400,
 "errors": [
 {
 "code": 1,
 "message": "validation error"
 }
 ]
}
`

нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠёк°Җ лҜёл“ӨмӣЁм–ҙлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ нҠ№м • мғҒнғң мҪ”л“ңм—җ л”°лқј мқјкҙ„м Ғмқё м—җлҹ¬мІҳлҰ¬лҘј н•  мҲҳлҸ„ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

л”°лқјм„ң мқјл°ҳм Ғмқё м—җлҹ¬мҪ”л“ң мқҳлҜём—җм„ң мЎ°кёҲ лІ—м–ҙлӮҳлҚ”лқјлҸ„ мғҒнҷ©м—җ л”°лқј лЎңк·ёмқё кҙҖл ЁмқҖ 401, к¶Ңн•ң кҙҖл ЁмқҖ 403, к·ё мҷё м„ңлІ„м—җм„ң мқём§Җн•ң м—җлҹ¬лҠ” 400мңјлЎң нҶөмқјн•ҙм„ң мІҳлҰ¬н•  мҲҳлҸ„ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

- 400 Bad Request
 - мһҳлӘ»лҗң мҡ”мІӯ нҳ•мӢқ л“ұ м„ңлІ„к°Җ мІҳлҰ¬н•  мҲҳ м—ҶмқҢ
 - мҡ”мІӯмқҖ мҳ¬л°”лҘҙм§Җл§Ң, мң нҡЁм„ұ кІҖмӮ¬ мӢӨнҢЁ л“ұмқҳ мқҙмң лЎң мІҳлҰ¬н•  мҲҳ м—ҶмқҢ(422 Unprocessable Entity)
 - м„ңлІ„мқҳ нҳ„мһ¬ мғҒнғңмҷҖ м¶©лҸҢ(409 Conflict)
- 401 Unauthorized: мқёмҰқ(Authentication) мӢӨнҢЁ
 - лЎңк·ёмқё н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмқҖ кІҪмҡ°
 - м„ём…ҳ лҳҗлҠ” JWT нҶ нҒ° л§ҢлЈҢ
- 403 Forbidden: мқёк°Җ(Authorization) мӢӨнҢЁ
 - лЎңк·ёмқёмқҖ н–Ҳм§Җл§Ң к¶Ңн•ңмқҙ м—ҶлҠ” кІҪмҡ°
 - мқҪкё° к¶Ңн•ңмқҖ мһҲм§Җл§Ң м“°кё° к¶Ңн•ңмқҙ м—ҶлҠ” кІҪмҡ°
- 404 Not Found: лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨлҘј м°ҫмқ„ мҲҳ м—ҶмқҢ
 - лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨк°Җ мЎҙмһ¬н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ” кІҪмҡ°
 - мЎҙмһ¬лҠ” н•ҳм§Җл§Ң мқҪкё°, м“°кё° к¶Ңн•ңмқҙ м—ҶлҠ” кІҪмҡ°
- 429 Too Many Requests

- мқёмҰқ(Authentication): мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗ мӢ мӣҗ нҷ•мқё, AuthN
- мқёк°Җ(Authorization): лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨм—җ лҢҖн•ң м ‘к·ј к¶Ңн•ң нҡҚл“қ, AuthZ

### 5xx Server Error

м„ңлІ„к°Җ мҡ”мІӯмқ„ мІҳлҰ¬н•ҳм§Җ лӘ»н•ң кІҪмҡ°мқҙл©° н•ҙлӢ№ м—җлҹ¬лҠ” лӘЁл‘җ лЎңк·ёлЎң лӮЁкІЁм„ң нҠёлһҳнӮ№ н•  мҲҳ мһҲм–ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

## м—°кІ° л°©мӢқ

### P2P(Peer to Peer)

- м •ліҙ көҗнҷҳмқҙ н•„мҡ”н•ң нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠё мӮ¬мқҙм—җ л©”мү¬лҘј нҳ•м„ұн•©лӢҲлӢӨ
- м„ңлІ„лҠ” нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠё к°„ м—°кІ°мқ„ мң„н•ң м •ліҙлҘј м ңкіөн•ҳлҠ” м—ӯн• л§Ң н•©лӢҲлӢӨ
- нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠё к°„ м§Ғм ‘ м—°кІ°мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ мҶҚлҸ„к°Җ л№ лҰ…лӢҲлӢӨ
- лҚ°мқҙн„° м „мҶЎ мӢң м—°кІ°лҗң лӘЁл“  нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠёлЎң м „мҶЎн•ҳкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠё мҲҳк°Җ л§Һмқ„ мҲҳлЎқ л¶Җн•ҳк°Җ мӢ¬н•ҙм§‘лӢҲлӢӨ

### SFU(Selective Forwarding Unit)

- лҜёл””м–ҙ нҠёлһҳн”Ҫмқ„ мӨ‘кі„н•ҳлҠ” лҜёл””м–ҙ м„ңлІ„лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ
- нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠёлҠ” лҚ°мқҙн„° м „мҶЎмқ„ лҜёл””м–ҙ м„ңлІ„лЎңл§Ң н•ҳлҜҖлЎң(1 м—…мҠӨнҠёлҰј) P2P лҢҖл№„ нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠё л¶Җн•ҳк°Җ м ҒмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ
- лҜёл””м–ҙ м„ңлІ„лЎң мқён•ҙ м„ңлІ„ л¶Җн•ҳк°Җ P2P лҢҖл№„ нҒҪлӢҲлӢӨ
- P2P лҢҖл№„ N:M м—°кІ° мҲҳлҘј лҠҳлҰҙ мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ

### MCU(Multipoint Control Unit)

- лҜёл””м–ҙ м„ңлІ„м—җм„ң м—¬лҹ¬ нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠёмқҳ лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј лӢЁмқј мҠӨнҠёлҰјмңјлЎң л§Ңл“Өм–ҙм„ң к°Ғ нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠёлЎң м „мҶЎн•ҳлҜҖлЎң(1 лӢӨмҡҙмҠӨнҠёлҰј) SFU лҢҖл№„ нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠё л¶Җн•ҳк°Җ м ҒмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ
- лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј лӢЁмқј мҠӨнҠёлҰјмңјлЎң л§Ңл“ңлҠ” мһ‘м—…мңјлЎң мқён•ҙ м„ңлІ„ л¶Җн•ҳк°Җ SFU лҢҖл№„ нҒҪлӢҲлӢӨ
- SFU лҢҖл№„ N:M м—°кІ° мҲҳлҘј лҠҳлҰҙ мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ

## Opening Handshake

`http

Host: api.loliot.net
Upgrade: websocket

`

- Sec-WebSocket-Key: base64лЎң мқёмҪ”л”©лҗң 16л°”мқҙнҠёмқҳ лһңлҚӨ к°’мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ

- Origin: CORSлҘј мң„н•ң н—ӨлҚ”мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ

`http

Connection: Upgrade

`

- Sec-WebSocket-Accept: Sec-WebSocket-Keyк°’м—җ 258EAFA5-E914-47DA-95CA-C5AB0DC85B11лҘј л¶ҷм—¬ SHA-1 н•ҙмӢңлҘј м·Ён•ң нӣ„ base64лЎң мқёмҪ”л”©н•ң к°’мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ
- Sec-WebSocket-Protocol: м„ңлІ„к°Җ м„ нғқн•ң н”„лЎңнҶ мҪңмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ

| |Masking-key, if MASK set to 1 |
+-------------------------------+-------------------------------+
| Masking-key (continued) | Payload Data |
+-------------------------------- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - +
: Payload Data continued ... :
+ - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - +
| Payload Data continued ... |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+
`

- FIN
 - 0x0: Frameмқҙ лҚ” мһҲмқҢ
 - 0x1: л§Ҳм§Җл§ү Frame
- opcode
 - 0x1: н…ҚмҠӨнҠё
 - 0x2: л°”мқҙл„ҲлҰ¬
 - 0x8: м—°кІ° мў…лЈҢ
- MASK
 - 0x0: Frameмқҙ л§ҲмҠӨнӮ№лҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмқҢ
 - 0x1`: Frameмқҙ л§ҲмҠӨнӮ№лҗЁ

Clientм—җм„ң ServerлЎң ліҙлӮҙлҠ” лҚ°мқҙн„°лҠ” л°ҳл“ңмӢң л§ҲмҠӨнӮ№лҗҳм–ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ

## Package

`

- --dev: к°ңл°ңмҡ© нҢЁнӮӨм§Җмқё кІҪмҡ° мқҙ мҳөм…ҳмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- : -e +:////@#
 - -e: кІҪлЎңлҘј мҲҳм •н•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨлҠ” мқҳлҜёмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - : git, bzr, svn or hg
 - : http, https, ssh or file

Pipfile.lock нҢҢмқјмқ„ мғқм„ұн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`

- --all: нҢЁнӮӨм§ҖлӘ… лҢҖмӢ  н•ҙлӢ№ мҳөм…ҳмқ„ м“°л©ҙ лӘЁл“  нҢЁнӮӨм§ҖлҘј м ңкұ°н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

Pipfileмқҙ мһҲлҠ” кІҪлЎңм—җм„ң м•„лһҳ лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј мӢӨн–үн•ҳл©ҙ Pipfileм—җ м •мқҳлҗң нҢЁнӮӨм§Җк°Җ м„Өм№ҳлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

Pipfile.lockмқҙ мһҲлҠ” кІҪлЎңм—җм„ң м•„лһҳ лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј мӢӨн–үн•ҳл©ҙ Pipfile.lockм—җ м •мқҳлҗң нҢЁнӮӨм§Җк°Җ м„Өм№ҳлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

## мҙҲкё°нҷ”

vcpkgлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” CMake л№Ңл“ң мӢңмҠӨн…ң мғқм„ұ мӢң мң„мҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ мҳөм…ҳмқҳ лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҙм•јн•©лӢҲлӢӨ. мқҙлҘј presetмңјлЎң м ҖмһҘн•ҳл©ҙ м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ л°©мӢқмңјлЎң мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

`json title="CMakePresets.json"
{
 "version": 2,
 "configurePresets": [
 {
 "name": "default",
 "generator": "Ninja",
 "binaryDir": "${sourceDir}/build",
 "cacheVariables": {
 "CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE": "$env{VCPKG_ROOT}/scripts/buildsystems/vcpkg.cmake"
 }
 }
 ]
}
`

`shell
cmake --preset=default
`

## нҢЁнӮӨм§Җ кҙҖлҰ¬

`

https://vcpkg.io/ м—җм„ң кІҖмғүмқҙ к°ҖлҠҘн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

### лІ„м „ кҙҖлҰ¬

- vcpkg лІ„м „

`json title="vcpkg.json"

 "dependencies": [{ "name": "", "version>=": "" }]
}
`

`json title="vcpkg.json"

}

- version>=мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©ҙ лӢӨмҡҙлЎңл“ң к°ҖлҠҘн•ң мөңмҶҢ лІ„м „мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- overrides`лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©ҙ м„Өм •лҗң лІ„м „л§Ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

title: viperлЎң м„Өм • кҙҖлҰ¬н•ҳкё°
description: viperлЎң м„Өм •нҢҢмқј, нҷҳкІҪліҖмҲҳ, flag л“ұмқ„ кҙҖлҰ¬н•ҳлҠ” л°©лІ•
text:
## м„Өм№ҳ

``shell
go get -u github.com/spf13/viper
`

## viper м„Өм • мҡ°м„ мҲңмң„

1. SetмңјлЎң м„Өм •н•ң к°’
1. flag
1. нҷҳкІҪ ліҖмҲҳ
1. м„Өм •нҢҢмқј
1. нӮӨ/к°’ м ҖмһҘмҶҢ
1. кё°ліёк°’

- м„Өм • keyлҠ” лҢҖмҶҢл¬ёмһҗлҘј кө¬л¶„н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
- м„Өм •мқ„ м „лӢ¬н•ҳлҠ” л°©мӢқл§ҲлӢӨ м„Өм •к°’мқ„ л”°лЎң м ҖмһҘн•ҳкі  мһҲлӢӨк°Җ к°’мқ„ к°Җм ёмҳӨлҠ” мҲңк°„ мҡ°м„ мҲңмң„лҘј нҸүк°Җн•ҳм—¬ к°’мқ„ к°Җм ёмҳөлӢҲлӢӨ.
- viper.Debug(): viper м„Өм •мқ„ м¶ңл Ҙн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- viper.AllSettings(): мөңмў… м„Өм •к°’мқ„ лҰ¬н„ҙн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

## м„Өм •нҢҢмқј

`go
viper.SetConfigName("config") // нҷ•мһҘмһҗлҘј м ңмҷён•ң нҢҢмқјлӘ…мқ„ м ҒмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
// нҷ•мһҘмһҗк°Җ м—ҶлӢӨл©ҙ лӘ…мӢңм ҒмңјлЎң м„Өм •н•ҙмӨҳм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
// "json", "toml", "yaml", "yml", "properties", "props", "prop", "env", "dotenv"
viper.SetConfigType("yaml")
viper.AddConfigPath(".") // м„Өм •нҢҢмқјмқ„ м°ҫмқ„ кІҪлЎңлҘј м¶”к°Җн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

// viper.SetConfigFile("./config.yaml")

if err := viper.ReadInConfig(); err != nil {
 if errors.As(err, &viper.ConfigFileNotFoundError{}) {
 fmt.Println("failed to find .env file")
 } else {
 panic(fmt.Errorf("fatal error config file: %w", err))
 }
}
`

## нҷҳкІҪ ліҖмҲҳ

нҷҳкІҪ ліҖмҲҳлҠ” BindEnvнҳём¶ң мӢңм җмқҙ м•„лӢҲлқј к°’м—җ м ‘к·јн•ҳлҠ” мӢңм җм—җ нҸүк°Җлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`go
viper.SetEnvPrefix("a")
viper.BindEnv("c") // viper.BindEnv("c", "A_C")
viper.BindEnv("d") // viper.BindEnv("d", "A_D")

viper.SetEnvPrefix("b")
viper.BindEnv("c") // viper.BindEnv("c", "B_C")
viper.BindEnv("f") // viper.BindEnv("f", "B_F")

// viper.BindEnv("c", "A_C", "B_C")
`

`go
// нҷҳкІҪліҖмҲҳлҘј мқҪмқ„ л•Ң keyмқҳ . лҳҗлҠ” -мқ„ _лЎң ліҖнҷҳн•ҳм—¬ мқҪм–ҙмҳөлӢҲлӢӨ.
// viper.Get("a.b") лҘј нҳём¶ңн•ҳл©ҙ A_B нҷҳкІҪліҖмҲҳлҘј мқҪм–ҙмҳөлӢҲлӢӨ.
viper.SetEnvKeyReplacer(strings.NewReplacer(".", "_", "-", "_"))
`

`go
viper.AutomaticEnv() // нҷҳкІҪліҖмҲҳлҘј мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң мқҪм–ҙмҳөлӢҲлӢӨ.
`

- cмқҳ кІҪмҡ° A_CмҷҖ B_Cк°Җ лӘЁл‘җ м„Өм •лҗҳм–ҙ мһҲмқ„ кІҪмҡ°, A_Cк°Җ мҡ°м„ мҲңмң„к°Җ лҶ’мҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
- AutomaticEnvк°Җ м„Өм •лҗҳм–ҙ мһҲмқ„ кІҪмҡ° BindEnvліҙлӢӨ мҡ°м„ мҲңмң„к°Җ лҶ’мҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - SetEnvPrefixлҠ” л§Ҳм§Җл§ү м„Өм •к°’л§Ң мң нҡЁн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`go
// нҷҳкІҪ ліҖмҲҳк°Җ л№Ҳ к°’мңјлЎң м„Өм •лҗҳм–ҙ мһҲмқ„ л•Ң, нҷҳкІҪ ліҖмҲҳлҘј м„Өм •н•ң кІғмңјлЎң к°„мЈјн• м§Җ
// м—¬л¶ҖлҘј кІ°м •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
viper.AllowEmptyEnv(true)
`

## flag

flagлҠ” BindPFlagнҳём¶ң мӢңм җмқҙ м•„лӢҲлқј к°’м—җ м ‘к·јн•ҳлҠ” мӢңм җм—җ нҸүк°Җлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`go
pflag.String("log_level", "info", "log level")

pflag.Parse()
viper.BindPFlags(pflag.CommandLine)
`

`go
flag.String("log_level", "info", "log level")

pflag.CommandLine.AddGoFlagSet(flag.CommandLine)
pflag.Parse()
viper.BindPFlags(pflag.CommandLine)
``

title: Argo CD
text:
## м„Өм№ҳ

``shell
helm repo add argo https://argoproj.github.io/argo-helm
`

`shell
helm repo update argo \
&& helm search repo argo/argo-cd -l | head -n 10
`

`shell
helm pull argo/argo-cd --version 7.9.1
`

`shell
helm show values argo/argo-cd --version 7.9.1 > argo-cd-7.9.1.yaml
`

`yaml title="argo-cd-values.yaml"
fullnameOverride: "argo-cd"

global:
 additionalLabels: {}
 podLabels: {}

configs:
 cm:
 # argocd-cm ConfigMapмқҳ .data к°’мңјлЎң м„Өм •лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

 server.rbac.log.enforce.enable: true
 # Web UIм—җм„ң н„°лҜёл„җ м ‘мҶҚ
 exec.enabled: true
 # admin мӮ¬мҡ©мӢң м•”нҳёлҠ” argocd-initial-admin-secret Secretм—җ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 admin.enabled: false

 statusbadge.enabled: false

dex:
 enabled: false

server:
 extraArgs:
 - --insecure # https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/issues/2953

notifications:
 enabled: false
`

`shell
kubectl create namespace argo-cd
`

`shell
helm template argo-cd argo/argo-cd \
 --version 7.9.1 \
 -n argo-cd \
 -f argo-cd-values.yaml \
argo-cd.yaml
`

`shell
helm upgrade -i argo-cd argo/argo-cd \
 --history-max 5 \
 --version 7.9.1 \
 -n argo-cd \
 -f argo-cd-values.yaml
``

title: Argo Workflows
text:
## м„Өм№ҳ

``shell
wget https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/releases/latest/download/argo-linux-amd64.gz \
&& gzip -d argo-linux-amd64.gz \
&& sudo mv argo-linux-amd64 /usr/local/bin/argo \
&& sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/argo
`

`shell
helm repo add argo https://argoproj.github.io/argo-helm
`

`shell
helm repo update argo \
&& helm search repo argo/argo-workflows -l | head -n 10
`

`shell
helm show values argo/argo-workflows \
 --version 0.39.0 \
argo-workflows-values.yaml
`

`yaml title="argo-workflows-values.yaml"
commonLabels: {}

controller:
 resources:
 requests:
 cpu: 100m
 memory: 256Mi
 limits:
 memory: 256Mi

 retentionPolicy:
 completed: 10
 failed: 100
 errored: 100

server:
 authModes:
 - client # kubernetes нҶ нҒ°мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ң мқёмҰқ

 resources:
 requests:
 cpu: 100m
 memory: 256Mi
 limits:
 memory: 256Mi
`

`shell
helm template argo-workflows argo/argo-workflows \
 --version 0.39.0 \
 -n workflow \
 -f argo-cd-values.yaml \
argo-cd.yaml
`

`shell
helm upgrade -i argo-workflows argo/argo-workflows \
 --history-max 5 \
 --version 0.39.0 \
 -n workflow \
 --values argo-workflows-values.yaml
`

## RBAC

- https://argoproj.github.io/argo-workflows/argo-server-sso/

`yaml title="argo-workflows-values.yaml"
server:
 # ConfigMap.data.config: |, name: workflow-controller-configmap
 sso:
 # openidлҠ” кё°ліёмңјлЎң м¶”к°Җлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 scopes:
 - groups
 - email
 - profile
 rbac:
 enabled: true
`

`yaml

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
 name: argo-workflows-guest
 namespace: workflow
 annotations:
 workflows.argoproj.io/rbac-rule: "true"
 # мқҙ м„Өм •мқҙ guest м„Өм •мқҙ лҗ  мҲҳ мһҲлҸ„лЎқ лӢӨлҘё ServiceAccountлҠ” precedenceлҘј 1
 # мқҙмғҒмңјлЎң м„Өм •н•ҙмЈјм„ёмҡ”
 workflows.argoproj.io/rbac-rule-precedence: "0"

apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
 name: argo-workflows-guest.service-account-token
 namespace: workflow
 annotations:
 kubernetes.io/service-account.name: argo-workflows-guest
type: kubernetes.io/service-account-token
`

`yaml

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
 name: argo-workflows-admin
 namespace: workflow
 annotations:
 # * groups - an array of the OIDC groups
 # * iss - the issuer ("argo-server")
 # * sub - the subject (typically the username)
 # https://github.com/antonmedv/expr/blob/master/docs/Language-Definition.md
 workflows.argoproj.io/rbac-rule: "'' in groups"
 # к°’мқҙ нҒҙ мҲҳлЎқ мҡ°м„ мҲңмң„к°Җ лҶ’м•„м§җ
 workflows.argoproj.io/rbac-rule-precedence: "1"

apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
 name: argo-workflows-admin.service-account-token
 namespace: workflow
 annotations:
 kubernetes.io/service-account.name: argo-workflows-admin
type: kubernetes.io/service-account-token
`

ServiceAccountм—җ мӣҗн•ҳлҠ” лӘ©м Ғм—җ л§һлҠ” Roleкіј ClusterRoleмқ„ мғқм„ұ нӣ„ л°”мқёл”© мӢңмјңмЈјм„ёмҡ”.

## User

### SSO-Dex with Argo CD

`shell
cat /oauth2/callback
 secretEnv: ARGO_WORKFLOWS_SSO_CLIENT_SECRET
`

DexлҠ” нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠё(aud(audience))лҢҖмӢ  лӢӨлҘё нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠё(azp(authorized party))м—җкІҢ ID нҶ нҒ° л°ңн–үмқ„ л§һкёё мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” кё°лҠҘмқҙ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. staticClients.trustedPeers: []м—җ azpк°Җ лҗ  нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠёмқҳ idлҘј м¶”к°Җн•ҳл©ҙ лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`yaml title="argo-workflows-values.yaml"
server:
 extraArgs:
 - --access-control-allow-origin=true

 authModes:
 - sso

 # ConfigMap.data.sso |, name: workflow-controller-configmap
 sso:
 enabled: true
 issuer: /api/dex
 sessionExpiry: 12h
 clientId:
 name: argo-workflows-sso
 key: client-id
 clientSecret:
 name: argo-workflows-sso
 key: client-secret
 redirectUrl: /oauth2/callback
`

 sessionExpiry: 12h
 clientId:
 name: argo-workflows-sso

title: Kubernetes Audit м •мұ… м„Өм •н•ҳкё°
text:
## Audit(к°җмӮ¬)

Audit кё°лЎқмқҖ лҲ„к°Җ л¬ҙм—Үмқ„ м–ём ң м–ҙл””м„ң мҡ”мІӯн–ҲлҠ”м§Җ, к·ёлҰ¬кі  к·ё мҡ”мІӯмқҙ м–ҙл–»кІҢ мІҳлҰ¬лҗҳм—ҲлҠ”м§ҖлҘј м•Ң мҲҳ мһҲлҸ„лЎқ мӢңк°„мҲңмңјлЎң м •лҰ¬н•ң кІғмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

**kube-apiserver**лҠ” Audit м •мұ… м„Өм •м—җ л”°лқј Audit мқҙлІӨнҠёлҘј м „мІҳлҰ¬н•ң нӣ„ м„Өм •лҗң л°ұм—”л“ңм—җ м ҖмһҘн•©лӢҲлӢӨ. нҳ„мһ¬лҠ” **log**мҷҖ **webhook** л°ұм—”л“ңл§Ң м§Җмӣҗн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

## Audit м •мұ…

- Kubernetes / Docs / Auditing

``yaml
apiVersion: audit.k8s.io/v1
kind: Policy
# omitStages: []
# omitManagedFields: false
rules:
 - level:
 users: []
 userGroups: []
 omitStages: []
 resources:
 - group:
 resources: []
 resourceNames: []
 verbs: []
 namespaces: []
 nonResourceURLs: []
`

- omitStages: []
 - мғқлһөн•ҳкұ°лӮҳ []лЎң м„Өм •н•ҳл©ҙ м Ғмҡ©лҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - RequestReceived: requestлҠ” л°ӣм•ҳм§Җл§Ң мІҳлҰ¬н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмқҖ мғҒнғңмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - ResponseStarted: response headerлҠ” ліҙлғҲм§Җл§Ң bodyмқҖ ліҙлӮҙм§Җ м•ҠмқҖ мғҒнғңлЎң watch к°ҷмқҖ long-running taskм—җл§Ң мӮ¬мҡ©лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - ResponseComplete: response bodyмқ„ лӘЁл‘җ ліҙлӮё мғҒнғңмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - Panic
- omitManagedFields: false
 - trueлЎң м„Өм •н•ҳл©ҙ managedFieldsлҘј кё°лЎқн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - falseлЎң м„Өм •н•ҳл©ҙ managedFieldsлҘј кё°лЎқн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- rules: []
 - м„ м–ё мҲңм„ңм—җ л§һм¶° Audit мқҙлІӨнҠёлҘј л§Өм№ӯмӢңмјңліҙкі  мІ« лІҲм§ёлЎң л§Өм№ӯлҗҳлҠ” к·ңм№ҷм—җ л”°лқј Audit мқҙлІӨнҠёлҘј мІҳлҰ¬н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - level:
 - None: л§Өм№ӯлҗҳлҠ” мқҙлІӨнҠёлҘј кё°лЎқн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - Metadata: user, timestamp, resource, verb л“ұл§Ң кё°лЎқн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - Request: request metadataмҷҖ bodyл§Ң кё°лЎқн•©лӢҲлӢӨ. non-resource requestлҠ” кё°лЎқн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - RequestResponse: request metadataмҷҖ body, response bodyлҘј кё°лЎқн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - users: []
 - мғқлһөн•ҳкұ°лӮҳ []лЎң м„Өм •н•ҳл©ҙ лӘЁл“  userм—җ лҢҖн•ҙ л§Өм№ӯлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - userGroups: []
 - мғқлһөн•ҳкұ°лӮҳ []лЎң м„Өм •н•ҳл©ҙ лӘЁл“  userGroupм—җ лҢҖн•ҙ л§Өм№ӯлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - verb: []
 - мғқлһөн•ҳкұ°лӮҳ []лЎң м„Өм •н•ҳл©ҙ лӘЁл“  verbм—җ лҢҖн•ҙ л§Өм№ӯлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - resources: []
 - м„ м–ён•ҳм–ём§Җ м•Ҡкұ°лӮҳ []лЎң м„Өм •н•ҳл©ҙ лӘЁл“  resourceм—җ лҢҖн•ҙ л§Өм№ӯлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - group:
 - мғқлһөн•ҳкұ°лӮҳ ""лЎң м„Өм •н•ҳл©ҙ core API groupмқ„ мқҳлҜён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - resources: []
 - мғқлһө, [], ["*"]лЎң м„Өм •н•ҳл©ҙ лӘЁл“  resourceмҷҖ subresources лҢҖн•ҙ л§Өм№ӯлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - podsмқҖ pods resourceл§Ң мқҳлҜён•ҳл©° subresourceлҘј нҸ¬н•Ён•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - pods/*мқҖ podsмқҳ лӘЁл“  subresourceлҘј мқҳлҜён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - */scaleмқҖ лӘЁл“  resourceмқҳ scale subresourceлҘј мқҳлҜён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - resourceNames: []
 - мғқлһөн•ҳкұ°лӮҳ []лЎң м„Өм •н•ҳл©ҙ лӘЁл“  resourceNameм—җ лҢҖн•ҙ л§Өм№ӯлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - namespaces: []
 - мғқлһөн•ҳкұ°лӮҳ []лЎң м„Өм •н•ҳл©ҙ лӘЁл“  namespaceм—җ лҢҖн•ҙ л§Өм№ӯлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - ""мқҖ non-namespaced resourceлҘј мқҳлҜён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - nonResourceURLs: []
 - *мқ„ м“ё мҲҳ мһҲм§Җл§Ң л§Ҳм§Җл§үм—җл§Ң мҚЁм•јн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - e.g., /healthz*
 - omitStages: []
 - мғқлһөн•ҳкұ°лӮҳ []лЎң м„Өм •н•ҳл©ҙ м Ғмҡ©лҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - .omitStagesмҷҖмқҳ н•©м§‘н•©мңјлЎң м Ғмҡ©лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - omitManagedFields: false
 - trueлЎң м„Өм •н•ҳл©ҙ managedFieldsлҘј кё°лЎқн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - falseлЎң м„Өм •н•ҳл©ҙ managedFieldsлҘј кё°лЎқн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - мғқлһөн•ҳл©ҙ .omitManagedFields м„Өм •мқ„ л”°лҰ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

## log л°ұм—”л“ң м„Өм •

`yaml title="/etc/kubernetes/kubeadm-config.yaml"
apiVersion: kubeadm.k8s.io/v1beta4
kind: ClusterConfiguration
apiServer:
 extraArgs:
 - name: audit-policy-file
 value: /etc/kubernetes/audit-policy/apiserver-audit-policy.yaml
 - name: audit-log-path
 value: /var/log/audit/kube-apiserver-audit.log
 - name: audit-log-maxage
 value: "30"
 - name: audit-log-maxbackup
 value: "10"
 - name: audit-log-maxsize
 value: "100"
 extraVolumes:
 - name: audit-policy
 hostPath: /etc/kubernetes/audit-policy
 mountPath: /etc/kubernetes/audit-policy
 - name: audit-logs
 hostPath: /var/log/kubernetes/audit/
 mountPath: /var/log/audit/
`

- --audit-log-maxage=
- --audit-log-maxbackup=
- --audit-log-maxsize=`

ліҖкІҪ нӣ„ KubeadmмңјлЎң Control Plane кҙҖлҰ¬н•ҳкё°лҘј м°ёкі н•ҳм—¬ kube-apiserverлҘј мһ¬мӢңмһ‘н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

title: Deployment
text:
## Deployment

- https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/deployment/

 Deployment and RollingUpdate

ReplicaSetмқҖ м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ specмқ„ к°Җм§Җкі  мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

- Pod м§‘н•©мқ„ мӢқлі„н•ҳкё° мң„н•ң .spec.selector
- мң м§Җн•ҳкі  мӢ¶мқҖ Pod мҲҳлҘј м§Җм •н•ҳлҠ” .spec.replicas
- мғҲлЎң мғқм„ұлҗ  Pod м •ліҙмқё .spec.template

DeploymentлҠ” ReplicaSetмқ„ мғқм„ұн•ҳкі  м»ЁнҠёлЎӨн•ҳлҠ” лҚ° мӮ¬мҡ©лҗҳлҠ” лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. Deploymentм—җ мқҳн•ҙ мғқм„ұлҗң ReplicaSetмқҖ мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗк°Җ м§Ғм ‘ кҙҖлҰ¬н•ҳл©ҙ м•Ҳлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

``yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
 name: my-deployment
spec:
 replicas: 3 # мң м§Җн•ҳкі  мӢ¶мқҖ Pod мҲҳ
 minReadySeconds: 10 # readinessProbe м„ұкіө нӣ„ мөңмҶҢ мӨҖл№„ мӢңк°„, мқҳлҸ„м ҒмңјлЎң м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠё мҶҚлҸ„лҘј лҠҰм¶ң мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ
 strategy:
 type: RollingUpdate # RollingUpdate(default)|Recreate
 rollingUpdate:
 # replicas - maxUnavailable /][:tag]
 name: my-app
 ports:
 - name: http # Pod лӮҙм—җм„ң нҠ№лі„н•ҙм•јн•ҳл©°, serviceм—җ мқҳн•ҙ м°ёмЎ°лҗ  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ
 containerPort: 8080
 protocol: TCP # TCP(default)|UDP|SCTP
`

### label

- Label

.metadata.annotationмқҖ labelмІҳлҹј selector к°ҷмқҖ кІғмқҖ м—Ҷм§Җл§Ң мғҒлҢҖм ҒмңјлЎң кёҙ к°’мқ„ м„Өм •н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. мғҲлЎңмҡҙ кё°лҠҘмқ„ м¶”к°Җн•ҳкё° м „, specм—җ м¶”к°Җн•  к°’мқ„ мҡ°м„  annotationм—җ м¶”к°Җн•ҙм„ң н…ҢмҠӨнҠё н•ҙліҙлҠ” кІҪмҡ°к°Җ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

### namespace

.metadata.namespaceлҠ” нҒҙлҹ¬мҠӨн„° лӮҙм—җм„ң лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨ к·ёлЈ№мқ„ кІ©лҰ¬н•ҳлҠ” кё°лҠҘмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗк°Җ м ҒмқҖ кІҪмҡ° labelл§ҢмңјлЎң м¶©л¶„ н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

kubectl config set-context --current --namespace лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј нҶөн•ҙ нҳ„мһ¬ м»Ён…ҚмҠӨнҠёмқҳ кё°ліё namespaceлҘј ліҖкІҪн•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

## rollout

`shell
kubectl rollout
`

-

title: Kubernetes HorizontalPodAutoscaler к°Җмқҙл“ң
text:
- Kubernetes Docs / Tasks / Run Applications / Horizontal Pod Autoscaling

## Control Plane м„Өм •

- Kubernetes Docs / Reference / kube-controller-manager

- kube-controller-manager
 - --horizontal-pod-autoscaler-sync-period 15s
 - metricмқ„ м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠён•ҳлҠ” мЈјкё°мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - --horizontal-pod-autoscaler-cpu-initialization-period 5m
 - --horizontal-pod-autoscaler-initial-readiness-delay 30s
 - --horizontal-pod-autoscaler-downscale-stabilization 5m
 - --horizontal-pod-autoscaler-tolerance 0.1

## HorizontalPodAutoscaler

### Specification

``yaml
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
spec:
 scaleTargetRef:
 name:
 maxReplicas: 10
 metrics: []
`

- scaleTargetRef
 - к°ҷмқҖ Namespaceм—җ мЎҙмһ¬н•ҳлҠ” лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨм—¬м•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - apiVersion:
 - kind:
 - name:
- minReplicas: 1
- maxReplicas:
- metrics: []
 - type: Resource|ContainerResource|External|Object|Pods
 - resource
 - name: cpu|memory
 - target
 - type: Utilization|Value|AverageValue
 - containerResource
 - container:
 - name: cpu|memory
 - target
 - type: Utilization|Value|AverageValue
 - external
 - object
 - pods
- behavior
 - kubernetes/enhancements GitHub / Configurable scale up/down velocity for HPA
 - scaleUp|scaleDown
 - Default Behavior
 - stabilizationWindowSeconds:
 - мЈјм–ҙм§„ мӢңк°„ лҸҷм•Ҳ м ңм•Ҳлҗң desiredReplicas мӨ‘ к°ҖмһҘ нҒ°(down)/мһ‘мқҖ(up) к°’мқ„ м Ғмҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - 0 ~ 3600 м„Өм • к°ҖлҠҘн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - tolerance:
 - кё°ліёк°’мқҖ 0.1 мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - selectPolicy: Max
 - Max: м •мұ… мӨ‘ к°ҖмһҘ лҶ’мқҖ мҲҳм№ҳлҘј м Ғмҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - Min: м •мұ… мӨ‘ к°ҖмһҘ лӮ®мқҖ мҲҳм№ҳлҘј м Ғмҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - Disabled: м •мұ…мқ„ м Ғмҡ©н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - policies: []
 - type: Percent|Pods
 - Percent: мөңлҢҖ currentReplicas * value / 100л§ҢнҒј scale up/down н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - Pods: мөңлҢҖ valueл§ҢнҒј scale up/down н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - value:
 - periodSeconds:
 - м •мұ…мқҙ м„ нғқлҗҳкі  лӢӨмқҢ м •мұ…мқҙ м„ нғқлҗҳкё°к№Ңм§Җмқҳ мӢңк°„мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - 1 ~ 1800 м„Өм • к°ҖлҠҘн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

### External metric

- Kubernetes / Tasks / Extend Kubernetes / Configure the Aggregation Layer
- KEDA CRD к°Җмқҙл“ң

`yaml
spec:
 metrics:
 - type: External

HPAлҠ” External мӮ¬мҡ© мӢң GET /apis/external.metrics.k8s.io/v1beta1/namespaces//?labelSelector=лҘј нҳём¶ңн•ҳм—¬ ExternalMetricValueList лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨлҘј JSON нҳ•нғңлЎң л°ӣкёё кё°лҢҖн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

л”°лқјм„ң external metrics exporterлҠ” м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ APIServiceлҘј нҶөн•ҙ л“ұлЎқлҗҳм–ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`yaml
apiVersion: apiregistration.k8s.io/v1

### Algorithm

- kubernetes/kubernetes GitHub / pkg/controller/podautoscaler/horizontal.go

`go
desiredReplicas := currentReplicas
ratio := currentMetricValue / desiredMetricValue

if math.Abs(ratio-1) > tolerance {
 desiredReplicas = int32(math.Ceil(float64(currentReplicas) * ratio))
}
`

desiredReplicasмҷҖ recommendationsм—җм„ң upStabilizationWindowSecondsмҷҖ downStabilizationWindowSecondsлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ upRecommendationкіј downRecommendationмқ„ кө¬н•ҳкі , desiredReplicasлҘј recommendationsм—җ м¶”к°Җн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`go
desiredReplicas = currentReplicas
if desiredReplicas downRecommendation {
 desiredReplicas = downRecommendation
}
`

м •мұ…мқ„ м Ғмҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`go
if desiredReplicas > currentReplicas {
 desiredReplicas = upPolicy(desiredReplicas)
} else if desiredReplicas < currentReplicas {
 desiredReplicas = downPolicy(desiredReplicas)
}
`

 - type: Percent

``

### лӘЁлҚё м„ңлІ„ м„Өм • (server)

- type: vllm|sglang|tgi
 - лҢҖмғҒ м„ңлІ„ н”„л Ҳмһ„мӣҢнҒ¬лҘј м§Җм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

- base_url:
 - лӘЁлҚё м„ңлІ„мқҳ HTTP м—”л“ңнҸ¬мқёнҠё URLмқ„ м§Җм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- ignore_eos:

### API м„Өм • (api)

 - /v1/completions лҳҗлҠ” /v1/chat/completions мӨ‘ нҳём¶ңн•  м—”л“ңнҸ¬мқёнҠё нҳ•нғңлҘј м§Җм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

 - TTFT/ITL/TPOT л“ұ мёЎм • мӢң trueлЎң м„Өм •н•ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

 - мҡ”мІӯл§ҲлӢӨ м¶”к°Җн•  м»ӨмҠӨн…Җ HTTP н—ӨлҚ”лҘј м„Өм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

### лҚ°мқҙн„° м„Өм • (data)

- type: mock|shareGPT|synthetic|random|shared_prefix|cnn_dailymail|billsum_conversations|infinity_instruct
 - лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬м—җ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  лҚ°мқҙн„° мғқм„ұ л°©мӢқмқ„ м§Җм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - shareGPT
 - completionмқё кІҪмҡ° лҢҖнҷ”мқҳ мІ«лІҲм§ёлҘј promptлЎң л‘җлІҲм§ёлҘј max_tokens кі„мӮ°м—җ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ мҡ”мІӯмқ„ л§Ңл“ӯлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - chatмқё кІҪмҡ° лҢҖнҷ”лҘј к·ёлҢҖлЎң мҡ”мІӯмңјлЎң л§Ңл“ӯлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - data.pathм—җ лҢҖнҷ” нҢҢмқјмқ„ м§Җм •н•ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - synthetic: 22706мһҗ кёёмқҙмқҳ л¬ёмһҘмқ„ нҶ нҒ°нҷ”н•ң нӣ„ input_distributionм—җ л”°лқј мһҳлқјм„ң м“°лҠ” л°©мӢқмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - random: input_distributionм—җ л”°лқј лһңлҚӨ нҶ нҒ° лҰ¬мҠӨнҠёлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҳлҠ” л°©мӢқмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - shared_prefix: лһңлҚӨ нҶ нҒ°мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҗҳ, мӢңмҠӨн…ң н”„лЎ¬н”„нҠёлҘј м—¬лҹ¬ н”„лЎ¬н”„нҠём—җм„ң кіөмң н•ҳлҠ” л°©мӢқмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
- path:
- input/output_distribution
 - synthetic/random мң нҳ•м—җм„ң input/output н”„лЎ¬н”„нҠё кёёмқҙ л¶„нҸ¬лҘј м§Җм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - min:

 - mean:
 - std_dev:
 - total_count:
- shared_prefix
 - shared_prefix нғҖмһ…мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  л•Ң н•„мҡ”н•ң м„ёл¶Җ м„Өм •мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - num_groups:
 - мӢңмҠӨн…ң н”„лЎ¬н”„нҠёлҘј кіөмң н•ҳлҠ” н”„лЎ¬н”„нҠё к·ёлЈ№ мҲҳлҘј м§Җм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

### л¶Җн•ҳ мғқм„ұ м„Өм • (load)

- type: constant|poisson
 - constant
 - np.random.default_rng().exponential(1 / rate, rate * duration)мңјлЎң мҡ”мІӯ к°„кІ©мқ„ мғқм„ұн•ҳкі , мҙқ н•©мқҙ durationмқҙ лҗҳлҸ„лЎқ м •к·ңнҷ”н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - к°Ғ к°„кІ©м—җ л…ёмқҙмҰҲк°Җ мЎ°кёҲ м¶”к°Җлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - poisson:
 - np.random.default_rng().poisson(rate)мңјлЎң 1 мҙҲлӢ№ мҡ”мІӯ мҲҳлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҳкі , н•ҙлӢ№ мҡ”мІӯл“Өмқҳ к°„кІ©мқ„ constant л°©лІ•мңјлЎң л§Ңл“ӯлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - к°Ғ мҙҲл§ҲлӢӨ лҸ…лҰҪм ҒмңјлЎң мҡ”мІӯлҹүмқҙ мғқм„ұлҗҳлҜҖлЎң мҡ”мІӯ к°„кІ©м—җ лҚ” нҒ° ліҖлҸҷмқҙ мғқк№ҒлӢҲлӢӨ.
- interval: : stageмҷҖ stage мӮ¬мқҙмқҳ лҢҖкё° мӢңк°„(мҙҲ)мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
- stages: []
 - rate * duration л§ҢнҒјмқҳ мҡ”мІӯмқ„ мғқм„ұн•ҳлҠ” лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬ лҰ¬мҠӨнҠёмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - rate: : к°Ғ л¶Җн•ҳ лӢЁкі„м—җм„ң мҡ”мІӯмқ„ мғқм„ұн•ҳлҠ” мҶҚлҸ„мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - duration: : к°Ғ л¶Җн•ҳ лӢЁкі„м—җм„ң мҡ”мІӯмқ„ мғқм„ұн•ҳлҠ” мӢңк°„(мҙҲ)мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
- sweep
 - м¶”лЎ  м„ңл№„мҠӨк°Җ мІҳлҰ¬н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” мөңлҢҖ л¶Җн•ҳ (нҸ¬нҷ”) лҘј мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң нғҗмғүн•ҳкі , к·ём—җ л§һм¶° stagesлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҳм—¬ лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬лҘј мҲҳн–үн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - type: linear|geometric
 - num_requests:
 - нҸ¬нҷ” нғҗмғүм—җ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҙқ мҡ”мІӯ мҲҳлЎң, rate: num_requests / 5, duration: 5 мқё stageлҘј м§„н–үн•ҳкІҢ лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - кё°ліёк°’мқҖ 2000мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - timeout:
 - нҸ¬нҷ” нғҗмғүм—җ н—Ҳмҡ©н•  мөңлҢҖ мӢңк°„(мҙҲ)мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - кё°ліёк°’мқҖ 60мҙҲмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - num_stages:
 - лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬лҘј мҲҳн–үн•  stage мҲҳмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - кё°ліёк°’мқҖ 5мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - stage_duration:
 - к°Ғ stageм—җ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  duration(мҙҲ)мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - кё°ліёк°’мқҖ 180мҙҲмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - saturation_percentile:
 - нҸ¬нҷ” нғҗмғү мӢң RPS кі„мӮ°м—җ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  л°ұл¶„мң„мҲҳмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - кё°ліёк°’мқҖ 95мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
- num_workers:
 - лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬ нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠём—җм„ң лі‘л ¬лЎң мҡ”мІӯмқ„ ліҙлӮҙлҠ” мӣҢм»Ө мҲҳлҘј м§Җм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - кё°ліёк°’мқҖ мӢңмҠӨн…ңмқҳ CPU мҪ”м–ҙ мҲҳмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
- worker_max_concurrency:
 - к°Ғ мӣҢм»Өк°Җ лҸҷмӢңм—җ мң м§Җн•  мҡ”мІӯ мҲҳ м ңн•ңмқ„ м§Җм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - кё°ліёк°’мқҖ 100мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
- worker_max_tcp_connections:
 - к°Ғ мӣҢм»Өк°Җ мғқм„ұн•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” мөңлҢҖ TCP м—°кІ° мҲҳлҘј м§Җм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - кё°ліёк°’мқҖ 2500мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
- circuit_breakers: []
- request_timeout: : к°Ғ мҡ”мІӯм—җ н—Ҳмҡ©н•  мөңлҢҖ мӢңк°„(мҙҲ)мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

`yaml
load:
 type: poisson
 interval: 5
 stages:
 # warm-up
 - rate: 10
 duration: 20

 # main test
 - rate: 50
 duration: 150
 - rate: 75
 duration: 100
 - rate: 100
 duration: 75
 num_workers: 4

`

title: Kubernetes Init/Sidecar Container мӮ¬мҡ© к°Җмқҙл“ң
text:
## Init Container

- Kubernetes / Concepts / Workloads / Pods / Init Containers

## Sidecar Container

- Kubernetes / Concepts / Workloads / Pods / Sidecar Containers

Sidecar containerлҠ” init containerмқҳ нҠ№мҲҳн•ң мјҖмқҙмҠӨлЎң Podмқҙ мӢңмһ‘лҗң нӣ„ кі„мҶҚ мӢӨн–үмӨ‘мңјлЎң мң м§ҖлҗҳлҠ” containerмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. v1.29м—җм„ң SidecarContainers feature gateлҘј нҶөн•ҙ кё°ліёмңјлЎң нҷңм„ұнҷ”лҗҳм–ҙ мһҲмңјл©°, v1.33л¶Җн„° stable кё°лҠҘмңјлЎң м ңкіөлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ pod.spec.initContainers.restartPolicyлҘј AlwaysлЎң м„Өм •н•ҳл©ҙ sidecar containerлЎң лҸҷмһ‘н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

``yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
spec:
 initContainers:
 - name: sidecar
 restartPolicy: Always
``

нҠ№м§•мқҖ лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

- main containerм—җ мҳҒн–Ҙмқ„ мЈјм§Җ м•Ҡмңјл©ҙм„ң мӢңмһ‘, м •м§Җ, мһ¬мӢңмһ‘, ліҖкІҪмқҙ к°ҖлҠҘн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- sidecar containerк°Җ мӢӨн–үмӨ‘мқҙлҗҳм–ҙм•ј лӢӨмқҢ init containerлҘј мӢңмһ‘н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- main containerк°Җ лӘЁл‘җ мў…лЈҢлҗҳм–ҙм•ј м„ м–ёлҗң мҲңм„ңмқҳ м—ӯмҲңмңјлЎң sidecar containerк°Җ мў…лЈҢлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

### plugin

- https://k9scli.io/topics/plugins/

`yaml title="~/.config/k9s/plugins.yaml"
plugins:
 log2jq:
 shortCut: Shift-L
 confirm: false
 background: false
 description: "Log to jq"
 scopes:
 - pods
 command: sh
 args:
 - -c
 - |
 echo 'kubectl logs -f --context $CONTEXT -n $NAMESPACE $NAME \\
 | jq -rRC --unbuffered '"'"'. as $line | try fromjson catch $line'"'"' \\
 | sed '"'"'s/\\\\n/\\n/g; s/\\\\t/\\t/g'"'\n\n"

 kubectl logs -f --context $CONTEXT -n $NAMESPACE $NAME \
 | jq -rRC --unbuffered '. as $line | try fromjson catch $line' \
 | sed 's/\\n/\n/g; s/\\t/\t/g'

 node-shell:
 shortCut: s
 confirm: false
 background: false
 description: Shell
 scopes:
 - nodes
 command: sh
 args:
 - -c
 - |
 export KUBECONFIG=$KUBECONFIG
 echo "kubectl node-shell --context $CONTEXT $NAME"
 kubectl node-shell --context $CONTEXT $NAME
`

title: Kustomize
text:
## Resources

Kubernetes к°қмІҙмқҳ мқёмҠӨн„ҙмҠӨ(Deployment, Services, Namespace л“ұ)мқ„ лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨлқјкі  н•©лӢҲлӢӨ. к·ё мӨ‘ м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„ҲлҘј мӢӨн–үмӢңнӮӨлҠ” лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨлҘј мӣҢнҒ¬лЎңл“ң(Workloads) лқјкі  н•©лӢҲлӢӨ. мӣҢнҒ¬лЎңл“ңм—җлҠ” Deployment, StatefulSets, Jobs, CronJobs, DaemonSets л“ұмқҙ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨлҠ” лӢӨмқҢм—җ мқҳн•ҙ кө¬лі„лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

- apiVersion
- kind
- metadata.namespace
- metadata.name

лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨлҠ” м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ кө¬м„ұмқ„ к°–мҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

- TypeMeta: apiVersion, kind
- ObjectMeta: namespace, name
- Spec: мӣҗн•ҳлҠ” мғҒнғң
- Status: кҙҖм°°лҗң мғҒнғң

## kustomize

``shell
kustomize build | kubectl apply -f -
`

kustomizeлҠ” мң„мҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ нҳ•мӢқмңјлЎң мӮ¬мҡ©лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ. /kustomization.yaml мқҳ м„Өм •м—җ л”°лқј yaml нҢҢмқјл“Өмқҙ мЎ°н•©лҗҳкі , к·ё мЎ°н•© кІ°кіјк°Җ kubectl apply -f -м—җ мқҳн•ҙ м Ғмҡ©лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

## Example

`shell
local-path-provisioner
в”ңв”Җв”Җ base
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ kustomization.yaml
в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ local-path-storage.yaml
в””в”Җв”Җ overlays
 в””в”Җв”Җ default-storageclass
 в”ңв”Җв”Җ kustomization.yaml
 в””в”Җв”Җ patches
 в””в”Җв”Җ default-storageclass.yaml
`

`yaml title="local-path-provisioner/base/local-path-storage.yaml"
#...
apiVersion: storage.k8s.io/v1
kind: StorageClass
metadata:
 name: local-path
#...
`

`yaml title="local-path-provisioner/base/kustomization.yaml"
apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
resources:
 - local-path-storage.yaml
`

`yaml title="local-path-provisioner/overlays/default-storageclass/patchs/default-storageclass.yaml" {5}
apiVersion: storage.k8s.io/v1
kind: StorageClass
metadata:
 annotations:
 storageclass.beta.kubernetes.io/is-default-class: "true"
 name: local-path
`

`yaml title="local-path-provisioner/overlays/default-storageclass/kustomization.yaml"
apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
bases:
 - ../../base
patches:
 - patches/default-storageclass.yaml
``

## Reference

- https://kubectl.docs.kubernetes.io/references/kustomize/kustomization/
- https://kubectl.docs.kubernetes.io/guides/introduction/resources_controllers/

title: PersistentVolume
text:
## Static provisioning

- кҙҖлҰ¬мһҗк°Җ PV(PersistentVolume)лҘј мғқм„ұ
- PVC(PersistentVolumeClaim) мғқм„ұ, лӘ…мӢңлҗң мҡ”кө¬ мӮ¬н•ӯмқ„ м¶©мЎұмӢңнӮ¬ мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” PVк°Җ мһҲмңјл©ҙ л°”мқёл”©

## Dynamic provisioning

- StorageClassм—җ н”„лЎңл№„м ҖлӢқмқ„ мң„н•ң мҶҚм„ұ м„Өм •
- StorageClassлҘј лӘ…мӢңн•ң PVC мғқм„ұ
 - л¶Җн•©н•ҳлҠ” PVк°Җ мЎҙмһ¬н•ҳл©ҙ л°”мқёл”©
 - м—Ҷмңјл©ҙ StorageClassмқҳ мҶҚм„ұм—җ л”°лқј PV мғқм„ұ

## StorageClass

- https://kubernetes.io/ko/docs/tasks/administer-cluster/change-default-storage-class/

кё°ліё StorageClassлЎң л“ұлЎқн•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙм„ңлҠ” м•„лһҳ м„Өм •мқ„ м¶”к°Җн•ҳл©ҙ лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

``yaml
#...
metadata:
 annotations:
 storageclass.kubernetes.io/is-default-class: "true"
#...
`

### AWS provisioner

`yaml title="aws-standard-storage-class.yaml"
apiVersion: storage.k8s.io/v1
kind: StorageClass
metadata:
 name: standard
provisioner: kubernetes.io/aws-ebs
parameters:
 type: gp2
reclaimPolicy: Delete
allowVolumeExpansion: true
mountOptions:
 - debug
volumeBindingMode: Immediate
`

## PersistentVolume

`yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolume
metadata:
 name:
spec:
 persistentVolumeReclaimPolicy: Retain # Retain, Delete
 capacity:
 storage: # 5Gi
 volumeMode: Filesystem # Filesystem, Block
 accessModes:
 - ReadWriteOnce # ReadWriteOnce, ReadOnlyMany, ReadWriteMany
`

- persistentVolumeReclaimPolicy
 - Retain: PVCлҘј мӮӯм ңн•ҳлҚ”лқјлҸ„ PVлҠ” мӮӯм ңн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ
 - PVлҘј мӮӯм ңн•ҳлҚ”лқјлҸ„ л¬јлҰ¬ ліјлҘЁмқҖ мӮӯм ңлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ
 - Delete: PVCлҘј мӮӯм ңн•ҳл©ҙ PVмҷҖ л¬јлҰ¬ ліјлҘЁмқҙ мӮӯм ңлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ

## PersistentVolumeClaim

## StatefulSetм—җм„ң лҜёлҰ¬ мғқм„ұлҗң PV мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкё°

`yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
 name:
 namespace:
spec:
 replicas: 3
 template:
 spec:
 containers:
 - volumeMounts:
 - name:
 mountPath:
 volumeClaimTemplates:
 - metadata:
 name:
 spec:
 accessModes:
 - ReadWriteOnce
 resources:
 requests:
 storage:
`

мң„мҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ StatefulSetмқ„ мғқм„ұн•ҳл©ҙ, -- нҳ•нғңмқҳ PVCк°Җ мғқм„ұлҗҳлҜҖлЎң м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ PersistentVolumeмқ„ лҜёлҰ¬ мғқм„ұн•ҳл©ҙ лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolume
metadata:
 name:
 namespace:
spec:
 claimRef:
 name: --
 namespace:
 capacity:
 storage:
 accessModes:
 - ReadWriteOnce
 volumeMode: Filesystem
 persistentVolumeReclaimPolicy: Retain
``

## Static provisioning

- кҙҖлҰ¬мһҗк°Җ PV(PersistentVolume)лҘј мғқм„ұ
- PVC(PersistentVolumeClaim) мғқм„ұ, лӘ…мӢңлҗң мҡ”кө¬ мӮ¬н•ӯмқ„ м¶©мЎұмӢңнӮ¬ мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” PVк°Җ мһҲмңјл©ҙ л°”мқёл”©

## DynaвҖҰ

title: Pod мҲҳлӘ… мЈјкё°
text:
## Probe

- https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/pods/pod-lifecycle/#container-probes

kubeletм—җ мқҳн•ҙ мЈјкё°м ҒмңјлЎң мҲҳн–үлҗҳлҠ” м§„лӢЁ мһ‘м—…мқ„ Probeлқјкі  н•©лӢҲлӢӨ. м§„лӢЁ мһ‘м—… мҲҳн–үмқ„ мң„н•ҙ лҜёлҰ¬ кө¬нҳ„лҗң н•ёл“Өлҹ¬к°Җ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

``yaml
spec:
 restartPolicy: Always # Always|OnFailure|Never
 containers:
 - # ...
 # startupProbe|livenessProbe|readinessProbe
 livenessProbe:
 # exec|httpGet|tcpSocket|grpc
 httpGet:
 path: /healthz
 port: 8080
 initialDelaySeconds: 0 # мІҳмқҢ probeлҘј мӢңмһ‘н•ҳкё° м „ лҢҖкё° мӢңк°„
 periodSeconds: 10 # probeлҘј мӢӨн–үн•ҳлҠ” мЈјкё°
 successThreshold: 1 # SuccessлЎң нҢҗлӢЁн•ҳкё° мң„н•ң мөңмҶҢ м„ұкіө нҡҹмҲҳ
 failureThreshold: 3 # FailureлЎң нҢҗлӢЁн•ҳкё° мң„н•ң мөңмҶҢ мӢӨнҢЁ нҡҹмҲҳ
 timeoutSeconds: 1 # probeлҘј мӢӨн–үн•ҳлҠ” мӢңк°„ м ңн•ң
`

`shell
kubectl explain pod.spec.containers.startupProbe --recursive
`

- startupProbe: м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳ лӮҙмқҳ м• н”ҢлҰ¬мјҖмқҙм…ҳмқҙ мӢңмһ‘лҗҳм—ҲлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқён•©лӢҲлӢӨ
 - Failure мғҒнғңк°Җ лҗҳл©ҙ м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„ҲлҠ” restartPolicyм—җ л”°лқј мІҳлҰ¬лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ
 - Success мғҒнғңк°Җ лҗң нӣ„м—җ livenessProbe, readinessProbeк°Җ мӢңмһ‘лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ
- livenessProbe: м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳк°Җ м •мғҒм ҒмңјлЎң мһ‘лҸҷ мӨ‘мқём§Җ нҷ•мқён•©лӢҲлӢӨ
 - Failure мғҒнғңк°Җ лҗҳл©ҙ м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„ҲлҠ” restartPolicyм—җ л”°лқј мІҳлҰ¬лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ
- readinessProbe: м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳк°Җ мҡ”мІӯмқ„ мІҳлҰ¬н•  мӨҖл№„к°Җ лҗҳм—ҲлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқён•©лӢҲлӢӨ
 - Failure мғҒнғңк°Җ лҗҳл©ҙ Podмқҳ Ready мғҒнғңк°Җ FalseлЎң ліҖкІҪлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ
 - м—°кІ°лҗң Serviceмқҳ Endpointм—җм„ң м ңкұ°лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ
 - л¬ём ң мһҲлҠ” м• н”ҢлҰ¬мјҖмқҙм…ҳм—җ м ‘к·јмқ„ мӮ¬м „м—җ м°ЁлӢЁн•ҙ мӨҢмңјлЎңмҚЁ л¬ём ңк°Җ м „нҢҢлҗҳлҠ” кІғмқ„ л°©м§Җн•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ

- exec
 - мЈјм–ҙм§„ м»Өл§Ёл“ң мҲҳн–ү нӣ„ return code == 0 мқҙл©ҙ м§„лӢЁ м„ұкіөмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - command: []
- httpGet
 - GET мҡ”мІӯ мҲҳн–ү нӣ„ 200
 - port:
 - path:
- tcpSocket
 - м§Җм •лҗң нҸ¬нҠём—җ TCP м—°кІ°мқҙ м„ұкіөн•ҳл©ҙ м§„лӢЁ м„ұкіөмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - host:
 - port:
- grpc
 - gRPC health check м„ңл№„мҠӨлҘј нҳём¶ңн•ҳм—¬ SERVING мғҒнғңмқҙл©ҙ м§„лӢЁ м„ұкіөмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - gRPC GitHub / docs / GRPC Health Checking Protocol
 - port:
 - service:
- initialDelaySeconds: 0
- periodSeconds: 10
- successThreshold: 1
- failureThreshold: 3
- timeoutSeconds: 1

## Termination

- мў…лЈҢ мӢңмһ‘
 - Pod
 - .spec.preStop нӣ…мқҙ м •мқҳлҗң кІҪмҡ° н•ҙлӢ№ нӣ…мқ„ мӢӨн–үн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳ мқҙлҜём§Җм—җ STOPSIGNALмқҙ мһҲлҠ” кІҪмҡ° мқҙ мӢ нҳёлҘј, м—ҶлҠ” кІҪмҡ° SIGTERMмқ„ м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳмқҳ кё°ліё н”„лЎңм„ёмҠӨм—җ м „мҶЎн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - Pod лӮҙмқҳ м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳл“ӨмқҖ лһңлҚӨн•ң мҲңм„ңлЎң мӢ нҳёлҘј л°ӣмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - мў…лЈҢк°Җ мӢңмһ‘лҗң нӣ„ .spec.terminationGracePeriodSecondsмқҙ м§ҖлӮҳл©ҙ SIGKILL`мқ„ м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳмқҳ кё°ліё н”„лЎңм„ёмҠӨм—җ м „мҶЎн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - Service
 - мў…лЈҢк°Җ мӢңмһ‘лҗң Podмқҳ EndpointлҘј м ңкұ°н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

## Probe

- https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/pods/pod-lifecycle/#container-probes

kubeletм—җ мқҳн•ҙ мЈјкё°м ҒмңјлЎң мҲҳн–үлҗҳлҠ” м§„лӢЁ мһ‘м—…мқ„ Probeлқјкі  н•©лӢҲлӢӨ. м§„лӢЁ мһ‘м—… мҲҳн–үмқ„ мң„н•ҙ лҜёлҰ¬ кө¬вҖҰ

title: ReloaderлЎң ConfigMap, Secret ліҖкІҪ мӢң Workload мһ¬мӢңмһ‘н•ҳкё°
description: ReloaderлЎң ConfigMap, Secret ліҖкІҪ мӢң Workload мһ¬мӢңмһ‘н•ҳкё°
text:
## м„Өм№ҳ

- Reloader GitHub # Installation

``shell
helm repo add stakater https://stakater.github.io/stakater-charts
`

`shell
helm repo update stakater \
&& helm search repo stakater/reloader | head -n 10
`

`shell
helm pull stakater/reloader --version 2.2.6
`

`shell
helm show values stakater/reloader --version 2.2.6 > reloader-2.2.6.yaml
`

`yaml title="reloader-values.yaml"
fullnameOverride: ""
`

`shell
helm template reloader stakater/reloader \
 --version 2.2.6 \
 -n reloader \
 -f reloader-values.yaml \
reloader-2.2.6.yaml
`

`shell
helm upgrade -i reloader stakater/reloader \
 --history-max 5 \
 --create-namespace \
 --version 2.2.6 \
 -n reloader \
 -f reloader-values.yaml
`

## мӮ¬мҡ©лІ•

- Reloader GitHub # Usage

### ConfigMap, Secret мһҗлҸҷ к°җм§Җ

`yaml
metadata:
 annotations:
 reloader.stakater.com/auto: "true"
`

- reloader.stakater.com/auto: "true": Workloadк°Җ м°ёмЎ°н•ҳлҠ” ConfigMap, Secret ліҖкІҪ мӢң мһ¬мӢңмһ‘
- secret.reloader.stakater.com/auto: "true": Workloadк°Җ м°ёмЎ°н•ҳлҠ” Secret ліҖкІҪ мӢң мһ¬мӢңмһ‘
- configmap.reloader.stakater.com/auto: "true": Workloadк°Җ м°ёмЎ°н•ҳлҠ” ConfigMap ліҖкІҪ мӢң мһ¬мӢңмһ‘

### нҠ№м • ConfigMap, Secret к°җм§Җ

`yaml
metadata:
 annotations:
 secret.reloader.stakater.com/reload: "my-secret"
`

- secret.reloader.stakater.com/reload: "[,...]": нҠ№м • Secret ліҖкІҪ мӢң мһ¬мӢңмһ‘
- configmap.reloader.stakater.com/reload: "[,...]"`: нҠ№м • ConfigMap ліҖкІҪ мӢң мһ¬мӢңмһ‘

вҖҰn reloader \
 -f reloader-values.yaml
`

## Push кё°л°ҳ ліөм ң

metadata:

`

namespaceSelector, labelSelector мӨ‘ н•ҳлӮҳ лҳҗлҠ” л‘ҳ лӢӨ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. л‘ҳ лӢӨ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ° OR мЎ°кұҙмңјлЎң лҸҷмһ‘н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

- namespaceSelector
 - л§Өм№ӯлҗҳм–ҙм•јн•  namespaceмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - м •к·ңн‘ңнҳ„мӢқмқ„ н—Ҳмҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- labelSelector
 - л§Өм№ӯлҗҳм–ҙм•јн•  labelмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/labels/#label-selectors
 -
 - !
 - =
 - !=
 - in ([,])
 - notin ([,])`

## Pull кё°л°ҳ ліөм ң
snippet:
## м„Өм№ҳ

text:
## Secret

``yaml

# кё°лҢҖн•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨл©ҙ

## PodмҷҖ м—°кІ°

- https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/secret/

- Secretкіј PodлҠ” к°ҷмқҖ namespaceм—җ мһҲм–ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ

- subPathлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ң кІҪмҡ° м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠё лҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ
- envлЎң м„Өм •н•ң кІҪмҡ° м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠё лҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ

apiVersion: v1

metadata:

## PodSecurityContext

- https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.30/#podsecuritycontext-v1-core

PodSecurityContextлҠ” Podмқҳ .spec.securityContextм—җ м Ғмҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” лӮҙмҡ©мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

## SecurityContext

- https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.30/#securitycontext-v1-core

SecurityContextлҠ” Podмқҳ

- spec.containers.securityContext
- spec.initContainers.securityContext
- spec.ephemeralContainers.securityContext

м—җ м Ғмҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” лӮҙмҡ©мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

- privileged:
 - hostмқҳ rootмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ к¶Ңн•ңмқ„ к°–кІҢ лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - hostмқҳ лӘЁл“  deviceм—җ м ‘к·јн•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - host мӢңмҠӨн…ң/м»Өл„җм—җ лҢҖн•ң кұ°мқҳ лӘЁл“  м ‘к·јмқ„ н—Ҳмҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - лӘЁл“  capabilityлҘј к°Җм§‘лӢҲлӢӨ.
- capabilities
 - capability.h
 - CAP_ м ‘л‘җмӮ¬лЎң мӢңмһ‘лҗҳлҠ” к°’кіј ALLмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - **CAP_ м ‘л‘җмӮ¬лҠ” мғқлһөн•ҙм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ. e.g., CAP_SYS_ADMIN -> SYS_ADMIN**
 - CAP_IPC_LOCK
 - л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ Swap outмқ„ л°©м§Җн•ҳкі , Huge PageлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - I/O м§Җм—° л°©м§Җ, лҜјк°җ м •ліҙ л””мҠӨнҒ¬ кё°лЎқ л°©м§Җ л“ұм—җ мӮ¬мҡ©лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - CAP_NET_RAW
 - Raw мҶҢмј“мқ„ мғқм„ұ/мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - нҢЁнӮ· мЎ°мһ‘, нҢЁнӮ· мҠӨлӢҲн•‘ л“ұм—җ мӮ¬мҡ©лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - CAP_SYS_RAWIO
 - н•ҳл“ңмӣЁм–ҙ мһҗмӣҗм—җ м§Ғм ‘м Ғмқҙ I/O м ‘к·јмқ„ н—Ҳмҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ м§Ғм ‘ м ‘к·ј, мһҘм№ҳ м ңм–ҙ л“ұм—җ мӮ¬мҡ©лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - add: []
 - drop: []

title: Clone OS image
text:
## Read disk and save .img.xz

``shell {1,8,15}
$ sudo fdisk -l

...

Disk /dev/sdb: 14.86 GiB, 15931539456 bytes, 31116288 sectors
Disk model: STORAGE DEVICE
Units: sectors of 1 * 512 = 512 bytes
Sector size (logical/physical): 512 bytes / 512 bytes
I/O size (minimum/optimal): 512 bytes / 512 bytes
Disklabel type: dos
Disk identifier: 0xf7bdbfa9

Device Boot Start End Sectors Size Id Type
/dev/sdb1 8192 532479 524288 256M c W95 FAT32 (LBA)
/dev/sdb2 532480 31115263 30582784 14.6G 83 Linux
`

`shell
sudo umount /dev/sdb1 /dev/sdb2
`

`shell
sudo dd if=/dev/sdb of=clone.img bs=4M count=$((31115263 + 1)) status=progress
`

`shell {1}
$ sudo parted -ms clone.img unit B print
BYT;
/home/hhk7734/clone.img:15931539456B:file:512:512:msdos::;
1:4194304B:272629759B:268435456B:fat32::lba;
2:272629760B:15931015167B:15658385408B:ext4::;
`

`shell {1}
$ sudo losetup -f --show -o 272629760 clone.img
/dev/loop20
`

`shell
sudo e2fsck -pf /dev/loop20
`

`shell {1}
$ sudo tune2fs -l /dev/loop20 | grep -e '^Block size:' -e '^Block count:'
Block count: 3822848
Block size: 4096
`

`shell {1}
$ sudo resize2fs -P /dev/loop20
resize2fs 1.45.5 (07-Jan-2020)
Estimated minimum size of the filesystem: 851980
`

`shell
sudo resize2fs -p /dev/loop20 $((851980 + 5000))
`

`shell
sudo losetup -d /dev/loop20
`

`shell
sudo parted -s -a minimal clone.img rm 2
`

`shell
sudo parted -s clone.img unit B mkpart "primary" "272629760" \
 "$((272629760 + ((851980 + 5000) * 4096)))"
`

`shell {1-2}
$ sudo parted -ms clone.img unit B print free | tail -1 \
 | cut -d ':' -f 2 | tr -d 'B'
3782820352
`

`shell
sudo truncate -s 3782820352 clone.img
`

`shell
sudo xz -vk -T$(($(nproc) - 2)) clone.img
`

## Flash .img.xz to disk

`shell
xzcat -dvk -T$(($(nproc) - 2)) clone.img.xz \
| sudo dd of=/dev/sdb bs=4M status=progress conv=fsync
``

or Use Etcher.

title: Device tree basics
text:
Typically, **\** file contain definitions of SoC-level information.

The **\** file contains board-level information.

## Using device tree compiler

``shell
sudo apt install -y device-tree-compiler
`

### Check nodes and properties

/proc/device-tree/ and / node of a device tree source(DTS) are the same.

If a DTS is

`clike
/ {
 model = "A";
}
`

The structure of /proc/device-tree/ is as follows.

`shell
/proc/device-tree
в””в”Җв”Җ model
`

`shell {1}
$ cat /proc/device-tree
A
`

So, you can check DTS with one of the following commands.

`shell
tree /proc/device-tree
`

`shell
fdtdump | vim -
`

### DTS modification

#### fdtget/fdtput

`shell
fdtget
`

`shell
fdtput -t
`

- type
 - s=string, i=int, u=unsigned, x=hex
 - Optional modifier prefix: hh or b=byte, h=2 byte, l=4 byte (default)

#### Decompiled file modification

`shell
dtc -I dtb -O dts -o
`

After decompiling with the above command, edit . Then, compile the edited file with the below command.

`shell
dtc -I dts -O dtb -o
`

## Using Linux kernel source

`shell
git clone --depth=1 --branch=
`

After editing DTS, check Makefile.

`makefile title="linux/arch//boot/dts//Makefile"
dtb-$(CONFIG_ARCH_) += .dtb
`

Then, execute the below commands.

`shell
make xxx_defconfig \
&& make dtbs
`

Then, DTB will be created in linux/arch//boot/.

If the above command fails, check **arch/\/configs**. If not in arch/\/configs, get a config file using zcat /proc/config.gz > _defconfig` from the kernel installed on the desired board.
snippet:

The **\** file contains board-level information.

sudo apt install -y device-tree-compiler
`

### Check nodes aвҖҰ

title: fstab(file systems table)
headings: Use 'blkid' to print the universally unique identifier for a
device; this may be used with UUID= as a more robust way to name devices
that works even if disks are added and removed. See fstab(5).
text:
## fstab

- https://man7.org/linux/man-pages/man5/fstab.5.html

/etc/fstab нҢҢмқјмқҖ м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ кө¬м„ұлҗҳм–ҙ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

``shell
# /etc/fstab: static file system information.
#
# Use 'blkid' to print the universally unique identifier for a
# device; this may be used with UUID= as a more robust way to name devices
# that works even if disks are added and removed. See fstab(5).
#
#
/dev/sdc2 / ext4 errors=remount-ro 0 1
/dev/sdc1 /boot/efi vfat umask=0077 0 1
/dev/sda1 /home ext4 defaults 0 2
`

`shell
sudo mount -av
`

-a мҳөм…ҳмқ„ нҶөн•ҙ /etc/fstabм—җ м„ м–ёлҗң лӘЁл“  нҢҢмқј мӢңмҠӨн…ңмқ„ л§ҲмҡҙнҠён•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

### нҢҢмқј мӢңмҠӨн…ң

`shell
lsblk -f
`

- /dev/
- LABEL=
- UUID=

### л§ҲмҡҙнҠё мҳөм…ҳ

- defaults: rw,suid,exec,auto,nouser,async,dev
- ro|rw: мқҪкё° м „мҡ©, мқҪкё° м“°кё°
- suid|nosuid: setuid, setgid н—Ҳмҡ© м—¬л¶Җ
- exec|noexec: мӢӨн–үнҢҢмқј мӢӨн–ү н—Ҳмҡ© м—¬л¶Җ
- auto|noauto: л¶ҖнҢ…мӢң мһҗлҸҷ л§ҲмҡҙнҠё м—¬л¶Җ
- user|nouser: мқјл°ҳ мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗ л§ҲмҡҙнҠё н—Ҳмҡ© м—¬л¶Җ
 - nouser`лҠ” rootл§Ң л§ҲмҡҙнҠё к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳлӢӨлҠ” мқҳлҜёмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

title: Logical Volume Manager(LVM)
text:
## Logical Volume Manager(LVM)

Logical Volume Manager(LVM)лҠ” л¬јлҰ¬м Ғ ліјлҘЁл“Ө мң„м—җ м¶”мғҒ кі„мёөмқ„ мғқм„ұн•ң нӣ„ к·ё мң„м—җ л…јлҰ¬м Ғмқё ліјлҘЁмқ„ л§Ңл“Өм–ҙ
кҙҖлҰ¬н•ҳлҠ” лҸ„кө¬мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. л…јлҰ¬м Ғ ліјлҘЁмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©ҙ мӢңмҠӨн…ң мӨ‘лӢЁ м—Ҷмқҙ л””мҠӨнҒ¬ нҒ¬кё°лҘј мЎ°м •н•  мҲҳ мһҲкі , м—¬лҹ¬ л””мҠӨнҒ¬лҘј н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ нҒ°
л””мҠӨнҒ¬мқё кІғмІҳлҹј мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

``mermaid
flowchart BT
 PV1[(Physical Volume)] --> VG[(Volume Group)]
 PV2[(Physical Volume)] --> VG
 PV3[(Physical Volume)] --> VG
 VG --> LV1[(Logical Volume)]
 VG --> LV2[(Logical Volume)]
`

- Physical Volume(PV): мӢӨм ң л””мҠӨнҒ¬лӮҳ л””мҠӨнҒ¬мқҳ нҢҢнӢ°м…ҳмқ„ мқҳлҜён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- Volume Group(VG): м—¬лҹ¬ PVлҘј н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ нҒ° л…јлҰ¬м Ғ м ҖмһҘ кіөк°„мңјлЎң л¬¶мқҖ кІғмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
- Logical Volume(LV): мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗк°Җ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” л…јлҰ¬м Ғ нҢҢнӢ°м…ҳмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

## Physical Volume(PV)

title: Linux Namespace(л„Өмһ„мҠӨнҺҳмқҙмҠӨ)
text:
## Linux Namespace

- https://man7.org/linux/man-pages/man7/namespaces.7.html
A namespace wraps a global system resource in an abstraction that makes it appear to the processes within the namespace that they have their own isolated instance of the global resource.

л„Өмһ„мҠӨнҺҳмқҙмҠӨлҠ” м „м—ӯ мӢңмҠӨн…ң лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨлҘј м¶”мғҒнҷ”н•ҳм—¬ л„Өмһ„мҠӨнҺҳмқҙмҠӨ лӮҙмқҳ н”„лЎңм„ёмҠӨк°Җ м „м—ӯ лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨмқҳ кІ©лҰ¬лҗң мқёмҠӨн„ҙмҠӨлҘј к°Җм§Җкі  мһҲлҠ” кІғмІҳлҹј ліҙмқҙкІҢ н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
Changes to the global resource are visible to other processes that are members of the namespace, but are invisible to other processes.

м „м—ӯ лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨмқҳ ліҖкІҪ мӮ¬н•ӯмқҖ л„Өмһ„мҠӨнҺҳмқҙмҠӨ л©ӨлІ„мқё н”„лЎңмҠӨм„ёл“Өм—җкІҢлҠ” ліҙмқҙм§Җл§Ң, к·ёл Үм§Җ м•ҠмқҖ н”„лЎңм„ёмҠӨл“Өм—җкІҢлҠ” ліҙмқҙм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
One use of namespaces is to implement containers.

л„Өмһ„мҠӨнҺҳмқҙмҠӨмқҳ мӮ¬мҡ© мӨ‘ н•ҳлӮҳлҠ” м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„ҲлҘј кө¬нҳ„н•ҳлҠ” кІғмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

...
Absent any other factors, a namespace is automatically torn down when the last process in the namespace terminates or leaves the namespace.

лӢӨлҘё мҡ”мқёмқҙ м—ҶлӢӨл©ҙ, л„Өмһ„мҠӨнҺҳмқҙмҠӨлҠ” л„Өмһ„мҠӨнҺҳмқҙмҠӨ лӮҙмқҳ л§Ҳм§Җл§ү н”„лЎңм„ёмҠӨк°Җ мў…лЈҢлҗҳкұ°лӮҳ л„Өмһ„мҠӨнҺҳмқҙмҠӨлҘј л– лӮ  л•Ң мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң н•ҙм ңлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
However, there are a number of other factors that may pin a namespace into existence even though it has no member processes

к·ёлҹ¬лӮҳ, л„Өмһ„мҠӨнҺҳмқҙмҠӨм—җ л©ӨлІ„ н”„лЎңм„ёмҠӨк°Җ м—ҶлҠ” кІҪмҡ°м—җлҸ„ л„Өмһ„мҠӨнҺҳмқҙмҠӨлҘј мЎҙмһ¬н•ҳкІҢ н•ҳлҠ” м—¬лҹ¬ мҡ”мқёмқҙ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

text:
## Swap Space л§Ңл“Өкё°

### Swap file

sudo dd if=/dev/zero of= bs= count=
`

`

`shell
sudo mkswap
`

### ZRAM

`shell
sudo modprobe zram [num_devices=]
`

`shell
sudo zramctl []
`

-
 - -f | --find: free deviceлҘј м°ҫмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - -s | --size : device sizeлҘј м„Өм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.(м••м¶• лҗҳкё° м „ нҒ¬кё°)
 - -a | --algorithm : compression algorithmмқ„ м„Өм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`shell
zramctl
`

`shell
sudo mkswap
`

udevлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ zramмқ„ м„Өм •н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

`shell title="/etc/modules-load.d/zram.conf"
zram
`

`shell title="/etc/udev/rules.d/99-zram.rules"
KERNEL=="zram0", ACTION=="add", ATTR{comp_algorithm}="lzo-rle", ATTR{disksize}="2G", RUN="/sbin/mkswap /dev/%k"
`

`ini title="/etc/systemd/system/zram.service"
[Unit]
Description=Swap with zram
After=multi-user.target

[Service]
RemainAfterExit=true
ExecStartPre=/sbin/mkswap /dev/zram0
ExecStart=/sbin/swapon -p 10 /dev/zram0
ExecStop=/sbin/swapoff /dev/zram0

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
`

`shell
sudo systemctl enable zram
`

## Swap ON/OFF

`shell
sudo swapon
`

-
 - -p | --priority
 - 0 ~ 32767 к°’мқ„ м„Өм • н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - нҒ° к°’мқј мҲҳлЎқ мҡ°м„ мҲңмң„к°Җ лҶ’мҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - -s | --summary: swap мғҒнғңлҘј м¶ңл Ҙн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`

title: Linux udev
text:
## udev

- https://man7.org/linux/man-pages/man7/udev.7.html

- udev(userspace /dev)лҠ” Linux м»Өл„җмҡ© мһҘм№ҳ кҙҖлҰ¬мһҗмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
- udevd лҠ” м»Өл„җ ueventлҘј к°җмӢңн•ҳлӢӨк°Җ л“Өм–ҙмҳӨлҠ” мқҙлІӨнҠёлҘј udevлЎң м „лӢ¬н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗлҠ” м»ӨмҠӨн…Җ к·ңм№ҷмқ„ /etc/udev/rules.d/м—җ л“ұлЎқн•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
- л””л°”мқҙмҠӨ м •ліҙлҠ” udevadm info -ap $(udevadm info -q path -n /dev/) лӘ…л №м–ҙлЎң нҷ•мқён•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
- к·ңм№ҷ мһ‘м„ұмқ„ мң„н•ң м—°мӮ°мһҗ
 - ==
 - !=
 - =: к°’мқ„ н• лӢ№н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - :=: к°’мқ„ н• лӢ№н•ҳкі  мқҙнӣ„ ліҖкІҪмқ„ н—Ҳмҡ©н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - +=: к°’мқ„ лҰ¬мҠӨнҠём—җ м¶”к°Җн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - -=: к°’мқ„ лҰ¬мҠӨнҠём—җм„ң м ңкұ°н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

лЈ° м Ғмҡ©мқҙ лҗҳкі  мһҲлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқён•ҳл Өл©ҙ м•„лһҳ лӘ…л №м–ҙлЎң лЎңк·ёлҘј нҷ•мқён•ҙліҙл©ҙ лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

``shell
journalctl -ex -u systemd-udevd.service
`

## xx-descriptive-name.rules
Files should be named xx-descriptive-name.rules, the xx should be chosen first according to the following sequence points:
**=90** rules that should run last

## Example

/etc/udev/rules.d/50-gpio.rules

`shell
SUBSYSTEM=="i2c-dev", GROUP="i2c", MODE="0660"
SUBSYSTEM=="spidev", GROUP="spi", MODE="0660"
SUBSYSTEM=="input", GROUP="input", MODE="0660"
KERNEL=="ttyS*", GROUP="dialout", MODE="0660"
KERNEL=="ttyAML*", GROUP="dialout", MODE="0660"
KERNEL=="ttySAC*", GROUP="dialout", MODE="0660"

SUBSYSTEM=="gpio", GROUP="gpio", MODE="0660"
# /sys/class/gpio
SUBSYSTEM=="gpio*", PROGRAM="/bin/sh -c 'find -L /sys/class/gpio/ -maxdepth 2 -exec chgrp -HR gpio {} \; -exec chmod -R 770 {} \; || true'"
`

мІ« лІҲм§ё мӨ„мқҖ i2c-dev мһҘм№ҳк°Җ к°җм§Җлҗҳл©ҙ(==) к·ёлЈ№мқҖ i2cлЎң(=), лӘЁл“ңлҠ” 0660мңјлЎң(=`) м„Өм •н•ҳлқјлҠ” мқҳлҜёмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

text:
## м„Өм№ҳ

м•„лһҳ лӘ©м°Ём—җ мһҲлҠ” лӮҙмҡ©мқ„ м„Өм№ҳн•ҳм…”м•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

 - https://free-entry-toolchain.hightec-rt.com/index.php
 - Restricted version of the TriCore Development Platform, supporting a restricted selection of AURIX derivatives. Following a single year duration its license automatically expires.

BrowseлҘј лҲҢлҹ¬ мӣҗн•ҳлҠ” BaseFrameworkлӮҳ н”„лЎңм қнҠё л””л үн„°лҰ¬лҘј м„ нғқн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

м„ нғқн•ң л””л үн„°лҰ¬ лӮҙм—җ мһҲлҠ” н”„лЎңм қнҠёл“Өмқҙ н‘ңмӢңлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ. мӣҗн•ҳлҠ” н”„лЎңм қнҠёлҘј м„ нғқн•ң нӣ„ **Copy projects into workspace**лҘј мІҙнҒ¬н•ң нӣ„ FinishлҘј лҲ„лҰ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

title: TriCore Upload executable file in UDEVisualPlatform
description: TriCore Upload executable file in UDEVisualPlatform
text:
## UDEVisualPlatform

- File -> New Workspace

.wsx нҢҢмқјмқ„ м ҖмһҘ нӣ„, New лІ„нҠјмқ„ лҲ„лҘҙкі  мӮ¬мҡ© мӨ‘мқё ліҙл“ңлҘј м°ҫм•„ м„ нғқн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

- New
- Use a default target configuration -> TriCore -> Hitex -> ShieldBuddy -> Hitex ShieldBuddy with TC275T D-Step (Multicore Configuration)
- Finish

.cfg нҢҢмқјмқ„ м ҖмһҘ нӣ„, OK лІ„нҠјмқ„ лҲҢлҹ¬ м„Өм •мқ„ лҒқлғ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

мһҘм№ҳк°Җ м»ҙн“Ён„°м—җ м—°кІ°лҗҳм–ҙ мһҲм—ҲлӢӨл©ҙ мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң м—°кІ°лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ. к·ёл Үм§Җ м•ҠмқҖ кІҪмҡ° File -> Connect Target Systemмқ„ м„ нғқн•ҳм—¬ м—°кІ°мқ„ мӢңлҸ„н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

## Load

- File -> Load Program
- \\2_Out\Tricore_Gnuc\.elf

мқҙлҜё л¶Ҳлҹ¬мҳЁ кІҪмҡ° м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ м°Ҫмқҙ лң№лӢҲлӢӨ. л…ёлһҖмӨ„ м№ң л¶Җл¶„мқҳ мІ«лІҲм§ё лІ„нҠјмқҙ мғҲлЎңмҡҙ нҢҢмқјмқ„ л¶Ҳлҹ¬мҳӨлҠ” лІ„нҠјмқҙкі , л‘җлІҲм§ё лІ„нҠјмқҙ мІҙнҒ¬лҗң нҢҢмқјмқ„ л“ұлЎқм—җм„ң мӮӯм ңн•ҳлҠ” лІ„нҠјмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

## Upload

мғҲлЎңмҡҙ нҢҢмқјмқ„ л¶Ҳлҹ¬мҳӨл©ҙ н”„лЎңк·ёлһЁмқ„ м—…лЎңл“ңн•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” м°Ҫмқҙ мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң м—ҙлҰҪлӢҲлӢӨ. Program Allмқ„ лҲҢлҹ¬ ліҙл“ңлЎң м—…лЎңл“ң н•ҳл©ҙ лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ. м—…лЎңл“ң нӣ„м—җ мҪ”л“ңлҘј ліҖкІҪн•ҳкі  лӢӨмӢң л№Ңл“ңн•ҳл©ҙ UDEVisualPlatformмқҙ л°”мқҙл„ҲлҰ¬мқҳ ліҖнҷ”лҘј к°җм§Җн•ҳкі  м—…лЎңл“ңн•  кІғмқём§Җ л¬»лҠ” м°Ҫмқ„ мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң м—ҙм–ҙмӨҚлӢҲлӢӨ.

мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң м—ҙлҰ¬м§Җ м•Ҡмңјл©ҙ Tools -> FLASH Programmingмқ„ лҲҢлҹ¬ м—…лЎңл“ңм°Ҫмқ„ м—° нӣ„ Program Allмқ„ лҲҢлҹ¬ м—…лЎңл“ңн•ҳмӢңл©ҙ лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

## Start

- Debug -> Start Program Execution(F5)
- Debug -> Reset target(Ctrl + F7)

title: Packaging with conda
text:
## м„Өм№ҳ

``shell
conda activate root
`

`shell
conda upgrade conda
`

`shell
conda config --add channels conda-forge \
&& conda config --set channel_priority strict
`

conda-forge нҢЁнӮӨм§Җ м„Өм№ҳмӢң conda-forgeм—җм„ң м„Өм№ҳн•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ°к°Җ л§Һкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ conda-forgeмқҳ мҡ°м„ мҲңмң„лҘј defaultліҙлӢӨ лҶ’м—¬ мЈјлҠ” кІғмқҙ мқҳмЎҙ м„ұ м¶©лҸҢмқ„ л§үкё° мүҪмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

`shell
conda install conda-build
`

`shell
conda upgrade conda-build
`

## Package directory structure

`shell

в”ңв”Җв”Җ recipe
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ build.sh
в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ meta.yaml
`

## meta.yaml

`yaml title="recipe/meta.yaml"
package:
 name:
 version:

source:
 path: ../
 # git cloneмңјлЎң мӢңмһ‘н•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ
 # git_url:
 # git_rev:
 # git_depth: 1 # (Defaults to -1/not shallow)
 #
 # tarball, hg, svn л“ұ м§Җмӣҗ

build:
 number: # Defaults to 0, лІ„м „мқҙ к°ҷлҚ”лқјлҸ„ л№Ңл“ң лІҲнҳёк°Җ лӢӨлҘҙл©ҙ м—…лЎңл“ң к°ҖлҠҘ
 script_env:
 - # лЎңм»¬м—җм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©лҗҳлҠ” нҷҳкІҪ ліҖмҲҳ мӨ‘ scriptм—җм„ң м“ё нҷҳкІҪ ліҖмҲҳ м„ м–ё
 - = # м¶”к°Җ нҷҳкІҪ ліҖмҲҳ м„Өм •

requirements:
 # buildм—җ н•„мҡ”н•ң dependencies
 build:
 -
 # - {{ compiler('c') }}
 host:
 -
 run:
 -

test:
 files:
 -
 source_files:
 -
 reqires:
 # requirements.runмқҖ мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң м¶”к°Җ
 -
 command:
 -

about:
 home:
 license:
 license_file:
 summary:
`

## build.sh

`shell title="recipe/build.sh"
#!/bin/sh
`

## Build

`shell
conda build //recipe
`

- -c : dependencyлҘј м„Өм№ҳн•  мұ„л„җ м„Өм •

## Upload

`shell
conda install anaconda-client
`

`shell
anaconda login
`

`shell
anaconda upload /miniconda3/conda-bld//--.tar.bz2
``

- https://docs.conda.io/projects/conda-build/en/latest/resources/define-metadata.html

title: Package with Poetry
text:
## Directory Structure

``shell
/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ pyproject.toml
в”ңв”Җв”Җ README.md
в””в”Җв”Җ /
 в”ңв”Җв”Җ __init__.py # import
 в”ңв”Җв”Җ /
 в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ __init__.py # from import
 в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ .py # from . import
 в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ ...
 в””в”Җв”Җ ...
`

## pyproject.toml

- https://python-poetry.org/docs/pyproject/

`toml title="pyproject.toml"
[tool.poetry]
# Required
name = "" # pip install , мҷҖ лӢӨлҘј мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
version = ""
description = ""
authors = [
 "Hyeonki Hong "
]
packages = [
 { include = ""} # import
]

# Optional
licencse = ""
maintainers = []
readme = ["README.md"]
homepage = "https://wiki.loliot.net"
repository = "https://github.com/hhk7734/example"
documentation = "https://wiki.loliot.net"
keywords = []
classifiers = [
 "Programming Language :: Python :: 3",
 "Intended Audience :: Developers",
]
include = []
exclude = []

[build-system]
build-backend = "poetry.core.masonry.api"
requires = ["poetry-core"]
`

- version: https://peps.python.org/pep-0440/
- license: identifier, https://spdx.org/licenses/
- classifiers: https://pypi.org/classifiers/

## Extras

`toml title="pyproject.toml"
[tool.poetry.dependencies]
 = {..., optional = true}

[tool.poetry.extras]
 = [""]
`

[tool.poetry.dependencies]м—җ м •мқҳлҗң нҢЁнӮӨм§Җл§Ң extraлЎң л“ұлЎқн•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. extraлЎң м •мқҳлҗң мқҳмЎҙм„ұмқҖ м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ лӘ…л №м–ҙлЎң н•ҙлӢ№ нҢЁнӮӨм§ҖлҘј м„Өм№ҳн•  л•Ң н•Ёк»ҳ м„Өм№ҳн•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

`shell
python3 -m pip install []
`

## Scripts

`toml title="pyproject.toml"
[tool.poetry.scripts]
 = "." # __main__
 = ".:"
`

нҢЁнӮӨм§ҖлҘј м„Өм№ҳн•ҳл©ҙ м„Өм№ҳн•  л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ң pythonкіј кҙҖл Ёлҗң bin/ л””л үнҶ лҰ¬м—җ н•ҙлӢ№ лӘЁл“ҲмқҙлӮҳ н•ЁмҲҳлҘј мӢӨн–үмӢңнӮӨлҠ” мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠёк°Җ мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң мғқм„ұлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

## Build

`shell
poetry build
`

л№Ңл“ңлҘј н•ҳл©ҙ dist/ л””л үнҶ лҰ¬м—җ л№Ңл“ңлҗң нҢЁнӮӨм§Җк°Җ мғқм„ұлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

## Publish

- https://python-poetry.org/docs/cli/#publish
- https://python-poetry.org/docs/repositories/

`shell
poetry publish []
`

-
 - --build: л№Ңл“ң нӣ„ м—…лЎңл“ң
 - -r|--repository
 - -u|--username ""
 - -p|--password ""

### Test PyPI

`shell
poetry config repositories.testpypi https://test.pypi.org/legacy/
`

`shell
poetry config http-basic.testpypi "" ""
`

`shell
poetry publish -r testpypi
`

Test PyPIм—җ л“ұлЎқлҗң нҢЁнӮӨм§ҖлҘј poetryлЎң м„Өм№ҳн•ҙліҙл Өл©ҙ м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ source л“ұлЎқ нӣ„ м„Өм№ҳн•ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`shell
poetry source add --secondary testpypi https://test.pypi.org/simple/
`

`shell
poetry add --source testpypi
`

### PyPI

`shell
poetry config http-basic.pypi "" ""
`

`shell
poetry publish
``

title: Ciliumм—җм„ң ARP/NDP мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкё°
description: Ciliumм—җм„ң Address Resolution Protocol(ARP)мҷҖ Neighbor Discovery Protocol(NDP) мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкё°
text:
## L2 Announcements м„Өм •

- Cilium / L2 Announcements(L2 Aware LB) (Beta)

- 1.18.2 лІ„м „ кё°мӨҖмңјлЎң IPv6/NDPлҘј м§Җмӣҗн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
- н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ Nodeк°Җ лӘЁл“  ARP мҡ”мІӯмқ„ мҲҳмӢ н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- нҠёлһҳн”Ҫмқҙ л№„лҢҖм№ӯм ҒмңјлЎң нқҗлҘј мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
- service.spec.externalTrafficPolicy: LocalмҷҖ н•Ёк»ҳ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ м—ҶмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

``yaml title="cilium-values.yaml"
l2announcements:
 enabled: true

# externalIPs:
# enabled: true

kubeProxyReplacement: "true"
k8sServiceHost: auto
k8sServicePort: auto
`

- k8sServiceHost: auto|
 - auto: cluster-info ConfigMapм—җм„ң API м„ңлІ„ мЈјмҶҢлҘј к°Җм ёмҳөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - : API м„ңлІ„ мЈјмҶҢлҘј м§Ғм ‘ м§Җм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - Node Local DNSлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ° localhostлЎң м„Өм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- k8sServicePort: auto|
 - auto: cluster-info ConfigMapм—җм„ң API м„ңлІ„ нҸ¬нҠёлҘј к°Җм ёмҳөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - : API м„ңлІ„ нҸ¬нҠёлҘј м§Ғм ‘ м§Җм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

### лҰ¬лҚ” м„ м¶ң

ARP/NDP мһ‘лҸҷ л°©мӢқ мғҒ IPлӢ№ н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ MAC мЈјмҶҢл§Ң м ҖмһҘн•ҳлҜҖлЎң нҠёлһҳн”Ҫмқ„ л°ӣкё°мң„н•ң лҰ¬лҚ”лҘј м„ м¶ңн•ҙм•јн•©лӢҲлӢӨ. CiliumмқҖ мқҙлҘј мң„н•ҙ Kubernetesмқҳ Lease л©”м»ӨлӢҲмҰҳмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`yaml title="cilium-values.yaml"
k8sClientRateLimit:
 qps: 5
 burst: 10

l2announcements:
 leaseDuration: 15s
 leaseRenewDeadline: 5s
 leaseRetryPeriod: 2s
`
