title: Linting & Formatting
text:
## ruff

``shell
poetry add --group dev ruff
`

`shell
python3 -m pip install ruff
`

- https://docs.astral.sh/ruff/configuration/

`toml title="pyproject.toml"
[tool.ruff]
exclude = [
 ".bzr",
 ".direnv",
 ".eggs",
 ".git",
 ".git-rewrite",
 ".hg",
 ".ipynb_checkpoints",
 ".mypy_cache",
 ".nox",
 ".pants.d",
 ".pyenv",
 ".pytest_cache",
 ".pytype",
 ".ruff_cache",
 ".svn",
 ".tox",
 ".venv",
 ".vscode",
 "__pypackages__",
 "_build",
 "buck-out",
 "build",
 "dist",
 "node_modules",
 "site-packages",
 "venv",
]

line-length = 120
indent-width = 4

[tool.ruff.lint]
select = ["E4", "E7", "E9", "F", "I"]
ignore = []

fixable = ["ALL"]
unfixable = []

dummy-variable-rgx = "^(_+|(_+[a-zA-Z0-9_]*[a-zA-Z0-9]+?))$"

[tool.ruff.format]
quote-style = "double"
indent-style = "space"
skip-magic-trailing-comma = false
line-ending = "auto"
`

`shell
ruff check --fix **/*.py
`

`shell
ruff format **/*.py
`

### inline мҳӨлҘҳ л¬ҙмӢң

л¶Җл¶„м ҒмңјлЎңл§Ң л¬ҙмӢңн•ҳкі  мӢ¶мқҖ кІҪмҡ°м—җлҠ” м—җлҹ¬к°Җ л°ңмғқн•ҳлҠ” мӨ„м—җ # noqa or # noqa: мЈјм„қмқ„ м¶”к°Җн•ҳл©ҙ лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

from logging import * # noqa: F403
`

poetry add --group dev mypy

## pylint, black, isort

### pylint

`shell
poetry add --group dev pylint
`

`shell
python3 -m pip install pylint
`

`shell
pylint --generate-toml-config >> pyproject.toml
`

`toml title="pyproject.toml"
[tool.pylint.main]

ignore-patterns = ["^\\.#", ".*_pb2.pyi?"]

[tool.pylint."messages control"]

disable = [
 "bad-inline-option",
 "bare-except",
 "broad-exception-caught",
 "deprecated-pragma",
 "file-ignored",
 "invalid-name",
 "line-too-long",
 "locally-disabled",
 "missing-class-docstring",
 "missing-function-docstring",
 "missing-module-docstring",
 "raw-checker-failed",
 "suppressed-message",
 "too-few-public-methods",
 "too-many-arguments",
 "too-many-return-statements",
 "useless-suppression",
 "use-implicit-booleaness-not-comparison-to-string",
 "use-implicit-booleaness-not-comparison-to-zero",
 "use-symbolic-message-instead",
]
`

`shell
pylint **/*.py
`

#### inline мҳӨлҘҳ л¬ҙмӢң

л¶Җл¶„м ҒмңјлЎңл§Ң л¬ҙмӢңн•ҳкі  мӢ¶мқҖ кІҪмҡ°м—җлҠ” м—җлҹ¬к°Җ л°ңмғқн•ҳлҠ” мӨ„м—җ # pylint: disable= мЈјм„қмқ„ м¶”к°Җн•ҳл©ҙ лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`python
a._b = 1 # pylint: disable=protected-access
`

### black

`shell
poetry add --group dev black
`

`shell
python3 -m pip install black
`

`shell
black **/*.py
`

`toml title="pyproject.toml"
[tool.black]
exclude = '''
/(
 \.eggs
 | \.git
 | \.hg
 | \.mypy_cache
 | \.nox
 | \.tox
 | \.venv
 | _build
 | buck-out
 | build
 | dist
)/
'''
include = '\.pyi?$'
line-length = 100
`

### isort

`shell
poetry add --group dev isort
`

`shell
python3 -m pip install isort
`

`shell
isort --profile black **/*.py
`

- https://pycqa.github.io/isort/docs/configuration/options.html

`toml title="pyproject.toml"
[tool.isort]
line_length = 100
profile = "black"
skip_gitignore = true
multi_line_output = 3
``

# Configuration file for the Sphinx documentation builder.

copyright = "2021, "
author =

release = "0.0.1"

# extensions coming with Sphinx (named 'sphinx.ext.*') or your custom
# ones.

extensions = [
 "myst_parser",
 "sphinx.ext.autodoc",

]

autodoc_class_signature = "separated"

autodoc_mock_imports = []

napoleon_google_docstring = True

napoleon_include_private_with_doc = True
napoleon_include_special_with_doc = True
napoleon_use_admonition_for_examples = False
napoleon_use_admonition_for_notes = False
napoleon_use_admonition_for_references = False
napoleon_use_ivar = False
napoleon_use_param = False
napoleon_use_rtype = False
napoleon_preprocess_types = False
napoleon_type_aliases = None
napoleon_attr_annotations = True

rinoh_documents = [
 {
 "doc": "index",
 "target": f"{project}",
 # "logo": None,

 }
]

# https://github.com/mgaitan/sphinxcontrib-mermaid
mermaid_output_format = "raw"
mermaid_params = [
 "--theme",
 "forest",
 "--width",
 "600",
 "--backgroundColor",
 "transparent",
]

# Add any paths that contain templates here, relative to this directory.
templates_path = []

# List of patterns, relative to source directory, that match files and
# directories to ignore when looking for source files.
# This pattern also affects html_static_path and html_extra_path.
exclude_patterns = []

source_suffix = {
 ".rst": "restructuredtext",
 ".txt": "markdown",
 ".md": "markdown",
}

# -- Options for HTML output -------------------------------------------------

# The theme to use for HTML and HTML Help pages. See the documentation for
# a list of builtin themes.
html_theme = "sphinx_rtd_theme"

# Add any paths that contain custom static files (such as style sheets) here,
# relative to this directory. They are copied after the builtin static files,
# so a file named "default.css" will overwrite the builtin "default.css".
html_static_path = []
`

title: React Query useMutation
text:
## useMutation

useMutationмқҖ Create/Update/Delete мІҳлҹј м„ңлІ„ мғҒнғңлҘј ліҖкІҪн•ҳлҠ” мһ‘м—…мқ„ мҲҳн–үн•ҳлҠ”лҚ° мӮ¬мҡ©лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

- https://react-query-v3.tanstack.com/reference/useMutation

``ts

const mutation = useMutation({
 mutationFn, // (variables: TVariables) => Promise
 cacheTime,
 mutationKey,
 networkMode,
 onError, // (err: TError, variables: TVariables, context?: TContext) => Promise | unknown
 onMutate, // (variables: TVariables) => Promise | TContext | void
 onSettled, // (data: TData, error: TError, variables: TVariables, context?: TContext) => Promise | unknown
 onSuccess, // (data: TData, variables: TVariables, context?: TContext) => Promise | unknown
 retry,
 retryDelay,
 useErrorBoundary,
 meta,
});

const {
 data,
 error,
 isError,
 isIdle,
 isLoading,
 isPaused,
 isSuccess,
 failureCount,
 failureReason,
 mutate,
 mutateAsync,
 reset,
 status,
} = mutation;

mutation.mutate(variables, {
 localOnError, // (err: TError, variables: TVariables, context: TContext | undefined) => void
 localOnSettled, // (data: TData | undefined, error: TError | null, variables: TVariables, context: TContext | undefined) => void
 localOnSuccess, // (data: TData, variables: TVariables, context: TContext) => void
});
`

- mutation.mutateлҘј нҳём¶ңн•ҳл©ҙ onMutate -\> mutationFn -> ((onSuccess -\> localOnSuccess) || (onError -\> localOnError)) -> onSettled -\> localOnSettled` мҲңмңјлЎң мӢӨн–үлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

title: React Query useQuery
text:
## useQuery

- https://tanstack.com/query/latest/docs/react/reference/useQuery

``ts

const query = useQuery({
 queryKey, // unknown[]
 queryFn, // (context: QueryFunctionContext) => Promise
 cacheTime,
 enabled,
 networkMode,
 initialData,
 initialDataUpdatedAt,
 keepPreviousData,
 meta,
 notifyOnChangeProps,
 onError,
 onSettled,
 onSuccess,
 placeholderData,
 queryKeyHashFn,
 refetchInterval,
 refetchIntervalInBackground,
 refetchOnMount,
 refetchOnReconnect,
 refetchOnWindowFocus,
 retry,
 retryOnMount,
 retryDelay,
 select,
 staleTime,
 structuralSharing,
 suspense,
 useErrorBoundary,
});

const {
 data,
 dataUpdatedAt,
 error,
 errorUpdateCount,
 errorUpdatedAt,
 failureCount,
 failureReason,
 fetchStatus,
 isError, // status === "error"
 isFetched,
 isFetchedAfterMount,
 isFetching,
 isInitialLoading,
 isLoading, // status === "loading"
 isLoadingError,
 isPaused,
 isPlaceholderData,
 isPreviousData,
 isRefetchError,
 isRefetching,
 isStale,
 isSuccess, // status === "success"
 refetch,
 remove,
 status,
} = query;
`

## Query Key

- https://tanstack.com/query/latest/docs/react/guides/query-keys

мҝјлҰ¬лҠ” queryKeyлҘј кё°л°ҳмңјлЎң мәҗмӢұмқ„ кҙҖлҰ¬н•©лӢҲлӢӨ. л”°лқјм„ң к°ҷмқҖ queryFnмқ„ к°ҖмЎҢлҚ”лқјлҸ„ queryKeyк°Җ лӢӨлҘҙл©ҙ лӢӨлҘё мҝјлҰ¬лЎң м·Ёкёүлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

queryKeyмқҳ кі мң м„ұмқҖ л°°м—ҙ лӮҙмқҳ м•„мқҙн…ңм—җ мқҳн•ҙ кІ°м •лҗҳл©°, м•„мқҙн…ңмқҖ к°ҷлҚ”лқјлҸ„ мҲңм„ңк°Җ лӢӨлҘҙл©ҙ лӢӨлҘё кІғмңјлЎң к°„мЈјн•©лӢҲлӢӨ. лӢЁ, м•„мқҙн…ңмқҙ к°қмІҙмқё кІҪмҡ° к°қмІҙ лӮҙмқҳ нӮӨ мҲңм„ңлҠ” кі л Өлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

л”°лқјм„ң м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ кІҪмҡ° лӘЁл‘җ к°ҷмқҖ queryKeyлЎң м·Ёкёүлҗҳл©°

`ts
useQuery({ queryKey: ['todos', { status, page }], ... })
useQuery({ queryKey: ['todos', { page, status }], ...})
useQuery({ queryKey: ['todos', { page, status, other: undefined }], ... })
`

м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ кІҪмҡ°лҠ” лӘЁл‘җ лӢӨлҘё queryKeyлЎң м·Ёкёүлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`ts
useQuery({ queryKey: ['todos', status, page], ... })
useQuery({ queryKey: ['todos', page, status], ...})
useQuery({ queryKey: ['todos', undefined, page, status], ...})
`

title: SvelteKit Routing
text:
## Routing

- https://kit.svelte.dev/docs/routing

SvelteKitмқҖ л””л үнҶ лҰ¬ кө¬мЎ°лҘј кё°л°ҳмңјлЎң лқјмҡ°нҢ… н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

``shell
src/routes/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ +layout.ts # or +layout.server.ts
в”ңв”Җв”Җ +layout.svelte
в”ңв”Җв”Җ +page.ts # or +page.server.ts
в”ңв”Җв”Җ +page.svelte # /
в”ңв”Җв”Җ a/
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ +layout.ts
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ +layout.svelte
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ +page.ts
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ +page.svelte # /a
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ [b]/
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ +layout.ts
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ +layout.svelte
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ +page.ts
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ +page.svelte # /a/[b]
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ c/
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ +layout.ts
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ +layout.svelte
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ +page.ts
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ +page.svelte # /a/[b]/c
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ ...
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ ...
в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ ...
в””в”Җв”Җ ...
`

- +page.svelte: лқјмҡ°нҢ… кІҪлЎңм—җ н•ҙлӢ№н•ҳлҠ” нҺҳмқҙм§ҖлҘј л ҢлҚ”л§Ғ н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- +page[.server].ts: +page.svelteк°Җ л ҢлҚ”л§Ғ лҗҳкё° м „м—җ н•„мҡ”н•ң лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј к°Җм ёмҳӨлҠ” лЎңм§Ғмқ„ мһ‘м„ұн•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
- +layout.svelte: н•ҙлӢ№ нҢҢмқјмқҙ мһҲлҠ” лқјмҡ°нҢ… кІҪлЎңлҘј нҸ¬н•Ён•ҳм—¬ н•ҳмң„ кІҪлЎңм—җ л°ҳліөм ҒмңјлЎң лӮҳнғҖлӮҳлҠ” мҡ”мҶҢлҘј л ҢлҚ”л§Ғ н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- +layout[.server].ts: +layout.svelteк°Җ л ҢлҚ”л§Ғ лҗҳкё° м „м—җ н•„мҡ”н•ң лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј к°Җм ёмҳӨлҠ” лЎңм§Ғмқ„ мһ‘м„ұн•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - +page.[server.].ts`мҷҖ лӢӨлҘё м җмқҖ л¶ҖлӘЁмқҳ л Ҳмқҙм•„мӣғ лҚ°мқҙн„°м—җ мғҲлЎңмҡҙ лҚ°мқҙн„°к°Җ лі‘н•©лҗңлӢӨлҠ” м җмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

## Scene

SceneмқҖ Scene Graphмқҳ лЈЁнҠё л…ёл“ңлЎң background, fog л“ұмқ„ м„Өм •н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

SceneмқҖ Mesh, Light, Group, Object3D, Camera к°ҷмқҖ к°қмІҙлҘј мһҗмӢқ л…ёл“ңлЎң к°Җм§Ҳ мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

## Camera

CameraлҠ” мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗк°Җ Sceneмқ„ ліҙлҠ” мӢңм җмқ„ кІ°м •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ. CameraлҠ” Scene Graphм—җ мҶҚн•  мҲҳлҸ„ мҶҚн•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡмқ„ мҲҳлҸ„ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. Cameraк°Җ Scene Graphм—җ мҶҚн•ҙм„ң м–ҙл–Ө к°қмІҙмқҳ мһҗмӢқл…ёл“ңк°Җ лҗҳл©ҙ, н•ҙлӢ№ к°қмІҙмқҳ мўҢн‘ңкі„лҘј кё°мӨҖмңјлЎң м№ҙл©”лқјмқҳ мӢңм җмқ„ м„Өм •н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

title: vcpkg Library л§Ңл“Өкё°
text:
## мҙҲкё°нҷ”

vcpkg Registryм—җ PortлЎң мқёмӢқ к°ҖлҠҘн•ң л№Ңл“ң мӢңмҠӨн…ңмқҖ MSBuild, CMake, GN л“ұмқҙ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

мқҳмЎҙм„ұ м„Өм№ҳлҘј мң„н•ҙ vcpkgмҷҖ CMakeлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ° vcpkg нҷҳкІҪ м„Өм •мқ„ м°ёкі н•ҙмЈјм„ёмҡ”.

## CMake

``cmake title="CMakeLists.txt"
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.15)

project(

 VERSION
 DESCRIPTION ""
 HOMEPAGE_URL ""
 LANGUAGES CXX
)
string(TOLOWER ${PROJECT_NAME} PROJECT_NAME_LOWER)

include(CMakePackageConfigHelpers)
include(GNUInstallDirs)

#
# лқјмқҙлёҢлҹ¬лҰ¬ м„Өм •
#

add_library(
 ${PROJECT_NAME_LOWER}
 # ...
)

# ...

#
# install м„Өм •
#

install(
 TARGETS ${PROJECT_NAME_LOWER}
 EXPORT ${PROJECT_NAME}Targets
)

# ...

# ${PROJECT_NAME}Targets.cmake
install(
 EXPORT ${PROJECT_NAME}Targets
 NAMESPACE ${PROJECT_NAME}::
 DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_DATADIR}/${PROJECT_NAME_LOWER}
)

#
# find_packageлҘј мң„н•ң м„Өм •
#

configure_package_config_file(
 "cmake/${PROJECT_NAME}Config.cmake.in"
 "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/${PROJECT_NAME}Config.cmake"
 INSTALL_DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_DATADIR}/${PROJECT_NAME_LOWER}
 NO_SET_AND_CHECK_MACRO
)

write_basic_package_version_file(
 "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/${PROJECT_NAME}ConfigVersion.cmake"
 VERSION
 COMPATIBILITY SameMajorVersion
)

install(
 FILES
 "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/${PROJECT_NAME}Config.cmake"
 "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/${PROJECT_NAME}ConfigVersion.cmake"
 DESTINATION
 ${CMAKE_INSTALL_DATADIR}/${PROJECT_NAME_LOWER}
)
`

# ...

include("${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/Targets.cmake")
check_required_components()
``

headings: Source кІҪлЎңлҘј SOURCE_PATHлЎң м„Өм •н•ң кІғмңјлЎң к°Җм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
text:
## Port

- vcpkgлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ лқјмқҙлёҢлҹ¬лҰ¬ нҢЁнӮӨм§•

PortлҠ” нҢЁнӮӨм§Җ мғқм„ұмқ„ мң„н•ң л№Ңл“ң л ҲмӢңн”јмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

### Port нҢҢмқј л§Ңл“Өкё°

- vcpkg лІ„м „

``json title="tmp_ports//vcpkg.json"
{
 "name": "",
 "version": "",
 "description": "",
 "homepage": "",
 "dependencies": [
 {
 "name": "vcpkg-cmake",
 "host": true
 },
 {
 "name": "vcpkg-cmake-config",
 "host": true
 }
 ]
}
`

- version
 - (0|[1-9]\d*)(\.(0|[1-9]\d*))*
 - 0 \/vcpkg.json
`

`cmake title="tmp_ports//portfile.cmake"
#
# Source лӢӨмҡҙлЎңл“ң
# vcpkg_from_git
# vcpkg_from_github
# vcpkg_download_distfile + vcpkg_extract_source_archive
# ...
#
# Source кІҪлЎңлҘј SOURCE_PATHлЎң м„Өм •н•ң кІғмңјлЎң к°Җм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
#

vcpkg_cmake_configure(
 SOURCE_PATH "${SOURCE_PATH}"
)
vcpkg_cmake_install()
vcpkg_cmake_config_fixup()

vcpkg_install_copyright(
 FILE_LIST "${SOURCE_PATH}/LICENSE"
)

file(REMOVE_RECURSE "${CURRENT_PACKAGES_DIR}/debug/include")
`

- vcpkg_cmake_configure
 - cmake лӘ…л №м–ҙлЎң л№Ңл“ң мӢңмҠӨн…ңмқ„ мғқм„ұн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - SOURCE_PATH
 - -S
 - CMakeLists.txt нҢҢмқјмқҙ мһҲлҠ” кІҪлЎңлҘј м„Өм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - e.g., "${SOURCE_PATH}", "${SOURCE_PATH}/"
- vcpkg_cmake_install
 - cmake лӘ…л №м–ҙлЎң л№Ңл“ңмҷҖ м„Өм№ҳлҘј мҲҳн–үн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- vcpkg_cmake_config_fixup

### Source лӢӨмҡҙлЎңл“ң н•ЁмҲҳ

#### Git

`cmake
vcpkg_from_git(
 OUT_SOURCE_PATH SOURCE_PATH
 URL
 REF
 HEAD_REF main
)
`

- vcpkg_from_git
 - git лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҙм„ң мҶҢмҠӨлҘј лӢӨмҡҙлЎңл“ңн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - OUT_SOURCE_PATH SOURCE_PATH
 - SOURCE_PATH ліҖмҲҳм—җ лӢӨмҡҙлЎңл“ңн•ң мҶҢмҠӨ кІҪлЎңлҘј м ҖмһҘн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - URL
 - REF
 - HEAD_REF

#### GitHub

- GitHub лҰ¬нҸ¬м§ҖнҶ лҰ¬ нҢЁнӮӨм§•

`cmake title="tmp_ports//portfile.cmake"
vcpkg_from_github(
 OUT_SOURCE_PATH SOURCE_PATH
 REPO /
 REF
 SHA512 0
 HEAD_REF main
 # AUTHORIZATION_TOKEN $ENV{GITHUB_TOKEN}
)
`

- vcpkg_from_github
 - curl https://github.com/${REPO}/archive/${REF}.tar.gz лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҙм„ң мҶҢмҠӨлҘј лӢӨмҡҙлЎңл“ңн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - OUT_SOURCE_PATH SOURCE_PATH
 - SOURCE_PATH ліҖмҲҳм—җ лӢӨмҡҙлЎңл“ңн•ң мҶҢмҠӨ кІҪлЎңлҘј м ҖмһҘн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - REF
 - ${VERSION} ліҖмҲҳлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ м„Өм •н•ҳлҠ” кІғмқ„ м¶”мІңн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - e.g., ${VERSION}, v${VERSION}
 - SHA512
 - мҶҢмҠӨ нҷ•мқёмқ„ мң„н•ң н•ҙмӢңк°’мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - 0мқ„ м„Өм •н•ҳкі , м„Өм№ҳ н…ҢмҠӨнҠёлҘј н•ҳл©ҙ м„Өм •н•ҙм•јн•ҳлҠ” н•ҙмӢңк°’мқ„ м–»мқ„ мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - HEAD_REF
 - AUTHORIZATION_TOKEN
 - Private Repositoryмқҳ кІҪмҡ° м ‘к·јн•ҳкё° мң„н•ң нҶ нҒ°мқ„ м„Өм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - мқёмҰқмқҙ н•„мҡ”н•ң кІҪмҡ° vcpkg_from_gitмқ„ м¶”мІңн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

- delegate_to:
 - мһ‘м—…мқ„ мҲҳн–үн•  нҳёмҠӨнҠёлҘј м§Җм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - localhostлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©ҙ Control Nodeм—җм„ң мһ‘м—…мқ„ мҲҳн–үн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

inventory_hostnameмқ„ м ңмҷён•ң лӘЁл“  ліҖмҲҳлҠ” мӢӨм ң мһ‘м—…мқ„ мҲҳн–үн•ҳлҠ” нҳёмҠӨнҠё(мһ‘м—…мқ„ мң„мһ„л°ӣмқҖ нҳёмҠӨнҠё)мқҳ ліҖмҲҳлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ. л”°лқјм„ң мһ‘м—…мқ„ мң„мһ„н•ң нҳёмҠӨнҠёмқҳ ліҖмҲҳлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкі  мӢ¶мқҖ кІҪмҡ° hostvars[inventory_hostname]['varname']мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

## delegate_facts

мһ‘м—…мқ„ мң„мһ„л°ӣмқҖ нҳёмҠӨнҠём—җм„ң factsк°Җ мғқм„ұлҗҳлҚ”лқјлҸ„ мһ‘м—…мқ„ мң„мһ„н•ң нҳёмҠӨнҠём—җ н• лӢ№лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ. мһ‘м—…мқ„ мҲҳн–үн•ң нҳёмҠӨнҠём—җ factsк°Җ н• лӢ№лҗҳлҸ„лЎқ н•ҳл Өл©ҙ delegate_facts: trueлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©ҙ лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

## run_onceмҷҖ register

мһ‘м—… мғҒнҷ©мқ„ к°Җм •н•ҙліҙкІ мҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

- Control Node AмҷҖ Managed Node a, b, c к°Җ мЎҙмһ¬н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- Aм—җкІҢ мһ‘м—…мқ„ мң„мһ„н•ң кІ°кіјлҘј мқҙнӣ„ мһ‘м—…м—җм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҙм•јн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- мһ‘м—…мқҳ кІ°кіјлҠ” мҲҳн–ү нҡҹмҲҳм—җ мғҒкҙҖм—Ҷмқҙ лҸҷмқјн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

мқҙл•Ң, run_once: trueлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©ҙ нҳёмҠӨнҠё мҲҳм—җ мғҒкҙҖ м—Ҷмқҙ 1 нҡҢ мӢӨн–үлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ. мқҙ л•Ң, register: `мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©ҙ мһ‘м—…мқ„ мң„мһ„н•ң нҳёмҠӨнҠё мҷём—җ лӢӨлҘё нҳёмҠӨнҠёл“Өм—җлҸ„ ліҖмҲҳмҷҖ н•ҙлӢ№ к°’мқҙ лҸҷмқјн•ҳкІҢ м„Өм •лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

text:
## Inventory

- https://docs.ansible.com/ansible-core/2.16/inventory_guide/intro_inventory.html

inventoryлҠ” ansibleмқҙ кҙҖлҰ¬н•  лҢҖмғҒмқ„ м •мқҳн•ң кІғмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. inventoryлҘј м„Өм •н•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡм•ҳмқ„ л•Ң кё°ліём ҒмңјлЎң мӮ¬мҡ©лҗҳлҠ” кІғмқҖ /etc/ansible/hosts нҢҢмқјмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

inventoryлҠ” лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷмқҖ нҳ•мӢқмңјлЎң мһ‘м„ұн•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

``yaml title="inventory/cluster/hosts.yaml"
all:
 hosts:
 [:]:
 [: ]
 [: ]

:
 children:
 :
 vars:
 [: ]
`

-
 - кё°ліё к·ёлЈ№мңјлЎң allкіј ungroupedк°Җ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - all
 - лӘЁл“  нҳёмҠӨнҠём—җ лҢҖн•ң к·ёлЈ№мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - м„ м–ён•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡм•„лҸ„ лӘЁл“  к·ёлЈ№мқ„ childrenмңјлЎң к°Җм§Җкі  мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - ungrouped
 - allмқҙмҷёмқҳ к·ёлЈ№м—җ мҶҚн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмқҖ нҳёмҠӨнҠём—җ лҢҖн•ң к·ёлЈ№мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - м„ м–ён•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡм•„лҸ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  л•Ң мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң нҳёмҠӨнҠёлҘј м°ҫмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - hosts: к·ёлЈ№м—җ мҶҚн•ҳлҠ” нҳёмҠӨнҠёлҘј м •мқҳн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 -
 -
 - https://docs.ansible.com/ansible-core/2.16/inventory_guide/intro_inventory.html#connecting-to-hosts-behavioral-inventory-parameters
 - лӘЁл‘җ мҳөм…ҳмқҙлҜҖлЎң н•„мҡ”н•ң кІғл§Ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - ansible_host: лҢҖмӢ  мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мЈјмҶҢмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - ansible_port: лҢҖмӢ  мӮ¬мҡ©н•  нҸ¬нҠёмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - кё°ліёк°’: 22
 - ansible_user: нҳёмҠӨнҠём—җ м ‘мҶҚн•  л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - ansible_password: нҳёмҠӨнҠём—җ м ‘мҶҚн•  л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•  л№„л°ҖлІҲнҳёмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - vaultлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ м•”нҳёнҷ”н•ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - ansible_ssh_private_key_file: нҳёмҠӨнҠём—җ м ‘мҶҚн•  л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•  SSH к°ңмқёнӮӨ нҢҢмқјмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - ansible_become_user: к¶Ңн•ң мғҒмҠ№мқ„ мң„н•ҙ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - host лі„лЎң лӢӨлҘё мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҙм•ј н•  кІҪмҡ°м—җ мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

text:
## Variable

``shell
ansible-vault encrypt_string --vault-id [] [value]
`

- --vault-id []
 - @prompt, @prompt: н„°лҜёл„җм—җм„ң passwordлҘј мһ…л Ҙл°ӣмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - , @: нҢҢмқјм—җм„ң passwordлҘј мқҪм–ҙмҳөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - ANSIBLE_VAULT_IDENTITY_LIST=[]: --vault-id кё°ліё к°’мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - ANSIBLE_VAULT_IDENTITY=default: кё°ліё к°’мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - ANSIBLE_VAULT_PASSWORD_FILE=: password нҢҢмқј кё°ліё к°’мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
-
 - --name : keyлҘј м§Җм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ. м„Өм •н•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡмңјл©ҙ н„°лҜёл„җм—җм„ң мһ…л Ҙл°ӣмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

title: Apptainer for HPC
text:
## м„Өм№ҳ

### мӮ¬м „ мҡ”кө¬ мӮ¬н•ӯ

``shell
sudo yum update -y \
&& sudo yum groupinstall -y 'Development Tools' \
&& sudo yum install -y \
 openssl-devel \
 libuuid-devel \
 libseccomp-devel \
 wget \
 squashfs-tools \
 cryptsetup
`

or

`shell
sudo apt-get update -y \
&& sudo apt-get install -y \
 build-essential \
 uuid-dev \
 libgpgme-dev \
 squashfs-tools \
 libseccomp-dev \
 wget \
 pkg-config \
 git \
 cryptsetup-bin
`

Golang is required to build the apptainer.

### Apptainer

`shell

`

`shell
sudo mkdir -p /opt/apptainer/$APPTAINER_VERSION
`

`shell
git clone https://github.com/apptainer/apptainer.git -b v$APPTAINER_VERSION --depth 1 \
&& cd apptainer
`

`shell
./mconfig --prefix=/opt/apptainer/$APPTAINER_VERSION \
&& make -C builddir \
&& sudo make -C builddir install
`

--without-suid мҳөм…ҳмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ м„Өм№ҳн•ҳл©ҙ setuid к¶Ңн•ңмқҙ мІҳмқҢл¶Җн„° м—ҶлҠ” лҢҖмӢ  /opt/apptainer/$APPTAINER_VERSION нҸҙлҚ” м „мІҙлҘј лӢӨлҘё кіімңјлЎң мҳ®кё°лҚ”лқјлҸ„ мӢӨн–үм—җ л¬ём ңк°Җ м—ҶмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. libexec/apptainer/bin/starter-suidк°Җ setuid кҙҖл Ё нҢҢмқјмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

./mconfig --help

`shell

`

к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳл©ҙ м»ҙн“ЁнҠё л…ёл“ңмқҳ лЎңм»¬ л””мҠӨнҒ¬м—җ м„Өм№ҳн•ҳлҠ” кІғмқҙ мўӢмңјлӮҳ л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬ мң„м№ҳм—җ м„Өм№ҳлҗҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ° --localstatedir мҳөм…ҳмқ„ нҶөн•ҙ м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳ мӢӨн–үмӢң н•„мҡ”н•ң лЈЁнҠё нҢҢмқј мӢңмҠӨн…ң, мҳӨлІ„л Ҳмқҙ, л°”мқёл”© л§ҲмҡҙнҠё л“ұмңјлЎң мӮ¬мҡ©лҗ  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” лЎңм»¬ мҠӨнҶ лҰ¬м§ҖлҘј мһЎм•„мЈјлҠ” кІғмқҙ мўӢмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

## Uninstall

`shell
sudo rm -r /opt/apptainer/$APPTAINER_VERSION
`

## apptainer.conf

- https://github.com/apptainer/apptainer/blob/main/pkg/util/apptainerconf/config.go

### Bind Paths and Mounts

Apptainerмқҳ нҠ№м§• мӨ‘ н•ҳлӮҳлҠ” apptainer run, apptainer exec, apptainer shell apptainer instance start лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•  л•Ң, HostмҷҖ Containerк°Җ кё°ліём ҒмңјлЎң кіөмң н•ҳлҠ” кІҪлЎңк°Җ мЎҙмһ¬н•ңлӢӨлҠ” кІғмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

`conf title="apptainer.conf"
mount =
`

кё°ліё м„Өм •м—җм„ң л°”мқёл”© лҗҳлҠ” мӢңмҠӨн…ң кІҪлЎңлҠ” м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

- $HOME
- /sys:/sys
- /proc:/proc
- /tmp:/tmp
- /var/tmp:/var/tmp
- /etc/resolv.conf:/etc/resolv.conf
- /etc/passwd:/etc/passwd
- $PWD

мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗ м •мқҳм—җ мқҳн•ң л°”мқёл”©мқҖ м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ л°©лІ•мңјлЎң м¶”к°Җлҗ  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

`conf title="apptainer.conf"
bind path =
bind path =
`

- --bind Host[:Container[:Option]]
- APPTAINER_BIND=Host[:Container[:Option]]
- мҳөм…ҳмқ„ м—¬лҹ¬ лІҲ м“°кұ°лӮҳ, ,лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ м—¬лҹ¬ к°ңмқҳ к·ңм№ҷмқ„ м§Җм •н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
- Containerк°Җ м •н•ҙм ё мһҲм§Җ м•ҠмқҖ кІҪмҡ° HostмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ кІҪлЎңлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ңлӢӨкі  к°Җм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- OptionмңјлЎңлҠ” ro(read only)мҷҖ rw(read write, default)лҘј м§Җм •н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

### Loop devices

`conf title="apptainer.conf"
max loop devices =
`

`conf title="apptainer.conf"
shared loop devices =
`

Linux Containerм•Ҳм—җм„ң apptainerлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•  л•Ң, лі‘л ¬лЎң мӢӨн–үлҗҳлҠ” Containerмқҳ мҲҳк°Җ л§Һм•„м§Җл©ҙ loop deviceк°Җ л¶ҖмЎұн•ҙм§Ҳ мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

## Build Test

`shell
apptainer pull docker://ubuntu:20.04
`

`shell
apptainer build --sandbox ubuntu ubuntu_20.04.sif
`

`shell
sudo which apptainer shell --writable ubuntu
`

apptainer shell лӘ…л №мңјлЎң м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳм—җ м ‘мҶҚн•ҙм„ң мһ‘м—…мқ„ н•  л•Ң, HostмҷҖ Containerк°„ кіөмң лҗҳлҠ” кІҪлЎңм—җ мЈјмқҳн•ҙм•јн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

## Definition file

`shell
Bootstrap: localimage
From: ubuntu_20.04.sif
Stage: build

%setup
 touch /file1
 touch ${APPTAINER_ROOTFS}/file2

%files
 /file1
 /file1 /opt

%environment
 export LISTEN_PORT=12345
 export LC_ALL=C

%post
 apt-get update && apt-get install -y netcat
 NOW=date
 echo "export NOW=\"${NOW}\"" >> $APPTAINER_ENVIRONMENT

%runscript
 echo "Container was created $NOW"
 echo "Arguments received: $*"
 exec echo "$@"

%startscript
 nc -lp $LISTEN_PORT

%test
 grep -q NAME=\"Ubuntu\" /etc/os-release
 if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
 echo "Container base is Ubuntu as expected."
 else
 echo "Container base is not Ubuntu."
 exit 1
 fi

%labels
 Author hyeonki
 Version v0.0.1

%help
 This is a demo container used to illustrate a def file that uses all
 supported sections.
`

`shell
sudo which apptainer build
``

`

- Podman

podmanмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ° м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ мӢңлҸ„н•ҙліј мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.(мӢӨн–үмқҙ м•Ҳлҗ  мҲҳ мһҲмңјлҜҖлЎң мЈјмқҳн•ҙмЈјм„ёмҡ”.)

`

### ConfigMap, SecretмңјлЎң кі„м • кҙҖлҰ¬

- https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/operator-manual/user-management/#local-usersaccounts

SSO м„Өм •мқҙ л¶ҖлӢҙмҠӨлҹ¬мҡҙ л§Өмҡ° мҶҢк·ңлӘЁ нҢҖмқҙлӮҳ к°ңмқё н”„лЎңм қнҠём—җм„ңлҠ” ConfigMap, SecretмңјлЎң кі„м •мқ„ кҙҖлҰ¬н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

``yaml title="argo-cd-values.yaml"
configs:
 cm:
 # argocd-cm ConfigMap

 accounts.: apiKey, login
 accounts..enabled: "true"
`

- apiKey: API мӮ¬мҡ©мқ„ мң„н•ң нҶ нҒ° мғқм„ұмқ„ н—Ҳмҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- login: UI лЎңк·ёмқёмқ„ н—Ҳмҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`yaml title="argo-cd-values.yaml"
configs:
 secret:
 # argocd-secret Secret

 extra:
 # м•”нҳёлҠ” bcrypt, cost 10мңјлЎң н•ҙмӢұлҗң к°’мқ„ м„Өм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 accounts..password: $2a$10$...
`

`shell
htpasswd -bnBC 10 '' '' | tr -d ':\n' | sed 's/^$2y/$2a/'
`

м•”нҳёлҠ” argocd м»Өл§Ёл“ңлЎң мғқм„ұн•ҳм—¬ л“ұлЎқн•  мҲҳлҸ„ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

`shell
argocd account update-password --account
`

### OIDC

- Argo CD Docs / Operator Manual / User Management / Overview # Existing OIDC Provider

argocd лӘ…л №м–ҙлЎң sso loginмқ„ н•ҳл Өл©ҙ PKCEлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ. http://localhost:8085/auth/callback лҰ¬лӢӨмқҙл үнҠё URLмқҙ мӮ¬мҡ©лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`yaml title="argo-cd-values.yaml"
global:
 # argo-cdмқҳ мҷёл¶Җ м ‘мҶҚ мЈјмҶҢмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 domain:

configs:
 cm:
 oidc.config: |
 name:
 issuer:
 clientID:
 clientSecret: $argo-cd-client-secret:oidc..clientSecret

 # Optional
 requestedScopes: ["openid", "profile", "email", "groups"]

 # Optional
 # https://connect2id.com/products/server/docs/guides/requesting-openid-claims#claims-parameter
 requestedIDTokenClaims:
 email:
 essential: true
 groups:
 essential: true
 values:
 -

 # Optional
 logoutURL: ?id_token_hint={{token}}&post_logout_redirect_uri={{logoutRedirectURL}}
`

- clientSecret: or $[:]
 - лҰ¬лӢӨмқҙл үнҠё URLлЎң /auth/callbackлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- enablePKCEAuthentication: true
 - PKCE Code Challenge MethodлЎң **S256**мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - лҰ¬лӢӨмқҙл үнҠё URLлЎң /pkce/verifyлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - PKCEлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©ҙ clientSecretк°Җ н•„мҡ”н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

`yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
 name: argo-cd-client-secret
 namespace: argo-cd
 labels:
 app.kubernetes.io/part-of: argocd # мқҙ labelмқҙ мһҲм–ҙм•ј м„Өм •мқҙ м Ғмҡ©лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
type: Opaque
stringData:
 oidc..clientSecret:
`

#### Keycloak

## Repository

- https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/operator-manual/declarative-setup/#repositories

repository Secretм—җ лӘЁл“  м •ліҙлҘј м„ м–ён•ҳлҠ” л°©мӢқкіј repository Secretм—җ type, urlл§Ң м„ м–ён•ҳкі  repo-creds Secretм—җ мқёмҰқ м •ліҙл§Ң м„ м–ён•ҳлҠ” л°©мӢқмқҙ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

### SSH

м•„лһҳ лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј нҶөн•ҙ SSH нӮӨлҘј мғқм„ұн•ң нӣ„, Public нӮӨлҘј GitHub SSH нӮӨм—җ м¶”к°Җн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

## Cluster

- https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/operator-manual/declarative-setup/#clusters

### External

мӣҗкІ©мңјлЎң м ңм–ҙн•ҳкі  мӢ¶мқҖ нҒҙлҹ¬мҠӨн„°м—җ м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ ServiceAccountлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҙмЈјм„ёмҡ”. мҳҲмӢңлҠ” Admin к¶Ңн•ңмқҙ л¶Җм—¬лҗң мғҒнғңмқҙкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ ліҙм•Ҳмқ„ мң„н•ҙ к¶Ңн•ңмқ„ м ңн•ңн•ҙм„ң л¶Җм—¬н•ҙмЈјм„ёмҡ”.

`yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
 name: argocd-manager
 namespace: kube-system
`

`yaml
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
 name: argocd-manager-role
rules:
 - apiGroups:
 - "*"
 resources:
 - "*"
 verbs:
 - "*"
 - nonResourceURLs:
 - "*"
 verbs:
 - "*"
`

`yaml
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
 name: argocd-manager-role-binding
roleRef:
 apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
 kind: ClusterRole
 name: argocd-manager-role
subjects:
 - kind: ServiceAccount
 name: argocd-manager
 namespace: kube-system
`

м„ңлІ„ URL, нҶ нҒ°, мқёмҰқм„ңлҘј к°Җм ёмҳөлӢҲлӢӨ.

`shell
kubectl config view --minify -o jsonpath='{.clusters[0].cluster.server}'
`

`shell
kubectl -n kube-system get secret $(kubectl -n kube-system get sa/argocd-manager -o jsonpath="{.secrets[0].name}") -o go-template="{{.data.token | base64decode}}"
`

`shell
kubectl -n kube-system get secret $(kubectl -n kube-system get sa/argocd-manager -o jsonpath="{.secrets[0].name}") -o jsonpath="{.data['ca\.crt']}"
`

Argo CDк°Җ м„Өм№ҳлҗң нҒҙлҹ¬мҠӨн„°м—җ м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ м ңм–ҙн•ҳкі мӢ¶мқҖ нҒҙлҹ¬мҠӨн„° м •ліҙлҘј м¶”к°Җн•ҙмЈјм„ёмҡ”.

`yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
 name: -cluster
 namespace: argo-cd
 labels:
 argocd.argoproj.io/secret-type: cluster
type: Opaque
stringData:
 name:
 server:
 config: |
 {
 "bearerToken": "",
 "tlsClientConfig": {
 "insecure": false,
 "caData": ""
 }
 }
`

 - group:

- sourceRepos
 - н•ҙлӢ№ AppProjectм—җм„ң н—Ҳмҡ©н•ҳлҠ” лҰ¬нҸ¬м§ҖнҶ лҰ¬ лӘ©лЎқмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - *мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©ҙ лӘЁл“  лҰ¬нҸ¬м§ҖнҶ лҰ¬лҘј н—Ҳмҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- destinations
 - н•ҙлӢ№ AppProjectм—җм„ң н—Ҳмҡ©н•ҳлҠ” нҒҙлҹ¬мҠӨн„° лӘ©лЎқмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - name
 - н—Ҳмҡ©н•  нҒҙлҹ¬мҠӨн„°мқҳ мқҙлҰ„мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - *мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©ҙ лӘЁл“  нҒҙлҹ¬мҠӨн„°лҘј н—Ҳмҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - namespace
 - н—Ҳмҡ©н•  л„Өмһ„мҠӨнҺҳмқҙмҠӨмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - *мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©ҙ лӘЁл“  л„Өмһ„мҠӨнҺҳмқҙмҠӨлҘј н—Ҳмҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - server
 - н—Ҳмҡ©н•  нҒҙлҹ¬мҠӨн„°мқҳ kube-apiserverмқҳ URLмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - *мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©ҙ лӘЁл“  нҒҙлҹ¬мҠӨн„°лҘј н—Ҳмҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- clusterResourceWhitelist
 - н•ҙлӢ№ AppProjectм—җм„ң н—Ҳмҡ©н•ҳлҠ” нҒҙлҹ¬мҠӨн„° мҠӨмҪ”н”„мқҳ лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨ лҰ¬мҠӨнҠёмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - group
 - н—Ҳмҡ©н•  лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨмқҳ к·ёлЈ№мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - *мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©ҙ лӘЁл“  к·ёлЈ№мқ„ н—Ҳмҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - kind
 - н—Ҳмҡ©н•  лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨмқҳ мў…лҘҳмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - *мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©ҙ лӘЁл“  мў…лҘҳлҘј н—Ҳмҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- namespaceResourceBlacklist
- namespaceResourceWhitelist
- roles

## Application

- https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/operator-manual/declarative-setup/#applications

`yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Application
metadata:
 name: -
 namespace: argo-cd
 labels:
 "": # мӣ№ UIм—җм„ң н•„н„°л§Ғмқ„ мң„н•ҙ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 finalizers:
 # мӮӯм ң мҡ”мІӯ мӢң н•ҳмң„м—җ мҶҚн•ң лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨл“Өмқ„ мӮӯм ңн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io
spec:
 project:
 sources: []
 destination:
 name:
 namespace:
 revisionHistoryLimit:
 syncPolicy:
 automated:
 prune: true
 selfHeal: true
`

- sources: []
 - repoURL:
 - targetRevision:
 - directory
 - User Guide: Directory
 - include:
 - л°°нҸ¬н•  лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨ нҢҢмқј нҢЁн„ҙмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - glob(*)лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - {,}мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - exclude:
 - recurse:
 - helm
 - Helm
- syncPolicy
 - automated
 - https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/user-guide/auto_sync/
 - prune: Gitм—җм„ң мӮӯм ңлҗң лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨлҘј нҒҙлҹ¬мҠӨн„°м—җм„ң мӮӯм ңн• м§Җ м—¬л¶ҖлҘј кІ°м •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - selfHeal: нҒҙлҹ¬мҠӨн„°м—җм„ң лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨлҘј ліҖкІҪн•ҳл©ҙ лӢӨмӢң Gitмқҳ мғҒнғңлЎң лҸҢлҰҙм§Җ м—¬л¶ҖлҘј кІ°м •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - syncOptions
 - https://argo-cd.readthedocs.io/en/stable/user-guide/sync-options/
 - RespectIgnoreDifferences=true: .spec.ignoreDifferencesм—җ лӘ…мӢңлҗң н•„л“ңмқҳ ліҖкІҪмӮ¬н•ӯмқ„ л¬ҙмӢңн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - к°ңлі„ лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨм—җ м Ғмҡ©

### Helm

- User Guide: Helm

argo-cdлҠ” м°ЁнҠёмқҳ apiVersionмқҙ v2лҚ”лқјлҸ„ v3лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ. v2лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл Өл©ҙ .spec.sources.helm.versionмқ„ v2лқјкі  лӘ…мӢңн•ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`yaml
spec:
 sources:
 - repoURL: git@github.com:/.git
 path: # Chart.yamlмқҙ мһҲлҠ” л””л үнҶ лҰ¬ кІҪлЎң
 targetRevision:
 helm:
 valueFiles:
 - /.yaml
`

м°ЁнҠёмҷҖ valuesк°Җ лӢӨлҘё лҰ¬нҸ¬м§ҖнҶ лҰ¬м—җ мһҲмқ„ кІҪмҡ° .spec.sourcesм—җ values мҶҢмҠӨлҘј м¶”к°Җн•ҳл©ҙ лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`yaml
spec:
 sources:
 - repoURL: git@github.com:/.git
 targetRevision:
 ref: values
 - repoURL:
 chart:
 targetRevision:
 helm:
 valueFiles:
 - $values//.yaml
``

title: GitHub Action Runner
text:
## Action Runner Controller

### м„Өм№ҳ

- https://docs.github.com/en/actions/hosting-your-own-runners/managing-self-hosted-runners-with-actions-runner-controller/quickstart-for-actions-runner-controller

- Chart GitHub Package List

``shell
helm pull oci://ghcr.io/actions/actions-runner-controller-charts/gha-runner-scale-set-controller \
 --version 0.9.1
`

`shell
helm show values oci://ghcr.io/actions/actions-runner-controller-charts/gha-runner-scale-set-controller \
 --version 0.9.1 \
gha-runner-scale-set-controller-0.9.1.yaml
`

`shell
helm template gha-controller gha-runner-scale-set-controller-0.9.1.tgz \
 -n github \
 -f gha-runner-scale-set-controller-values.yaml \
gha-controller.yaml
`

`shell
helm upgrade -i gha-controller gha-runner-scale-set-controller-0.9.1.tgz \
 --history-max 5 \
 -n github \
 -f gha-runner-scale-set-controller-values.yaml
`

### AutoscalingRunnerSet

#### мқёмҰқкҙҖл Ё мӨҖл№„

- https://docs.github.com/en/actions/hosting-your-own-runners/managing-self-hosted-runners-with-actions-runner-controller/authenticating-to-the-github-api

- Organization permissions
 - Self-hosted runners: Read and write

к¶Ңн•ңмқҙ н•„мҡ”н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

- repo
- admin:org

к¶Ңн•ңмқҙ н•„мҡ”н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

#### мғқм„ұ

- https://docs.github.com/en/actions/hosting-your-own-runners/managing-self-hosted-runners-with-actions-runner-controller/deploying-runner-scale-sets-with-actions-runner-controller

- Chart GitHub Package List

`shell
helm pull oci://ghcr.io/actions/actions-runner-controller-charts/gha-runner-scale-set \
 --version 0.9.1
`

`shell
helm show values oci://ghcr.io/actions/actions-runner-controller-charts/gha-runner-scale-set \
 --version 0.9.1 \
gha-runner-scale-set-0.9.1.yaml
`

`yaml title="gha-runner-scale-set-values.yaml"
githubConfigUrl: https://github.com/
githubConfigSecret:
 github_token:

runnerGroup: "default"

runnerScaleSetName: ""
`

- runnerScaleSetName
 - GitHub Action м„Өм • нҢҢмқјмқҳ .jobs..runs-onм—җ мӮ¬мҡ©лҗ  к°’мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - м„Өм •н•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡмңјл©ҙ .Release.Nameмқҙ мӮ¬мҡ©лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`shell
helm template gha-runner gha-runner-scale-set-0.9.1.tgz \
 -n github \
 -f gha-runner-scale-set-values.yaml \
gha-runner.yaml
`

`shell
helm upgrade -i gha-runner gha-runner-scale-set-0.9.1.tgz \
 --history-max 5 \
 -n github \
 -f gha-runner-scale-set-values.yaml
`

#### GitHub нҷ•мқё

мӢӨн–ү нӣ„ AutoscalingRunnerSet мІҳлҰ¬к°Җ м •мғҒм ҒмңјлЎң мІҳлҰ¬лҗҳм–ҙ лҹ¬л„Ҳк°Җ л“ұлЎқлҗҳм—ҲлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқён•ҙм•јн•©лӢҲлӢӨ. лҹ¬л„ҲлҘј л“ұлЎқн•ң кіім—җ л”°лқј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкё° мң„н•ң м¶”к°Җ мЎ°м№ҳк°Җ н•„мҡ”н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

- Oraganization
 - Settings
 - Actions
 - Runners
 - runnerScaleSetNameм—җ н•ҙлӢ№н•ҳлҠ” лҹ¬л„Ҳк°Җ л“ұлЎқлҗҳм–ҙ мһҲлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - Runner groups
 - runnerGroupм—җ н•ҙлӢ№н•ҳлҠ” лҹ¬л„Ҳ к·ёлЈ№мқҙ мғқм„ұлҗҳм–ҙ мһҲлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - н•ҙлӢ№ к·ёлЈ№мқ„ нҒҙлҰӯн•ҳм—¬ лҹ¬л„ҲлҘј мӢӨн–үн•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” лҰ¬нҸ¬м§ҖнҶ лҰ¬мҷҖ мӣҢнҒ¬н”ҢлЎңмҡ°лҘј м„Өм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

#### мӮӯм ң

`shell
helm uninstall gha-runner -n github
`

AutoscalingRunnerSetк°Җ мӮӯм ңлҗҳл©ҙ мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң GitHubм—җ л“ұлЎқлҗң лҹ¬л„ҲлҸ„ мӮӯм ңлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

### мӮӯм ң

`shell
helm uninstall gha-controller -n github
`

`shell
kubectl get crd -oname | grep --color=never 'actions.github.com' | xargs kubectl delete
``

title: GitHub Action
text:
## Workflow нҢҢмқј

GitHub Actionмқ„ мң„н•ң Workflow yamlнҢҢмқјмқ„ лҰ¬нҸ¬м§ҖнҶ лҰ¬мқҳ .github/workflows л””л үнҶ лҰ¬м—җ м ҖмһҘн•ҳкі  GitHubм—җ л°ҳмҳҒн•ҳл©ҙ мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң л°ҳмҳҒлҗҳм–ҙ мӢӨн–үлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

## м»Ён…ҚмҠӨнҠё м •ліҙ

- Accessing contextual information

мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” м»Ён…ҚмҠӨнҠё м •ліҙлҘј м•„лһҳ Actionмқ„ нҶөн•ҙ нҷ•мқё н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

``yaml
name: Context testing
on: push

jobs:
 dump_contexts_to_log:
 runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 steps:
 - name: Dump GitHub context
 id: github_context_step
 run: echo '${{ toJSON(github) }}'
 - name: Dump job context
 run: echo '${{ toJSON(job) }}'
 - name: Dump steps context
 run: echo '${{ toJSON(steps) }}'
 - name: Dump runner context
 run: echo '${{ toJSON(runner) }}'
 - name: Dump strategy context
 run: echo '${{ toJSON(strategy) }}'
 - name: Dump matrix context
 run: echo '${{ toJSON(matrix) }}'
`

## лҸҷмӢңм„ұ м ңм–ҙ

- Control the concurrency

к°ҷмқҖ Workflow, к°ҷмқҖ лёҢлһңм№ҳм—җм„ң мӢӨн–үлҗҳлҠ” WorkflowлҠ” л§Ҳм§Җл§үм—җ м ңм¶ңлҗң кІғл§Ң мӢӨн–үлҗҳлҸ„лЎқн•ҳлҠ” м„Өм •мқҖ м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

`yaml
concurrency:
 group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
 cancel-in-progress: true
`

concurrencyлҠ” Jobм—җ м„ м–ён•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. groupмқҖ лҢҖмҶҢл¬ёмһҗлҘј кө¬л¶„н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

## лІ„м „ нғңк·ё

`yaml
name: Hash

on:
 push:
 branches:
 - main
 workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
 hash:
 runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 steps:
 - name: Get TAG
 id: tag
 run: |
 TAG=$(echo ${{ github.sha }} | cut -c1-7)
 echo TAG=$TAG
 echo "tag=$TAG" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
`

`yaml
name: Version

on:
 push:
 tags:
 - "v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+"

jobs:
 version:
 runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 steps:
 - name: Get TAG
 id: tag
 run: |
 TAG=${{ github.ref_name }}
 echo TAG=$TAG
 echo "tag=$TAG" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
`

## Container Registry

### ECR

`yaml
name: Push to Amazon ECR

on:
 push:
 branches:
 - main

jobs:
 build:
 name: Build and Push Image
 runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 steps:
 - name: Configure AWS credentials
 uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
 with:
 aws-access-key-id: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
 aws-secret-access-key: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
 aws-region: us-west-2

 - name: Login to Amazon ECR
 id: login-ecr
 uses: aws-actions/amazon-ecr-login@v2

 - name: Set up Docker Buildx
 uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

 # https://github.com/docker/build-push-action
 - name: Build and push
 uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
 with:
 context: .
 push: true
 tags: |
 ${{ steps.login-ecr.outputs.registry }}/backend:${{ steps.tag.outputs.tag }}
 cache-from: type=gha
 cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
`

### GitHub

`yaml
name: Push to GitHub Container Registry

on:
 push:
 branches:
 - main

jobs:
 build:
 name: Build and Push Image
 runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 steps:
 # https://github.com/docker/login-action
 - name: Login to GitHub Container Registry
 uses: docker/login-action@v3
 with:
 registry: ghcr.io
 username: ${{ github.repository_owner }}
 password: ${{ secrets.PAT }}

 - name: Set up Docker Buildx
 uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

 # https://github.com/docker/build-push-action
 - name: Build and push
 uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
 with:
 context: .
 push: true
 tags: |
 ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}/backend:${{ steps.tag.outputs.tag }}
 cache-from: type=gha
 cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
`

- GitHub Docker imagePullSecrets

## Auto Release

`yaml
name: Auto Release

on:
 push:
 tags:
 - "v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+"

jobs:
 release:
 name: Publish auto release
 runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 needs: [build]
 permissions:
 contents: write
 steps:
 - name: Release
 uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
 with:
 generate_release_notes: true
`

## н•„н„°лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” Required Job

Required jobмқҙ pathsлӮҳ paths-ignore к°ҷмқҖ мҳөм…ҳмңјлЎң мқён•ҙ мӢӨн–үлҗҳм§Җ м•Ҡмңјл©ҙ Pending мғҒнғңм—җ л№ м ём„ң PRмқ„ мҷ„лЈҢн•  мҲҳ м—ҶмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. мқҙлҘј н•ҙкІ°н•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙм„ңлҠ”

- л°ҳлҢҖлҗҳлҠ” н•„н„°лҘј к°–лҠ” WorkflowлҘј л§Ңл“Өкі  Job мқҙлҰ„мқҙ к°ҷмқҖ dummy Jobмқ„ л§Ңл“ңлҠ” л°©лІ•
- dorny/paths-filterлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” л°©лІ•

мқҙ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

Job мӢӨн–ү кІ°кіјлҠ” success, failure, cancelled, skipped мӨ‘ н•ҳлӮҳмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. PendingмқҖ мӢӨн–ү мһҗмІҙк°Җ м•Ҳлҗң мғҒнғңмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

successмҷҖ skippedлҠ” Required кІҖмӮ¬лҘј нҶөкіјн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

### Dummy Job л§Ңл“Өкё°

`yaml title=".github/workflows/job.yaml"
name: job

on:
 pull_request:
 branches:
 - main
 paths:
 - "backend/**"

jobs:
 tests:
 runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 steps:
 - name: Test backend
 run: |
 # ...
`

`yaml title=".github/workflows/job-dummy.yaml"
name: job

on:
 pull_request:
 branches:
 - main
 paths-ignore:
 - "backend/**"

jobs:
 tests:
 if: false
 runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 steps:
 - run: echo "Unreachable"
`

### paths-filter мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкё°

- paths-filter Usage

`yaml
jobs:
 changes:
 runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 permissions:
 pull-requests: read
 outputs:
 backend: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.backend }}
 backend_files: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.backend_files }}
 frontend: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.frontend }}
 steps:
 # PRм—җ лҢҖн•ң filterмқҳ кІҪмҡ° checkoutмқҙ н•„мҡ” м—ҶмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - name: Find changes
 uses: dorny/paths-filter@v3
 id: filter
 with:
 list-files: shell
 filters: |
 backend:
 - "backend/**"
 frontend:
 - "frontend/**"

 backend-tests:
 needs: changes
 if: needs.changes.outputs.backend == 'true'
 runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 steps:
 - name: Checkout
 uses: actions/checkout@v4

 - name: Test backend
 run: |
 # ...

 - name: Lint backend
 run: |
 for file in ${{ needs.changes.outputs.backend_files }}; do
 # ...
 done

 frontend-tests:
 needs: changes
 if: needs.changes.outputs.frontend == 'true'
 runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 steps:
 - name: Checkout
 uses: actions/checkout@v4

 - name: Test frontend
 run: |
 # ...
`

## workflow_dispatch

- workflow_dispatch

`yaml
on:
 workflow_dispatch:
`

inputsлҘј м„ м–ён•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҚ”лқјлҸ„ лёҢлһңм№ҳ лҳҗлҠ” нғңк·ё м„ нғқмқҖ к°ҖлҠҘн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`yaml
on:
 workflow_dispatch:
 inputs:
 :
 ## input м°Ҫм—җ н‘ңмӢңлҗҳлҠ” лӮҙмҡ©мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 description:
 # required: false
 type:
 # default:
 ## typeмқҙ choiceмқё кІҪмҡ° м„ нғқм§Җмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 # options: []
`

type: environment`лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл Өл©ҙ, Settingsм—җм„ң EnvironmentsлҘј лЁјм Җ м„Өм •н•ҙм•јн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

## Workflow нҢҢмқј

GitHub Actionмқ„ мң„н•ң Workflow yamlнҢҢмқјмқ„ лҰ¬нҸ¬м§ҖнҶ лҰ¬мқҳ .github/workflows л””л үнҶ лҰ¬м—җ м ҖмһҘн•ҳкі  GitHubм—җ л°ҳмҳҒн•ҳл©ҙ мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң л°ҳмҳҒлҗҳм–ҙвҖҰ

title: Argo CD GitOps
headings: GitHub Action for Build and Release
text:
## GitOps

https://nortal.com/blog/gitops-argocd/

GitHub, GitHub Action, ECR, Argo-CD, Helm ChartлҘј мқҙмҡ©н•ң GitOps м„Өм •м—җ лҢҖн•ң мҳҲмӢңмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

## GitOps Repository

https://github.com/hhk7734/gitops лҠ” GitOps Repository мҳҲмӢңмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

## GitHub Action for Build and Release

Build and Release Action
snippet:

title: Argo Events
text:
## м„Өм№ҳ

``shell
helm repo add argo https://argoproj.github.io/argo-helm \
&& helm repo update argo
`

`shell
mkdir -p workflow/argo/events/{helm,eventbus,eventsource}
`

`shell
helm search repo argo/argo-events -l | head -n 10
`

`shell
helm show values argo/argo-events \
 --version 2.0.0 \
workflow/argo/events/helm/values.yaml
`

`yaml title="workflow/argo/events/helm/values.yaml"
configs:
 jetstream:
 versions:
 - version: 2.8.1
 natsImage: nats:2.8.1
 metricsExporterImage: natsio/prometheus-nats-exporter:0.9.1
 configReloaderImage: natsio/nats-server-config-reloader:0.6.3
 startCommand: /nats-server
`

`shell
helm upgrade -i argo-events argo/argo-events \
 --version 2.0.0 \
 -n workflow \
 --values workflow/argo/events/helm/values.yaml
`

## EventBus

`yaml title="workflow/argo/events/eventbus/default.yaml"
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: EventBus
metadata:
 name: default
 namespace: workflow
spec:
 jetstream: # nats streaming(stan)мқҖ лҚ” мқҙмғҒ к°ңл°ңлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмқҢ
 version: 2.8.1
 replicas: 3 # minimum 3
 affinity:
 podAntiAffinity:
 preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
 - podAffinityTerm:
 labelSelector:
 matchLabels:
 controller: eventbus-controller
 eventbus-name: default
 topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
 weight: 100
`

## EventSource

### GitHub

- Settings -> Developer setttings -> Personal access tokens -> Generate new tokens
 - admin: repo_hook
- secretмқ„ мһ„мқҳлЎң м •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
 name:
 namespace: workflow
type: Opaque
data:
 token:

`

`yaml title="workflow/argo/events/eventsource/github.yaml"
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: EventSource
metadata:
 name: github
 namespace: workflow
spec:
 eventBusName: default
 service:
 ports:
 - port: 12000
 targetPort: 12000 # pod port
 github:
 example: # eventName, мһ„мқҳлЎң м„Өм •н•ҳл©ҙ лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 # https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events/blob/master/api/event-source.md#githubeventsource
 owner:
 repository:
 webhook:
 endpoint:
 port: "12000" # pod port
 method: POST
 url: https://
 # https://docs.github.com/en/developers/webhooks-and-events/webhooks/webhook-events-and-payloads
 contentType: json
 insecure: false
 active: true
 events:
 - "*"
 apiToken:
 name:
 key: token
 webhookSecret:
 name:
 key: secret
`

- repository -> Settings -> Webhooks -> Add webhook
 - м•„лһҳ лӮҙмҡ©м—җ л§һм¶° Webhookмқҙ мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң мғқм„ұлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - Payload URL: https:///
 - Content type: application/json
 - Secret:
 - Enable SSL verification
 - Send me everything.
 - Active
- github-eventsource-svc.workflow Serviceк°Җ мһҗлҸҷ мғқм„ұлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- https:///к°Җ мҷёл¶ҖлЎң л…ём¶ң лҗ  мҲҳ мһҲлҸ„лЎқ л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬лҘј кө¬м„ұн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

 ctx, client, err := apiclient.NewClientFromOpts(
 apiclient.Opts{

title: Argo Workflows DAG template
text:
## dag

dagлҠ” м—°мҶҚм Ғмқё template мӢӨн–ү мҲңм„ңлҘј м •мқҳн•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” л°©лІ• мӨ‘ н•ҳлӮҳмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. мқҳмЎҙм„ұмқҙ м—ҶлҠ” мһ‘м—…мқҖ л°”лЎң мӢӨн–үлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

- https://argoproj.github.io/argo-workflows/fields/#dagtemplate

``yaml
spec:
 entrypoint: dag-test
 templates:
 - name: dag-test
 dag:
 tasks:
 - name: a1
 inline:
 {}
 # мқ„ м§Ғм ‘ м„ м–ён•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - name: a2
 template: work2
 - name: b1
 depends: "a1 && a2"
 template: work3
 - name: b2
 depends: b1
 template: work4
 when: "{{tasks.b1.outputs.result}} == success"
`

`mermaid
flowchart LR
 A[A Start] --> a1 & a2
 a1 & a2 --> B[B Start]
 B --> b1
 b1 --> S{Success?}
 S -- yes --> b2
 b2 --> C[End]
 S -- no --> C
`

- tasks
 - depends
 - https://argoproj.github.io/argo-workflows/enhanced-depends-logic/
 - dag лӮҙм—җм„ң dependenciesмҷҖ н•Ёк»ҳ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ м—ҶмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

### Variables

- https://argoproj.github.io/argo-workflows/variables/#dag-templates

## steps

stepsлҠ” м—°мҶҚм Ғмқё template мӢӨн–ү мҲңм„ңлҘј м •мқҳн•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” л°©лІ• мӨ‘ н•ҳлӮҳмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. лҰ¬мҠӨнҠё м•Ҳмқҳ лҰ¬мҠӨнҠёлЎң кө¬м„ұлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

- https://argoproj.github.io/argo-workflows/fields/#workflowstep

`yaml
spec:
 entrypoint: steps-test
 templates:
 - name: steps-test
 steps:
 - - name: a1
 inline:
 {}
 # мқ„ м§Ғм ‘ м„ м–ён•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - name: a2
 template: work2
 - - name: b1
 template: work3
 - name: b2
 template: work4
 when: "{{steps.b1.outputs.result}} == success"
`

мң„мҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ м •мқҳн•ң кІҪмҡ° м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ мҲңм„ңлЎң м§„н–үлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ. a1, a2лҠ” лі‘л ¬лЎң мӢӨн–үлҗҳкі , b2лҠ” b1мқҳ кІ°кіјм—җ л”°лқј мӢӨн–үлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`mermaid
flowchart LR
 A[A Start] --> a1 & a2
 a1 & a2 --> B[B Start]
 B --> b1
 b1 --> S{Success?}
 S -- yes --> b2
 b2 --> C[End]
 S -- no --> C
``

вҖҰмӢӨн–ү мҲңм„ңлҘј м •мқҳн•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” л°©лІ• мӨ‘ н•ҳлӮҳмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. мқҳмЎҙм„ұмқҙ м—ҶлҠ” мһ‘м—…мқҖ л°”лЎң мӢӨн–үлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

- https://argoproj.github.io/argo-workflows/fields/#dagtemplate

title: Argo Workflows entrypoint and templates
text:
## entrypoint

entrypointлЎң м§Җм •лҗң templateмқҙ workflowмқҳ мӢңмһ‘м җмқҙ лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

``yaml
spec:
 entrypoint:
`

## template

- https://argoproj.github.io/argo-workflows/fields/#template

templateмқҖ workflowм—җм„ң мһ‘м—…мқ„ м •мқҳн•  л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” мӢӨн–ү лӢЁмң„мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. container, script, л“ұмқҖ мӢӨн–ү к°ҖлҠҘн•ң н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ мһ‘м—…мқ„ м •мқҳн•ҳл©°, steps, dagлҠ” м •мқҳлҗң templateл“Өмқҳ мӢӨн–ү мҲңм„ңк°Җ м •мқҳлҗң н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ м§‘н•©мқ„ мһ‘м—…мңјлЎң м •мқҳн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`yaml
spec:
 templates:
 - name:
 daemon: false
 # retryStrategy:
 # retryPolicy: OnFailure # OnFailure|OnError|OnTransientError|Always
 # limit: null # null|integer
`

- daemon: trueлЎң м„Өм •н•ҳл©ҙ н•ҙлӢ№ м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳмқҳ Ready statusк°Җ Trueк°Җ лҗҳл©ҙ м§„н–үмӨ‘ м—¬л¶ҖмҷҖ кҙҖкі„м—Ҷмқҙ лӢӨмқҢ мһ‘м—…мңјлЎң л„ҳм–ҙк°‘лӢҲлӢӨ. мў…лЈҢлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ” мһ‘м—…мқё кІҪмҡ° м „мІҙ мһ‘м—…м—җм„ң мһ„мӢңлЎң мӮ¬мҡ©лҗ  лҚ°мқҙн„°лІ мқҙмҠӨлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҳлҠ” л“ұмқҳ мҡ©лҸ„лЎң мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
- retryStrategy: (Optional) н…ңн”ҢлҰҝмқҙ мӢӨнҢЁн–Ҳмқ„ л•Ң, мһ¬мӢңлҸ„н•  нҡҹмҲҳмҷҖ к°„кІ©мқ„ м„Өм •н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - https://argoproj.github.io/argo-workflows/retries/
 - retryPolicy: OnFailure(кё°ліёк°’), OnError, OnTransientError, Always
 - limit: null(кё°ліёк°’)мқҙл©ҙ л¬ҙн•ң мһ¬мӢңлҸ„, м •мҲҳл©ҙ н•ҙлӢ№ нҡҹмҲҳл§ҢнҒј мһ¬мӢңлҸ„н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - expression: (Optional) мһ¬мӢңлҸ„ мЎ°кұҙ
 - variables
 - lastRetry.exitCode: exit мҪ”л“ңлҘј м•Ң мҲҳ м—ҶлҠ” кІҪмҡ° -1 мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - lastRetry.status: Error, Failed
 - lastRetry.duration: л§Ҳм§Җл§ү мһ¬мӢңлҸ„мқҳ мӢңмһ‘ мӢңк°„л¶Җн„° мў…лЈҢ мӢңк°„к№Ңм§Җмқҳ к°„кІ©мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - lastRetry.message
 - backoff
 - affinity

### container

- https://argoproj.github.io/argo-workflows/fields/#container

containerлҠ” мӣҗн•ҳлҠ” м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳ мқҙлҜём§ҖлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ Podмқ„ мӢӨн–үмӢңнӮӨлҠ” мһ‘м—…мқ„ м •мқҳн•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. Kubernetesмқҳ container specмқ„ к·ёлҢҖлЎң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳмӢңл©ҙ лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`yaml
spec:
 entrypoint: container-test
 templates:
 - name: container-test
 container:
 # nameмқҖ mainмңјлЎң кі м •лҗҳм–ҙ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 image: docker/whalesay
 command: [cowsay]
 args: ["hello world"]
`

`yaml
spec:
 template:
 - name:
 daemon: true
 container:
 image: postgres:15.3
 ports:
 - name: postgres
 containerPort: 5432
 env:
 - name: PGDATA
 value: /lol_iot/postgresql/data
 - name: POSTGRES_USER
 value: test
 - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
 value: test
 volumeMounts:
 - name: tmp-db
 mountPath: /lol_iot/postgresql
`

### containerSet

- https://argoproj.github.io/argo-workflows/fields/#containersettemplate

### script

- https://argoproj.github.io/argo-workflows/fields/#scripttemplate

мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠё мӢӨн–үмқ„ л°”лЎң н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҸ„лЎқ source н•„л“ңлҘј м¶”к°Җн•ң containerмқҳ лһҳнҚјмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

`yaml
spec:
 entrypoint: script-test
 templates:
 - name: script-test
 script:
 image: python:alpine3.6
 command: [python]
 source: |
 import random
 i = random.randint(1, 100)
 print(i)
`

### resource

resourceлҠ” Kubernetes лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨлҘј м§Ғм ‘ м„ м–ён•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

- https://argoproj.github.io/argo-workflows/fields/#resourcetemplate

`yaml
spec:
 entrypoint: resource-test
 serviceAccountName: argo-workflow
 templates:
 - name: resource-test
 steps:
 - - name: submit-resource
 template: create-pod

 - - name: delete-resource
 arguments:
 parameters:
 - name: selector
 value: cleanup=true
 template: delete-resource

 - name: create-pod
 resource:
 action: create
 manifest: |
 apiVersion: v1
 kind: Pod
 metadata:
 generateName: hello-world-
 labels:
 cleanup: "true"
 spec:
 containers:
 - name: hello-world
 image: docker/whalesay
 command: [cowsay]
 args: ["hello world"]

 - name: delete-resource
 inputs:
 parameters:
 - name: selector
 resource:
 action: delete
 flags: ["pod", "--selector", "{{inputs.parameters.selector}}"]
`

- setOwnerReference: trueлЎң м„Өм •н•ҳл©ҙ workflowк°Җ мӮӯм ңлҗ  л•Ң лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨлҸ„ н•Ёк»ҳ мӮӯм ңлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

- resource -> outputs.parameters

- https://argoproj.github.io/argo-workflows/fields/#data

### suspend

- https://argoproj.github.io/argo-workflows/fields/#suspendtemplate

suspendлҠ” workflowлҘј мқјмӢң мӨ‘м§ҖмӢңнӮӨлҠ” мһ‘м—…мқ„ м •мқҳн•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. argo resumeмқҙлӮҳ /api/v1/workflows/{namespace}/{name}/resumeлҘј нҳём¶ңн•ҳм—¬ лӢӨмӢң мӢңмһ‘н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

`yaml
spec:

 suspend: {} # л¬ҙкё°н•ң мӨ‘м§Җ
 # duration: "20s"
`

### http

`yaml
spec:

`

## template

- https://argoproj.github.io/argo-workflows/fields/#template

templateмқҖ workflowм—җм„ң мһ‘м—…мқ„ м •мқҳн•  л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” мӢӨн–ү лӢЁмң„мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. container, scriвҖҰ

title: Argo Workflows Garbage Collection
text:
- https://argoproj.github.io/argo-workflows/cost-optimisation/

## podGC

- https://argoproj.github.io/argo-workflows/fields/#podgc

``yaml
spec:
 podGC:
 labelSelector: {}
 strategy: OnPodCompletion # OnPodCompletion|OnPodSuccess|OnWorkflowCompletion|OnWorkflowSuccess
 deleteDelayDuration: 0s # 00h00m00s
`

- podGC
 - м„ м–ён•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡмңјл©ҙ PodлҠ” мӮӯм ңлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - labelSelector
 - м„ м–ён•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡмңјл©ҙ мӢӨн–үлҗҳлҠ” лӘЁл“  н…ңн”ҢлҰҝмқҳ Podмқҙ мӮӯм ңлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - strategy
 - OnPodCompletion: Podк°Җ мҷ„лЈҢлҗң нӣ„ мҰүмӢң мӮӯм ңн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.(м—җлҹ¬/мӢӨнҢЁ нҸ¬н•Ё)
 - OnPodSuccess: Podк°Җ м„ұкіөн•ң нӣ„ мҰүмӢң мӮӯм ңн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - OnWorkflowCompletion: Workflowк°Җ мҷ„лЈҢлҗң нӣ„ мӮӯм ңн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - OnWorkflowSuccess: Workflowк°Җ м„ұкіөн•ң нӣ„ мӮӯм ңн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - deleteDelayDuration: GC нҒҗм—җ мһҲлҠ” Podмқҳ мӮӯм ң м§Җм—° мӢңк°„

## ttlStrategy

- https://argoproj.github.io/argo-workflows/fields/#ttlstrategy

`yaml
spec:
 ttlStrategy:
 # secondsAfterCompletion: 3600
 secondsAfterSuccess: 3600
 secondsAfterFailure: 86400
`

- ttlStrategy
 - м„ м–ён•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡмңјл©ҙ мӢңк°„ кё°л°ҳмңјлЎң мӮӯм ңлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - secondsAfterCompletion: workflowк°Җ мҷ„лЈҢлҗң нӣ„ мӮӯм ңлҗҳкё°к№Ңм§Җмқҳ мӢңк°„
 - secondsAfterSuccess: workflowк°Җ м„ұкіөн•ң нӣ„ мӮӯм ңлҗҳкё°к№Ңм§Җмқҳ мӢңк°„
 - secondsAfterFailure: workflowк°Җ мӢӨнҢЁн•ң нӣ„ мӮӯм ңлҗҳкё°к№Ңм§Җмқҳ мӢңк°„

## retentionPolicy

retentionPolicyлҠ” лҸҷмқјн•ң workflowл“Ө мӨ‘ мӮӯм ңлҗҳм§Җ м•Ҡкі  лӮЁм•„мһҲмқ„ мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” workflowмқҳ к°ңмҲҳмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

`yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
 name: workflow-controller-configmap
data:
 retentionPolicy: |
 completed: 10
 failed: 3
 errored: 3
`

- retentionPolicy
 - м„ м–ён•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡмңјл©ҙ к°ңмҲҳ кё°л°ҳмңјлЎң мӮӯм ңлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - completed: мӮӯм ңлҗҳм§Җ м•Ҡкі  лӮЁм•„мһҲмқ„ мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” м„ұкіөн•ң workflow мҲҳ
 - failed: мӮӯм ңлҗҳм§Җ м•Ҡкі  лӮЁм•„мһҲмқ„ мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” мӢӨнҢЁн•ң workflow мҲҳ
 - errored`: мӮӯм ңлҗҳм§Җ м•Ҡкі  лӮЁм•„мһҲмқ„ мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” м—җлҹ¬лӮң workflow мҲҳ

CR м •мқҳм—җ л”°лқј мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң м •мқҳ л°Ҹ н• лӢ№лҗҳлҠ” ліҖмҲҳмҷҖ мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗ м •мқҳ(inputs.parameters) л°Ҹ н• лӢ№(arguments.parameters)мқҙ н•„мҡ”н•ң ліҖмҲҳк°Җ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

м •мқҳлҗң ліҖмҲҳлҠ” м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ нҳ•нғңлЎң templateмқ„ кө¬м„ұн•ҳлҠ” лҚ° мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

- лӢЁмҲң м№ҳнҷҳ

- м—°мӮ° нӣ„ м№ҳнҷҳ

 - "{{=inputs.parameters.}}"

мҳҲлҘј л“Өм–ҙ м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ л°©мӢқмңјлЎң ліҖмҲҳлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

`

submitн•  л•Ң --parameter = нҳ•нғңлЎңлҸ„ м „лӢ¬ н•  мҲҳлҸ„ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

## м„Өм№ҳ

- authentik Docs / Installation / Kubernetes installation

``shell
helm repo add authentik https://charts.goauthentik.io
`

`shell
helm repo update authentik \
&& helm search repo authentik/authentik -l | head -n 10
`

`shell
helm pull authentik/authentik --version 2025.8.4
`

`shell
helm show values authentik/authentik --version 2025.8.4 > authentik-2025.8.4.yaml
`

`sql
CREATE USER authentik WITH PASSWORD 'authentik';
CREATE DATABASE authentik with OWNER authentik;
`

`hcl
resource "random_password" "authentik_secret_key" {
 length = 50
 special = false
}
`

`yaml title="authentik-values.yaml"
authentik:
 secret_key: ""
 postgresql:
 host: ""
 port: 5432
 user: authentik
 password: authentik
 # databaseName
 name: authentik
 redis:
 host: ""
 password: ""

server:
 route:
 main:
 enabled: false
 parentRefs:
 - name: ""
 namespace: ""
 hostnames:
 - ""
`

`shell
helm template authentik authentik/authentik \
 --version 2025.8.4 \
 -n authentik \
 -f authentik-values.yaml \
authentik.yaml
`

`shell
helm upgrade -i authentik authentik/authentik \
 --history-max 5 \
 --version 2025.8.4 \
 -n authentik \
 -f authentik-values.yaml
`

## Application Load Balancer мғқм„ұн•ҳкё°

``yaml
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:

 - http:

 - path: /

`

- alb.ingress.kubernetes.io/scheme: internal|internet-facing

Istio Ingress GatewayмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  кІҪмҡ°, Serviceмқҳ нҸ¬нҠё м„Өм •кіј Gatewayмқҳ нҸ¬нҠё м„Өм • лӘЁл‘җ нҷ•мқён•ҙм•јн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

title: casdoor
text:
## Casdoor

CasdoorлҠ” Applicationм—җ лҢҖн•ң мқёмҰқ/мқёк°ҖлҘј кҙҖлҰ¬н•ҳлҠ” м„ңл№„мҠӨмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

- UserлҠ” н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ Organizationм—җл§Ң мҶҚн•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
- UserлҠ” мһҗмӢ мқҙ мҶҚн•ң Organizationмқҳ Applicationм—җ лЎңк·ёмқён•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - мқёмҰқмқ„ мң„н•ҙ ProviderлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
- Casdoor APIм—җм„ң UserлҠ” мқјл°ҳм ҒмңјлЎң /мңјлЎң мӢқлі„лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- build-inмқҙлқјлҠ” Organizationм—җлҠ” adminмқҙлқјлҠ” UserмҷҖ app-build-inмқҙлқјлҠ” Applicationмқҙ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - app-built-inмқҙ Casdoor мһҗмІҙлҘј мң„н•ң Applicationмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

## м„Өм№ҳ

- Casdoor / Try with K8s Helm
- Casdoor Helm GitHub

``shell
helm pull oci://registry-1.docker.io/casbin/casdoor-helm-charts \
 --version v2.70.0
`

`shell
helm show values oci://registry-1.docker.io/casbin/casdoor-helm-charts \
 --version v2.70.0 \
casdoor-helm-charts-v2.70.0.yaml
`

`sql
CREATE USER casdoor WITH PASSWORD 'casdoor';
CREATE DATABASE casdoor with OWNER casdoor;
`

`yaml title="casdoor-values.yaml"
tolerations: []

database:
 driver: postgres
 host: ""
 port: 5432
 user: casdoor
 password: casdoor
 databaseName: casdoor
`

`shell
helm template casdoor oci://registry-1.docker.io/casbin/casdoor-helm-charts \
 --version v2.70.0 \
 -n auth \
 -f casdoor-values.yaml \
casdoor.yaml
`

`shell
helm upgrade -i casdoor oci://registry-1.docker.io/casbin/casdoor-helm-charts \
 --history-max 5 \
 --version v2.70.0 \
 -n auth \
 -f casdoor-values.yaml
`

м„Өм№ҳ нӣ„ ліҙм•Ҳмқ„ мң„н•ң мЎ°м№ҳк°Җ н•„мҡ”н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

- мҙҲкё° кҙҖлҰ¬мһҗ кі„м •мқҖ admin / 123 мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
- built-in Organizationмқҳ л№„л°ҖлІҲнҳё нғҖмһ…мқ„ plainм—җм„ң лӢӨлҘё мҳөм…ҳмңјлЎң ліҖкІҪн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- adminмқҳ л№„л°ҖлІҲнҳёлҘј ліҖкІҪн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- Admin мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗ кі„м •мқ„ мғқм„ұн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- app-built-in`мқҳ к°Җмһ…мқ„ л№„нҷңм„ұнҷ” н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
snippet:
## Casdoor

CasdoorлҠ” Applicationм—җ лҢҖн•ң мқёмҰқ/мқёк°ҖлҘј кҙҖлҰ¬н•ҳлҠ” м„ңл№„мҠӨмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

- UserлҠ” н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ Organizationм—җл§Ң мҶҚн•  мҲҳ вҖҰ

title: Container Device Interface (CDI)
text:
## Device Plugin

- Kubernetes Docs / Concepts / Extending Kubernetes / Device Plugins

### Device Plugin л“ұлЎқ

``mermaid
sequenceDiagram
 participant Kubelet
 participant kubelet.sock
 participant device_plugin.sock
 participant DevicePlugin

 DevicePlugin ->> kubelet.sock: Register(RegisterRequest{Version, Endpoint, ResourceName})
 kubelet.sock ->> Kubelet: Register()
 Kubelet ->> device_plugin.sock: ListAndWatch()
 device_plugin.sock ->> DevicePlugin: ListAndWatch()
 loop stream
 DevicePlugin -->> device_plugin.sock: ListAndWatchResponse
 device_plugin.sock -->> Kubelet: ListAndWatchResponse
 end
`

socketмқҳ кё°ліё кІҪлЎңлҠ” /var/lib/kubelet/device-plugins/мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

## CDI

- https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/blob/main/SPEC.md

Kubernetes 1.28м—җм„ң Alpha, 1.29м—җм„ң BetaлЎң м¶”к°ҖлҗҳлҠ” кё°лҠҘмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

мҡ”м•Ҫ

- мһҘм№ҳ м„Өм№ҳ
 - кҙҖлҰ¬мһҗк°Җ м»ҙн“Ён„°м—җ нғҖмӮ¬ мһҘм№ҳ л“ңлқјмқҙлІ„(л°Ҹ нғҖмӮ¬ мһҘм№ҳ)лҘј м„Өм№ҳн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - мһҘм№ҳ л“ңлқјмқҙлІ„ м„Өм№ҳ мҶҢн”„нҠёмӣЁм–ҙ(DaemonSet?)лҠ” мһҳ м•Ңл Өм§„ кІҪлЎң(/etc/cdi/vendor.json)м—җ м„Өм • нҢҢмқјмқ„ мһ‘м„ұн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳ лҹ°нғҖмһ„
 - --device н”Ңлһҳк·ёлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„ҲлҘј мӢңмһ‘н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳ лҹ°нғҖмһ„мқҖ м„Өм • нҢҢмқјмқ„ мқҪкі  мң нҡЁм„ұ кІҖмӮ¬лҘј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳ лҹ°нғҖмһ„мқҖ м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳ мқҙлҜём§ҖлҘј к°Җм ёмҳөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳ лҹ°нғҖмһ„мқҖ OCI мӮ¬м–‘мқ„ мғқм„ұн•ҳкі , м„Өм • нҢҢмқјм—җ л§һм¶° ліҖкІҪн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`json title="/etc/cdi"
{

- kind
 - prefixлҠ” лІӨлҚ” м •ліҙлҘј лӮҳнғҖлӮҙлҠ” лҸ„л©”мқёмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.(Ex. nvidia.com)

 - мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗк°Җ devicesм—җ лӘ…мӢңлҗң мһҘм№ҳ мӨ‘ н•ҳлӮҳлқјлҸ„ мҡ”мІӯн•ң кІҪмҡ° OCI мӮ¬м–‘м—җ л°ҳмҳҒн•  лӮҙмҡ©мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - deviceNodes
 - hostPath
 - path
 - permissions: r, w, mмңјлЎң кө¬м„ұлҗң мһҘм№ҳмқҳ cgroup к¶Ңн•ңмқҙлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - m: мһҘм№ҳлҘј мғқм„ұн•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - mounts
 - hostPath
 - containerPath
 - options: л§ҲмҡҙнҠё мҳөм…ҳмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - hooks
 - hookName: нӣ…мқҙ мӢӨн–үлҗҳм–ҙм•јн•  мӢңм җмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - createRuntime, createContainer, startContainer, poststart, poststop
- devices

 - containerEdits`

## Issure

- https://cert-manager.io/docs/concepts/issuer/
- https://cert-manager.io/docs/configuration/
- https://cert-manager.io/docs/reference/api-docs/#cert-manager.io/v1.ClusterIssuer

- IssuerлҠ” мқёмҰқм„ңм—җ м„ңлӘ…н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” мқёмҰқ кё°кҙҖмқ„ лӮҳнғҖлӮҙлҠ” лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
- IssuerлҠ” Namespace лӮҙм—җм„ңл§Ң мӮ¬мҡ©к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳлҜҖлЎң м—¬лҹ¬ Namespaceм—җм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл Өл©ҙ ClusterIssuerлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҙм•јн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

``yaml
apiVersion: cert-manager.io/v1
kind: Issuer
metadata:
 name:
 namespace:
spec:
 selfSigned: {}
 # ca:
`

- selfSigned: лі„лҸ„мқҳ мқёмҰқ кё°кҙҖ м—Ҷмқҙ мқёмҰқм„ң мғқм„ұ мҡ”мІӯмқҙ мҳӨл©ҙ мһҗмІҙ м„ңлӘ…н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- ca
 - мқёмҰқм„ң мғқм„ұ мҡ”мІӯмқҙ мҳӨл©ҙ л“ұлЎқлҗң мқёмҰқм„ңлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ м„ңлӘ…н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - secretName: мқёмҰқм„ңк°Җ м ҖмһҘлҗң Secretмқҳ мқҙлҰ„мқ„ м„Өм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ. IssuerлҠ” Issuerк°Җ мҶҚн•ң Namespaceм—җм„ң Secretмқ„ м°ҫкі , ClusterIssuerмқҳ кІҪмҡ° кё°ліём ҒмңјлЎң cert-managerк°Җ м„Өм№ҳлҗң Namespaceм—җм„ң Secretмқ„ м°ҫмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.(м„Өм№ҳ мӢң clusterResourceNamespace мҳөм…ҳмңјлЎң ліҖкІҪ к°ҖлҠҘ)
- acme
 - server:
 - ACME м„ңлІ„мқҳ directory м—”л“ңнҸ¬мқёнҠёлҘј м„Өм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - e.g., https://acme-v02.api.letsencrypt.org/directory
 - email:
 - ACME кі„м •кіј м—°кІ°лҗң мқҙл©”мқј мЈјмҶҢлҘј м„Өм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - л§ҢлЈҢ м•ҢлҰј л“ұмқҳ л©”мқјмқ„ ліҙлӮҙлҠ” лҚ° мӮ¬мҡ©лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - privateKeySecretRef
 - name: : мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң мғқм„ұлҗ  ACME кі„м •мқҳ privateKeyлҘј м ҖмһҘн•  Secretмқҳ мқҙлҰ„мқ„ м„Өм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - solvers: []
 - selector
 - м„Өм •н•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡмңјл©ҙ к°ҖмһҘ лӮ®мқҖ мҡ°м„ мҲңмң„мқҳ solverк°Җ лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - dnsNames: []
 - н•ҙлӢ№ solverлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ мқёмҰқм„ңлҘј л°ңкёүн•  DNS name лҰ¬мҠӨнҠёмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - dnsZonesліҙлӢӨ мҡ°м„ мҲңмң„к°Җ лҶ’мҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - dnsZones: []
 - н•ҙлӢ№ solverлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ мқёмҰқм„ңлҘј л°ңкёүн•  DNS zone лҰ¬мҠӨнҠёмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - dns01
 - cloudflare
 - Cloudflare
 - лӮҙмһҘлҗң Cloudflare solverлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - webhook
 - Webhook
 - мҷёл¶Җ webhook м„ңлІ„лЎң кө¬м„ұлҗң solverлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - solverName:
 - webhook solverмқҳ мқҙлҰ„мқ„ м„Өм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - webhook м„ңлІ„м—җ м •мқҳлҗҳм–ҙ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - groupName:
 - webhook м„ңлІ„м—җ ChallengePayload лҰ¬мҶҢмҠӨлҘј POSTн•  л•Ң мӮ¬мҡ©лҗҳлҠ” API group мқҙлҰ„мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - webhook м„ңлІ„м—җ м •мқҳлҗҳм–ҙ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - config: {}
 - webhook м„ңлІ„м—җ м „лӢ¬н•  м„Өм •мқ„ м„Өм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

## Certificate

- cert-manager Docs / Certificate
- cert-manager Docs / Reference # cert-manager.io/v1.Certificate

`yaml
apiVersion: cert-manager.io/v1
kind: Certificate
metadata:
 name:
 namespace:
spec:
 secretName:
 # isCA: false
 # secretTemplate:
 # annotations:
 # :
 # labels:
 # :
 duration: 2160h # 90d
 # renewBefore: 360h # 15d
 # subject:
 # organizations:
 # - # O
 privateKey:
 algorithm: Ed25519 # RSA|Ed25519|ECDSA

 # dnsNames, uris, ipAddresses мӨ‘ н•ҳлӮҳлҠ” н•„мҲҳлЎң мһ…л Ҙн•ҙм•јн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 dnsNames: []
 uris: []
 ipAddresses: []

 issuerRef:
 group: cert-manager.io
 kind: Issuer # Issuer|ClusterIssuer
 name:
`

- secretName: мқёмҰқм„ңк°Җ м ҖмһҘлҗ  Secretмқҳ мқҙлҰ„мқ„ м„Өм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

мғқм„ұлҗң мқёмҰқм„ңлҠ” м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ нҳ•нғңлЎң м ҖмһҘлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
 name:
 namespace:
type: kubernetes.io/tls
data:
 ca.crt:
 tls.key:
 tls.crt:
`

м§Ғм ‘ мқёмҰқм„ң к°ұмӢ мқ„ нҠёлҰ¬кұ°н•ҳл Өл©ҙ м•„лһҳ лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`shell
cmctl renew -n
``

title: Let's Encrypt with cert-manager
text:
## Let's Encrypt

- - https://cert-manager.io/docs/faq/acme/

### HTTP-01 challenge

мқёмҰқмқ„ мӢңмһ‘н•ҳл©ҙ мҷҖ мқ„ л°ңн–үн•ҙ мЈјлҠ”лҚ°, http:///.well-known/acme-challenge/м—җ м ‘мҶҚн–Ҳмқ„ л•Ң мқ„ л°ҳнҷҳн•ҳлҸ„лЎқ н•ҳм—¬ м„ңлІ„лҘј м ңм–ҙн•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢмқ„ мҰқлӘ…н•ҳл©ҙ мқёмҰқм„ңк°Җ л°ңкёүлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ. 80 нҸ¬нҠёл§Ң мӮ¬мҡ© к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳл©° мҷҖмқјл“ңм№ҙл“ң("*".)лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ м—ҶмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

### DNS-01 challenge

мқёмҰқмқ„ мӢңмһ‘н•ҳл©ҙ мқ„ л°ңн–үн•ҙ мЈјлҠ”лҚ°, _acme-challenge. TXT л ҲмҪ”л“ңм—җ л„Јм–ҙ DNSлҘј м ңм–ҙн•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢмқ„ мҰқлӘ…н•ҳл©ҙ мқёмҰқм„ңк°Җ л°ңкёүлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ. DNS м ңкіө м—…мІҙм—җм„ң мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң DNSлҘј м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠё н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҸ„лЎқ APIлҘј м ңкіөн•ҙмЈјлҠ” кІҪмҡ° мўӢмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. мҳӨлһҳлҗң TXT л ҲмҪ”л“ңлҠ” мӮӯм ңн•ҙмЈјлҠ” кІғмқҙ мўӢмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

#### Cloudflare

API tokenкіј API keyлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ң л°©лІ•мқҙ мһҲлҠ”лҚ°, м—¬кё°м„ңлҠ” API tokenл§Ң н…ҢмҠӨнҠё н•ҙліҙкІ мҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

**My Profile -\> API Tokens -\> Create Token** лҳҗлҠ” **Manage Account -\> Account API Tokens -\> Create Token** м—җм„ң Edit zone DNS н…ңн”ҢлҰҝ мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ нҶ нҒ°мқ„ мғқм„ұн•©лӢҲлӢӨ. мҳҲмӢңлЎң м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ м„Өм •н–ҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

- Permissions
 - Zone, DNS, Edit
 - Zone, Zone, Read
- Zone Resources
 - Include, Specific zone,
- Client IP Address Filtering
 - None
- TTL
 - None

мғқм„ұн•ҳл©ҙ нҶ нҒ°кіј н•Ёк»ҳ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мҪ”л“ңлҘј мӨҚлӢҲлӢӨ.

``shell
kubectl create secret \
 generic \
 -n auth \
 cloudflare-api-token \
 --from-literal=token=
`

- https://cert-manager.io/docs/reference/api-docs/#acme.cert-manager.io/v1.ACMEIssuer

`yaml
apiVersion: cert-manager.io/v1
kind: ClusterIssuer
metadata:
 name: letsencrypt
spec:
 acme:
 email: "" # email
 server: https://acme-v02.api.letsencrypt.org/directory
 privateKeySecretRef:
 name: letsencrypt
 solvers:
 - selector:
 dnsZones:
 - "" # "domain"
 dns01:
 cloudflare:
 email: "" # cloudflare email
 apiTokenSecretRef:
 name: cloudflare-api-token
 key: token
`

- https://istio.io/latest/docs/ops/integrations/certmanager/

`yaml
apiVersion: cert-manager.io/v1
kind: Certificate
metadata:
 name: ingress-cert
 namespace: istio-system # мқҙлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•  ingress gatewayмқҳ namespaceлҘј м§Җм •н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
spec:
 secretName: ingress-cert-tls
 duration: 2160h # 90d
 renewBefore: 360h # 15d
 dnsNames:
 - "" # "*.sub.domain"
 - "" # "sub.domain"
 issuerRef:
 kind: ClusterIssuer
 name: letsencrypt
`

Certificateмқ„ мғқм„ұн•ҳлҠ” мҲңк°„ мқёмҰқмқ„ мӢңмһ‘н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`shell
kubectl describe clusterissuers.cert-manager.io letsencrypt
`

`shell
kubectl get certificates.cert-manager.io -n istio-system ingress-cert
`

мқҙ лӢӨмқҢ мҲңм„ңлҠ” мқёмҰқм—җ мӢӨнҢЁлҘј н•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ° мІҙнҒ¬ н•ҙліј мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” м Ҳм°Ёмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. л¬ҙмЎ°кұҙ мӢӨн–үн•ҙліҙкё° ліҙлӢЁ Status, EventsлҘј мһҳ мқҪм–ҙліҙл©ҙм„ң м Ғм Ҳн•ң лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј мӢӨн–үмӢңмјңм„ң л””лІ„к№… н•ҙм•јн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`shell

`yaml tilte="cilium-values.yaml"
ipam:
 # -- Configure IP Address Management mode.
 # ref: https://docs.cilium.io/en/stable/network/concepts/ipam/
 mode: "cluster-pool"
 operator:

 # -- IPv4 CIDR mask size to delegate to individual nodes for IPAM.

 # -- IPv6 podCIDR list
 clusterPoolIPv6PodCIDRList: ["fd00::/104"]
 # -- IPv6 CIDR mask size to delegate to individual nodes for IPAM.

operator:

`

cilium.yaml

 --history-max 5 \

 -n kube-system \

text:
## мӮ¬м „ мҡ”кө¬ мӮ¬н•ӯ

### ASG(Auto Scaling Group)

- Auto Scaling к·ёлЈ№м—җ м•„лһҳ нғңк·ёк°Җ мһҲм–ҙм•јн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - kubernetes.io/cluster/: owned
 - k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler/: owned
 - k8s.io/cluster-autoscaler/enabled: true
- мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗ лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ **Control plane node** м—°кІ°, **node label** м„Өм •мқ„ мһҗлҸҷнҷ” н•ҙмӨҚлӢҲлӢӨ.

``shell title="eks-asg-example.sh"
MIME-Version: 1.0
Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary="//"

--//
Content-Type: text/x-shellscript; charset="us-ascii"
#!/bin/bash
set -ex
B64_CLUSTER_CA=xxx
API_SERVER_URL=xxx
K8S_CLUSTER_DNS_IP=xxx
/etc/eks/bootstrap.sh hhk-eks --kubelet-extra-args '--node-labels=eks.amazonaws.com/sourceLaunchTemplateVersion=1,alpha.eksctl.io/cluster-name=hhk-eks,alpha.eksctl.io/nodegroup-name=worker-m5-large-ng,role=worker,eks.amazonaws.com/nodegroup-image=ami-0eb873de16468e55e,eks.amazonaws.com/capacityType=ON_DEMAND,eks.amazonaws.com/nodegroup=worker-m5-large-ng,eks.amazonaws.com/sourceLaunchTemplateId=lt-0676b3adb0ce8d3cc' --b64-cluster-ca $B64_CLUSTER_CA --apiserver-endpoint $API_SERVER_URL --dns-cluster-ip $K8S_CLUSTER_DNS_IP

--//--
`

#### managedNodeGroup

- EKS нҒҙлҹ¬мҠӨн„°мқҳ л…ёл“ң н”„лЎңл№„м ҖлӢқ л°Ҹ мҲҳлӘ… мЈјкё° кҙҖлҰ¬ мһҗлҸҷнҷ”
- AWS кі„м •мқҳ мөңмӢ  Amazon EKS мөңм Ғнҷ” AMIлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ мӢӨн–ү
- л…ёл“ң м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠё л°Ҹ мў…лЈҢмӢң л…ёл“ңлҘј м Ғм Ҳн•ҳкІҢ л№„мӣҢ м• н”ҢлҰ¬мјҖмқҙм…ҳмқ„ кі„мҶҚ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҸ„лЎқ кҙҖлҰ¬

#### nodeGroup(self-managed)

### IAM

`json title="cluster-autoscaler-policy.json"
{
 "Version": "2012-10-17",
 "Statement": [
 {
 "Action": [
 "autoscaling:DescribeAutoScalingGroups",
 "autoscaling:DescribeAutoScalingInstances",
 "autoscaling:DescribeLaunchConfigurations",
 "autoscaling:DescribeTags",
 "autoscaling:SetDesiredCapacity",
 "autoscaling:TerminateInstanceInAutoScalingGroup",
 "ec2:DescribeLaunchTemplateVersions"
 ],
 "Resource": "*",
 "Effect": "Allow"
 }
 ]
}
`

`shell
aws iam create-policy \
 --policy-name AmazonEKSClusterAutoscalerPolicy \
 --policy-document file://cluster-autoscaler-policy.json
`

`shell
eksctl create iamserviceaccount \
 --cluster= \
 --namespace=kube-system \
 --name=cluster-autoscaler \
 --attach-policy-arn=arn:aws:iam:::policy/AmazonEKSClusterAutoscalerPolicy \
 --override-existing-serviceaccounts \

`

apiVersion: apps/v1

- Auto Scaling к·ёлЈ№м—җ м•„лһҳ нғңк·ёк°Җ мһҲм–ҙм•јн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

title: CacheлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ Container л№Ңл“ңн•ҳкё°
headings: нҢҢмқј ліҖкІҪмқҙ мғқкё°л©ҙ мқҙм „ л Ҳмқҙм–ҙлҘј мһ¬мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡкі  лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј мӢӨн–үмӢңнӮөлӢҲлӢӨ.
text:
## Build Cache

- Docker Build Cache
- Layer

Dockerfileмқҳ лӘ…л №м–ҙл“ӨмқҖ л Ҳмқҙм–ҙлҘј мғқм„ұн•©лӢҲлӢӨ. л Ҳмқҙм–ҙлҠ” мқҙм „ л Ҳмқҙм–ҙм—җм„ң лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј мӢӨн–үмӢңмјң л°ңмғқн•ң ліҖнҷ”лҘј кё°лЎқн•ң кІғмһ…лӢҲлӢӨ. Build CacheлҠ” лӘ…л №м–ҙ мӢӨн–ү мӢң **мқҙм „ л Ҳмқҙм–ҙк°Җ к°ҷкі , ліҖнҷ”мқҳ лӮҙмҡ©мқҙ к°ҷлӢӨкі  нҢҗлӢЁлҗ  л•Ң** н•ҙлӢ№ лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј мӢӨн–үн•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡкі  м ҖмһҘлҗң л Ҳмқҙм–ҙлҘј мһ¬мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” кІғмқ„ л§җн•©лӢҲлӢӨ. лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј мӢӨн–үн•ҳкІҢ лҗҳл©ҙ н•ҙлӢ№ л Ҳмқҙм–ҙлҠ” н•ӯмғҒ мғҲлЎңмҡҙ л Ҳмқҙм–ҙлЎң көҗмІҙлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

л”°лқјм„ң м–ҙл–Ө лӘ…л №м–ҙк°Җ мәҗмӢұлҗҳкё° мң„н•ҙм„ңлҠ” **н•ҙлӢ№ лӘ…л №м–ҙ мқҙм „ лӘ…л №м–ҙл“Өмқҳ ліҖкІҪмқҙ м—Ҷкі , лӘЁл‘җ мәҗмӢұлҗҳм–ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.** мӨ‘к°„м—җ н•ҳлӮҳлқјлҸ„ ліҖкІҪлҗҳл©ҙ мқҙнӣ„ лӘ…л №м–ҙл“ӨмқҖ лӘЁл‘җ мғҲлЎңмҡҙ л Ҳмқҙм–ҙлЎң м ҖмһҘлҗҳкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ мәҗмӢұлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

``dockerfile
FROM node:20-alpine

WORKDIR /app

# нҢҢмқј ліҖкІҪмқҙ мғқкё°л©ҙ мқҙм „ л Ҳмқҙм–ҙлҘј мһ¬мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡкі  лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј мӢӨн–үмӢңнӮөлӢҲлӢӨ.
COPY . .
RUN npm install
RUN npm run build
`

мң„ DockerfileмқҖ мһҗмЈј л°”лҖҢлҠ” л¶Җл¶„ COPY . . мқҙнӣ„лЎңлҠ” н•ӯмғҒ мәҗмӢң м—Ҷмқҙ мӢӨн–үлҗңлӢӨкі  лҙҗм•јн•©лӢҲлӢӨ. мқҳмЎҙм„ұмқҳ ліҖкІҪмқҖ мҪ”л“ңмқҳ ліҖкІҪліҙлӢӨ мһҗмЈј мқјм–ҙлӮҳлҠ” мқјмқҙ м•„лӢҲлҜҖлЎң мқҳмЎҙм„ұ м„Өм№ҳлҘј мәҗмӢұн•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨл©ҙ л№Ңл“ң мӢңк°„мқ„ лӢЁм¶•н•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

лЎңм»¬м—җм„ңлҠ” мәҗмӢұмқҙ н•ӯмғҒ л№ лҘј мҲҳ мһҲм§Җл§Ң, CI/CD нҢҢмқҙн”„лқјмқём—җм„ңлҠ” мәҗмӢұмқ„ м ҖмһҘн•ҳлҠ” мӢңк°„ліҙлӢӨ лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘј мӢӨн–үмӢңнӮӨлҠ” мӢңк°„мқҙ л№ лҘј мҲҳ мһҲмңјлҜҖлЎң л№Ңл“ң мӢңк°„мқ„ нҷ•мқён•ҙліҙкі  мәҗмӢұмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҙм•јн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`dockerfile
FROM node:20-alpine

WORKDIR /app

# мқҳмЎҙм„ұ ліҖкІҪмқҙ м—Ҷмңјл©ҙ мәҗмӢұлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm install

# нҢҢмқј ліҖкІҪмқҙ м—Ҷмңјл©ҙ мәҗмӢұлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
COPY . .
RUN npm run build
``

## Build Cache

- Docker Build Cache
- Layer

Dockerfileмқҳ лӘ…л №м–ҙл“ӨмқҖ л Ҳмқҙм–ҙлҘј мғқм„ұн•©лӢҲлӢӨ. л Ҳмқҙм–ҙлҠ” мқҙм „ л Ҳмқҙм–ҙм—җм„ң лӘ…л №м–ҙлҘјвҖҰ

title: .dockerignoreлЎң к°ҖліҚкі  мәҗмӢұмқҙ мһҳлҗҳлҠ” Container л№Ңл“ңн•ҳкё°
text:
## .dockerignore

л№Ңл“ңлҘј мӢңмһ‘н•  л•Ң, contextм—җ .dockerignoreк°Җ мһҲлӢӨл©ҙ, м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳ нҲҙмқҖ н•ҙлӢ№ нҢҢмқјмқ„ мқҪм–ҙ л¬ҙмӢңн•  нҢҢмқјмқ„ м •мқҳн•©лӢҲлӢӨ. podmanмқҖ .containerignoreлҸ„ мқёмӢқн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

contextм—җ .dockerignoreк°Җ м—ҶлҚ”лқјлҸ„ мӢӨн–үлҗҳлҠ” DockerfileлӘ…кіј к°ҷкі  нҷ•мһҘмһҗк°Җ .dockerignoreмқё нҢҢмқјмқҙ Dockerfileкіј к°ҷмқҙ мһҲлӢӨл©ҙ н•ҙлӢ№ нҢҢмқјмқ„ мқҪм–ҙ л¬ҙмӢңн•  нҢҢмқјмқ„ м •мқҳн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

``shell
/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ deploy/
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ build.Dockerfile
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ build.Dockerfile.dockerignore
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ test.Dockerfile
в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ test.Dockerfile.dockerignore
в””в”Җв”Җ ...
`

## к·ңм№ҷ

- Go filepath.Match
- Go filepath.Clean

- contextлҘј лЈЁнҠё л””л үнҶ лҰ¬лЎң к°„мЈјн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- tempлҠ” лЈЁнҠёмқҳ temp нҢҢмқј лҳҗлҠ” л””л үнҶ лҰ¬лҘј мқҳлҜён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- #мңјлЎң мӢңмһ‘н•ҳлҠ” мӨ„мқҖ мЈјм„қмңјлЎң мІҳлҰ¬лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- *лҠ” 0к°ң мқҙмғҒмқҳ л¬ёмһҗлҘј мқҳлҜён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - */tempлҠ” н•ң лӢЁкі„ м•„лһҳмқҳ temp нҢҢмқј лҳҗлҠ” л””л үнҶ лҰ¬лҘј мқҳлҜён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - temp*лҠ” tempлЎң мӢңмһ‘н•ҳлҠ” нҢҢмқј лҳҗлҠ” л””л үнҶ лҰ¬лҘј мқҳлҜён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- ?лҠ” 1к°ңмқҳ л¬ёмһҗлҘј мқҳлҜён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - temp?лҠ” temp лӢӨмқҢм—җ н•ң кёҖмһҗк°Җ мһҲлҠ” нҢҢмқј лҳҗлҠ” л””л үнҶ лҰ¬лҘј мқҳлҜён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- **лҠ” 0к°ң мқҙмғҒмқҳ л””л үнҶ лҰ¬лҘј мқҳлҜён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - **/tempлҠ” лЈЁнҠё лҳҗлҠ” лӘЁл“  н•ҳмң„ л””л үнҶ лҰ¬мқҳ temp нҢҢмқј лҳҗлҠ” л””л үнҶ лҰ¬лҘј мқҳлҜён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- ..мқҖ мғҒмң„ л””л үнҶ лҰ¬лЎң мқҙлҸҷмқ„ мқҳлҜён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - */../tempлҠ” tempмҷҖ к°ҷмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
- !лҠ” ignoreлҘј м·ЁмҶҢн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - м„ м–ё мҲңм„ңм—җ мҳҒн–Ҙмқ„ л°ӣмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - !A*.md, AA.md мҲңм„ңлЎң м„ м–ён•ң кІҪмҡ° лЈЁнҠё л””л үнҶ лҰ¬м—җм„ң AA.mdлҘј м ңмҷён•ҳкі  AлЎң мӢңмһ‘н•ҳлҠ” лӘЁл“  .md нҢҢмқјмқ„ м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳм—җ нҸ¬н•ЁмӢңнӮөлӢҲлӢӨ.
 - AA.md, !A*.md мҲңм„ңлЎң м„ м–ён•ң кІҪмҡ° лЈЁнҠё л””л үнҶ лҰ¬м—җм„ң AлЎң мӢңмһ‘н•ҳлҠ” лӘЁл“  .md нҢҢмқјмқ„ м»Ён…Ңмқҙл„Ҳм—җ нҸ¬н•ЁмӢңнӮөлӢҲлӢӨ.
- \\лҠ” escape л¬ёмһҗлЎң мӮ¬мҡ©лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 - \\*лҠ” * л¬ёмһҗлҘј мқҳлҜён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
- м—°мҶҚлҗң /`лҠ” н•ҳлӮҳлЎң мІҳлҰ¬лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

title: Container Layer
text:
## Layer

- Docker Layers
- Docker Storage drivers

``dockerfile
# layer 1
FROM ubuntu:20.04

WORKDIR /app

# layer 2
COPY . /app/

# layer 3
RUN mkdir dir1
# layer 4
RUN mkdir dir2
# layer 5
RUN rm -rf dir1

ENTRYPOINT ["ls", "-al"]
`

title: containerd м„Өм№ҳ л°Ҹ м„Өм •
text:
containerd к°ңмҡ” л¬ём„ңм—җм„ң м•„нӮӨн…ҚмІҳлҘј лЁјм Җ нҷ•мқён•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

## м„Өм№ҳ

### л°”мқҙл„ҲлҰ¬ м„Өм№ҳ

- containerd GitHub / getting-started.md
- nerdctl GitHub / README.md # Install
- BuildKit GitHub / README.md # Systemd socket activation
- BuildKit GitHub / docs / buildkitd.toml.md

#### containerd

``shell
wget https://github.com/containerd/containerd/releases/download/v2.0.4/containerd-2.0.4-linux-amd64.tar.gz
`

`shell
sudo tar xzf containerd-2.0.4-linux-amd64.tar.gz -C /usr/local
`

`shell
sudo mkdir -p /usr/local/lib/systemd/system
`

`shell
sudo wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/containerd/containerd/main/containerd.service \
 -O /usr/local/lib/systemd/system/containerd.service
`

`shell
sudo mkdir -p /etc/containerd
`

`shell
containerd config default | sudo tee /etc/containerd/config.toml
`

`shell
systemctl daemon-reload \
&& systemctl enable --now containerd
`

#### runc

`shell
wget https://github.com/opencontainers/runc/releases/download/v1.2.6/runc.amd64
`

`shell
sudo install -m 755 runc.amd64 /usr/local/sbin/runc
`

#### CNI plugins

`shell
wget https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/releases/download/v1.6.2/cni-plugins-linux-amd64-v1.6.2.tgz
`

`shell
sudo mkdir -p /opt/cni/bin
`

`shell
sudo tar xzf cni-plugins-linux-amd64-v1.6.2.tgz -C /opt/cni/bin
`

#### nerdctl

`shell
wget https://github.com/containerd/nerdctl/releases/download/v2.0.4/nerdctl-2.0.4-linux-amd64.tar.gz
`

`shell
sudo tar xzf nerdctl-2.0.4-linux-amd64.tar.gz -C /usr/local/bin
`

nerdctl-fullмқ„ м„Өм№ҳн•ҳл©ҙ containerd, runc, CNI plugins, BuildKit, RootlessKit, slirp4netns, bypass4netns, containerd-fuse-overlayfs л“ұмқ„ лӘЁл‘җ м„Өм№ҳн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

`shell
wget https://github.com/containerd/nerdctl/releases/download/v2.0.4/nerdctl-full-2.0.4-linux-amd64.tar.gz
`

`shell
sudo tar xzf nerdctl-full-2.0.4-linux-amd64.tar.gz -C /usr/local
`

#### BuildKit

`shell
wget https://github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/download/v0.21.0/buildkit-v0.21.0.linux-amd64.tar.gz
`

`shell
sudo tar xzf buildkit-v0.21.0.linux-amd64.tar.gz -C /usr/local
`

`shell
sudo mkdir -p /etc/buildkit
`

`toml title="/etc/buildkit/buildkitd.toml"
[worker.oci]
 enabled = false

[worker.containerd]
 enabled = true
 namespace = "k8s.io"

[registry.""]
 http = true
`

`toml title="/etc/buildkit/buildkitd.toml"
[registry."quay.io"]
 mirrors = ["192.168.31.250:5000/quai.io"]

[registry."192.168.31.250:5000"]
 http = true
`

`shell
sudo mkdir -p /usr/local/lib/systemd/system
`

`shell
sudo wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/moby/buildkit/refs/heads/master/examples/systemd/system/buildkit.socket \
 -O /usr/local/lib/systemd/system/buildkit.socket
`

`shell
sudo wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/moby/buildkit/refs/heads/master/examples/systemd/system/buildkit.service \
 -O /usr/local/lib/systemd/system/buildkit.service
`

`shell
systemctl daemon-reload \
&& systemctl enable --now buildkit.socket \
&& systemctl enable --now buildkit.service
`

## м„Өм •

### Registry м„Өм •

- containerd GitHub / hosts.md

`toml title="/etc/containerd/config.toml"
version = 3

[plugins]
 [plugins.'io.containerd.cri.v1.images']
 [plugins.'io.containerd.cri.v1.images'.registry]
 config_path = "/etc/containerd/certs.d"
`

`toml title="/etc/containerd/certs.d//hosts.toml"
server = ""

[host.""]
 capabilities = ["pull", "resolve", "push"]
 skip_verify = false
 override_path = false
`

`toml title="/etc/containerd/certs.d/quay.io/hosts.toml"
server = "https://quay.io"

[host."http://192.168.31.250:5000/v2/quai.io"]
 capabilities = ["pull", "resolve", "push"]
 skip_verify = true
 override_path = true
``

DNS мҝјлҰ¬лҠ” к°ҖмһҘ л§Һмқҙ л§Өм№ӯлҗң zoneмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•©лӢҲлӢӨ. b.aмҷҖ c.b.a zoneмқҙ мһҲмқ„ л•Ң, d.c.b.aм—җ лҢҖн•ң мҝјлҰ¬к°Җ мҳӨл©ҙ c.b.a zoneмқҙ л§Өм№ӯлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

servers м„Өм •мқҖ м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ нҳ•мӢқмңјлЎң ліҖнҷҳлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

title: crd2pulumi ліҖнҷҳ к°Җмқҙл“ң
text:
crd2pulumi к°ңмҡ” л¬ём„ңм—җм„ң лҸ„кө¬ м—ӯн• мқ„ лЁјм Җ нҷ•мқён•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

## м„Өм№ҳ

``shell
go install github.com/pulumi/crd2pulumi@latest
`

## CRDs to yaml

`shell
for crd in $(kubectl get crd -o name); do
 case $crd in
 *istio*)
 echo $crd | cut -d "/" -f 2
 echo "---" >> crds.yaml
 kubectl get $crd -o yaml >> crds.yaml
 ;;
 esac
done
`

`shell
crd2pulumi \
 --nodejsPath ./crds/istio \

`yaml title="monitoring/dcgm-exporter/helm/values.yaml"
affinity:
 nodeAffinity:
 # мҠӨмјҖмӨ„л§Ғ н•  л•җ н•„мҡ”, мқҙлҜё мғқм„ұлҗң кІҪмҡ° л¬ҙмӢңн•ҳлҠ” мЎ°кұҙ

 - matchExpressions:
 # node labelм—җ keyк°’мңјлЎң nvidia.com/gpuк°Җ мһҲмңјл©ҙ мҠӨмјҖмӨ„л§Ғ
 - key: nvidia.com/gpu

title: Dexм—җ Google м—°кІ°н•ҳкё°
text:
- Dex Docs / Connectors / Authentication Through Google

## OAuth client мғқм„ұ

1. https://console.cloud.google.com/
1. APIs & Services -\> Credentials нҺҳмқҙм§ҖлЎң мқҙлҸҷн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. Create credentials -\> OAuth client IDлҘј нҒҙлҰӯн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. Application typeмңјлЎң Web applicationмқ„ м„ нғқн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. Name, Authorized redirect URIsлҘј мһ…л Ҙн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. CreateлҘј нҒҙлҰӯн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

## м„Өм •

``yaml title="dex-values.yaml"
config:
 connectors:
 - type: google
 id: google
 name: Google
 config:
 clientID:
 clientSecret:
 redirectURI: /callback
 promptType: ""
`

## groups к°Җм ёмҳӨкё°

### Service account мғқм„ұ

- Google Workspace / Guide / Create access credentials # Service account credentials

1. https://console.cloud.google.com/
1. IAM & Admin -\> Service Accounts нҺҳмқҙм§ҖлЎң мқҙлҸҷн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. Create service accountлҘј нҒҙлҰӯн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. Service account nameмқ„ мһ…л Ҙн•ҳкі  Create and continueлҘј нҒҙлҰӯн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. Doneмқ„ нҒҙлҰӯн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

### Credential мғқм„ұ

1. https://console.cloud.google.com/
1. IAM & Admin -\> Service Accounts нҺҳмқҙм§ҖлЎң мқҙлҸҷн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. мғқм„ұн•ң Service accountлҘј нҒҙлҰӯн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. Keys нғӯмңјлЎң мқҙлҸҷн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. Add Key -\> Create new keyлҘј нҒҙлҰӯн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. JSONмқ„ м„ нғқ нӣ„ CreateлҘј нҒҙлҰӯн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

мғқм„ұн•ҳл©ҙ мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң JSON нҢҢмқјмқҙ лӢӨмҡҙлЎңл“ңлҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ.

### Domain-wide delegation м„Өм •

1. https://console.cloud.google.com/
1. IAM & Admin -\> Service Accounts нҺҳмқҙм§ҖлЎң мқҙлҸҷн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. мғқм„ұн•ң Service accountлҘј нҒҙлҰӯн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. Advanced settingsлҘј нҷ•мһҘн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. Client IDлҘј ліөмӮ¬н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. View Google Workspace Admin Consoleмқ„ нҒҙлҰӯн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.(super administrator)
1. Security -\> Access and data control -\> API controls нҺҳмқҙм§ҖлЎң м ‘мҶҚн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. MANAGE DOMAIN WIDE DELEGATIONмқ„ нҒҙлҰӯн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. Add newлҘј нҒҙлҰӯн•ң нӣ„ ліөмӮ¬н•ң Client IDлҘј мһ…л Ҙн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. OAuth scopesм—җ https://www.googleapis.com/auth/admin.directory.group.readonlyлҘј мһ…л Ҙн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. AUTHORIZEлҘј нҒҙлҰӯн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

### Admin SDK API нҷңм„ұнҷ”

1. https://console.cloud.google.com/
1. APIs & Services -\> Enabled APIs & services нҺҳмқҙм§ҖлЎң мқҙлҸҷн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. Enable APIs and servicesлҘј нҒҙлҰӯн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. Admin SDKлҘј кІҖмғүн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. Admin SDK APIлҘј нҒҙлҰӯн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. Enableмқ„ нҒҙлҰӯн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

### Admin Email м„Өм •

1. https://admin.google.com/
1. Account -\> Admin roles нҺҳмқҙм§ҖлЎң мқҙлҸҷн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. Groups ReaderлҘј нҒҙлҰӯн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
1. мӮ¬мҡ©н•  Emailмқ„ м¶”к°Җн•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

### м„Өм • м Ғмҡ©н•ҳкё°

`yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
 name: dex-google-service-account
 namespace: dex
type: Opaque
data:
 googleAuth.json:
`

`yaml title="dex-values.yaml"
config:
 connectors:
 - type: google
 config:
 serviceAccountFilePath: /etc/dex/google-auth/googleAuth.json
 domainToAdminEmail:
 # example.com: admin@example.com
 :

volumes:
 - name: google-auth
 secret:
 secretName: dex-google-service-account

volumeMounts:
 - name: google-auth
 mountPath: /etc/dex/google-auth
``

## Fluent Bit

`yaml title="fluent-bit-values.yaml"
env:
 - name: ES_HOST
 value: elasticsearch-es-http.elastic-system.svc.cluster.local
 - name: ES_PORT
 value: "9200"
 - name: ES_USER
 value: "elastic"
 - name: ES_PASSWORD
 valueFrom:
 secretKeyRef:
 name: elasticsearch-es-elastic-user
 key: elastic

config:
 # indentлҘј 4м№ёмңјлЎң л§һм¶°м•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
 outputs: |
 # https://docs.fluentbit.io/manual/pipeline/outputs/elasticsearch
 [OUTPUT]
 Name es
 Match *
 Host ${ES_HOST}
 Port ${ES_PORT}
 HTTP_User ${ES_USER}
 HTTP_Passwd ${ES_PASSWORD}
 Trace_Error On
 Buffer_Size 64K
 Logstash_Format On
 Logstash_DateFormat %Y.%m
 Logstash_Prefix_Key tag
 Current_Time_Index On
 Suppress_Type_Name On
 Retry_Limit 5
`

## Fluentd

`yaml title="fluentd-values.yaml"
env:
 - name: ES_HOST
 value: elasticsearch-es-http.elastic-system.svc.cluster.local
 - name: ES_PORT
 value: "9200"
 - name: ES_USER
 value: "elastic"
 - name: ES_PASSWORD

 key: elastic

fileConfigs:
 output-es.conf: |
 # https://github.com/uken/fluent-plugin-elasticsearch

 @type elasticsearch
 @id out_es
 @log_level info
 include_tag_key true
 scheme http
 host "#{ENV['ES_HOST']}"
 port "#{ENV['ES_PORT']}"
 user "#{ENV['ES_USER']}"
 password "#{ENV['ES_PASSWORD']}"
 reload_connections false
 reconnect_on_error true
 reload_on_failure true
 request_timeout 30s
 logstash_format true
 logstash_prefix ${tag}
 logstash_dateformat %Y.%m
 sniffer_class_name Fluent::Plugin::ElasticsearchSimpleSniffer
 suppress_type_name true

 flush_at_shutdown true
 flush_interval 10s
 flush_thread_count 4
 retry_max_interval 30s

``
